| | Peter, Val ran for Congress so someone was there to stand up for the working people, and this week, when she left the DOGE caucus, she made it clear what this fight is all about. Val joined the bipartisan DOGE caucus because she thinks it’s a good thing for people of both parties to find ways to make government work more efficiently. And she wanted to make sure that there was a strong voice there for working people. But that’s not possible while Donald Trump and Elon Musk are taking a wrecking ball to the needs of Americans: “They say it’s about efficiency and saving taxpayer dollars. It isn’t. It’s about intimidating workers, breaking our government, and installing loyalists that are loyal to Donald Trump and Elon Musk, and not to the American people or the constitution.” [Val’s fighting back](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101964698/527644285/-609090530?refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDk2YmU0ZC1kNGU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJ9vAbCpXFQB6r5BWigHGHMXdHwnTfERvontC1BSU6k=&emci=2f2c328c-cbe8-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=2096be4d-d4e8-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9636579) – and she’ll always fight for working families. **[Make sure she’s not alone. name: Team Crow
subject: One of Jason’s favorite parts of the job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Jason loves getting the chance to talk to his constituents, team — it’s one of his favorite parts of the job! Over the past few weeks, Jason has been meeting with local business leaders, young people, and first responders to discuss the future of our community and country. Here’s a recap of what he’s been up to: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101964955/527645637/693744669?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg4YTM3ZS1kNGU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKWtWUkwZC5HrUWWVUmTqCMIR5T_2BXS9xbsKpkNMFU=) _On Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Jason marched in the MLK parade and spoke about the importance of continuing our efforts to build a more perfect union._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101964956/527645638/693744669?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg4YTM3ZS1kNGU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKWtWUkwZC5HrUWWVUmTqCMIR5T_2BXS9xbsKpkNMFU=) _Jason met with local firefighters to thank them for their efforts to keep us safe and discuss how he can best support them in Congress._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101964957/527645666/693744669?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg4YTM3ZS1kNGU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKWtWUkwZC5HrUWWVUmTqCMIR5T_2BXS9xbsKpkNMFU=) _Jason met with students at Horizon Community Middle School in Aurora to discuss how their bright minds will play a huge role in shaping our future._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101964958/527645667/693744669?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg4YTM3ZS1kNGU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKWtWUkwZC5HrUWWVUmTqCMIR5T_2BXS9xbsKpkNMFU=) _Jason sat down with local business leaders in Aurora to discuss how Trump’s harmful immigration policy will hurt local businesses, raise costs for working families, and worsen workforce shortages._ Governing isn’t a one-way street. That’s why Jason is committed to continuing his conversations and building relationships with voters across this district to make real progress for our community. **[Will you pitch in a donation today to support Jason’s work delivering for Coloradans in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101964959/527645668/693744669?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg4YTM3ZS1kNGU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKWtWUkwZC5HrUWWVUmTqCMIR5T_2BXS9xbsKpkNMFU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101964960/527645669/693744669?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250211_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg4YTM3ZS1kNGU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKWtWUkwZC5HrUWWVUmTqCMIR5T_2BXS9xbsKpkNMFU=)

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: More than 1,100 EPA staff threatened with firing
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIxMTAxOTgS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjE2MDE2NTI4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
FIRST:the Trump administration defied the Constitution to unilaterally freeze every
federally funded program nationwide. THEN: they “rescinded” the order in the face of public outrage. NOW:they STILL aren’t making many of the payments. And Russell Vought — the man who
outlined the illegal freeze in the Project 2025 manifesto — was just confirmed
by Republicans in the Senate to lead the Office of Management and Budget, which
oversees policy and budget decisions for the president. Our teams are continuing to rally public outcry over the spending freeze — and
to resist Vought’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda, which threatens all
environmental protections, critical support for seniors, homeowners, farmers,
schools, and disaster victims, and the health and safety of all our communities.
Given the urgency of this moment, we’re calling on every LCV supporter: we need your help. We’ve set an urgent goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the month to mount a response. Please, Peter — renew your membership today. Give whatever you can — but all it takes is $5 to renew. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTKE_ In the midst of Vought’s confirmation fight, unelected billionaire Elon Musk also menaced more than 1,100 employees at the
Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) with firing at any moment,even though it’s likely illegal. That’s on top of the ENTIRE Office of
Environmental Justice being put on administrative leave. These are the people who enforce our most fundamental environmental laws,
programs, and safeguards and ensure that rules are applied fairly in the most
vulnerable communities and against big polluters. These are public servants and
scientists who: Staff the programs that guard against air and water pollution. Administer brownfields redevelopment and clean energy funding.Manage programs to reduce greenhouse gas emissions and protect our communities from climate change.Drive the work to replace lead pipes that carry our drinking water. Inspect and remediate toxic waste sites... and much more. If Trump succeeds at gutting the EPA, communities around the country willface contaminated drinking water, dirtier air, and virtually no enforcement of
environmental laws — a return to a dangerous past when polluters were free to
pollute our air, lands, and water that we must not return to. But as bad as things seem right now, I want you to know that there are still
ways to make a difference.Trump has already walked back parts of his spending freeze thanks to pressure
from people in every part of the country — proof that our voices collectively
have power. His Cabinet picks are getting put through the wringer. Matt Gaetz needed to
withdraw — and even Republicans are questioning some of Trump’s latest choices. During Trump’s first term, the environmental movement was able to stop some of
the worst attacks on the environment by organizing, mobilizing our supporters,
and engaging leaders to stand strong on core protections. We blocked pipelines.
We saved public lands. We advanced clean energy — and we did it with supporters
like YOU. Stopping his agenda again is going to take all of us pitching in. Renew your LCV membership today, Peter — it only costs $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTV- Thank you for everything that you do. It’s good to know that when things get
tough, you’re willing to step up. And we promise — we will alwaysbe here to protect people and the planet and take the fight to polluters and
their crooked allies. Onward, Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12110198&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE2MDE2NTI4NQS2&spReportId=MjE2MDE2NTI4NQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12110198&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE2MDE2NTI4NQS2&spReportId=MjE2MDE2NTI4NQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f0XY-

THEN: they “rescinded” the order in the face of public outrage. NOW:they STILL aren’t making many of the payments. And Russell Vought — the man who outlined the illegal freeze in the Project 2025 manifesto — was just confirmed by Republicans in the Senate to lead the Office of Management and Budget, which oversees policy and budget decisions for the president. Our teams are continuing to rally public outcry over the spending freeze — and to resist Vought’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda, which threatens all environmental protections, critical support for seniors, homeowners, farmers, schools, and disaster victims, and the health and safety of all our communities. Given the urgency of this moment, we’re calling on every LCV supporter: we need your help. We’ve set an urgent goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the month to mount a response. Please, Peter — renew your membership today. Give whatever you can — but all it takes is $5 to renew. In the midst of Vought’s confirmation fight, unelected billionaire Elon Musk also menaced more than 1,100 employees at the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) with firing at any moment,even though it’s likely illegal. That’s on top of the ENTIRE Office of Environmental Justice being put on administrative leave. These are the people who enforce our most fundamental environmental laws, programs, and safeguards and ensure that rules are applied fairly in the most vulnerable communities and against big polluters. These are public servants and scientists who: Staff the programs that guard against air and water pollution. Administer brownfields redevelopment and clean energy funding.Manage programs to reduce greenhouse gas emissions and protect our communities from climate change.Drive the work to replace lead pipes that carry our drinking water. Inspect and remediate toxic waste sites... and much more. If Trump succeeds at gutting the EPA, communities around the country willface contaminated drinking water, dirtier air, and virtually no enforcement of environmental laws — a return to a dangerous past when polluters were free to pollute our air, lands, and water that we must not return to. But as bad as things seem right now, I want you to know that there are still ways to make a difference.Trump has already walked back parts of his spending freeze thanks to pressure from people in every part of the country — proof that our voices collectively have power. His Cabinet picks are getting put through the wringer. Matt Gaetz needed to withdraw — and even Republicans are questioning some of Trump’s latest choices. During Trump’s first term, the environmental movement was able to stop some of the worst attacks on the environment by organizing, mobilizing our supporters, and engaging leaders to stand strong on core protections. We blocked pipelines. We saved public lands. We advanced clean energy — and we did it with supporters like YOU. Stopping his agenda again is going to take all of us pitching in. Renew your LCV membership today, Peter — it only costs $5 >> Thank you for everything that you do. It’s good to know that when things get tough, you’re willing to step up. And we promise — we will alwaysbe here to protect people and the planet and take the fight to polluters and their crooked allies. Onward, Chris Brooks Vice President of Membership League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information here to unsubscribe from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. 740 15th St NW, Suite 700 Washington, DC 20005 202-785-8683 DONATE

name: Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
subject: I have good news and bad news
body:
| | | Good news, bad news
---
| |
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c779bcbdc6754934968f301025c36c2f&_e=v-SCgthGI88NZz4nG0-POmFnUkPXGGWoi_H6ZBA5cMFadzsqzMWYA30jHiqX7-Rt0w3XpBTZLjCrNUwwfhAb899qw_6oNMY1BumKNxnmKGo_AjN1gmxasgsonm-mX2oCJIyFT2WZlda55QlOEDPwBL3AQl3S645a1OzmvmYQoZvDqk97HTIb4IUYuwnOFxE8O4sDPeFTSToy2zHDoWAsVsBTPYfUHAvnyR8KUnoXvi82RWK_tNRmsL7hgu3b1F6g4vpye-jieaAvUL0G_Kl2Y4G9m9-RlaOqpIUvIhpDo588SJD1o7T3ts717evxzQE1oVB2KBVH2t67HYzVVbj-OhN2-EQ6jQ_-FvM4wMY3qw-q6oDWbKV_FC4k8_Cd9thzIdGCkMSrkE_i5Ui7kdVYMg%3D%3D)
---
Patriot, I have good news and bad news. The good news is the trial for Officer Brad Lunsford began on Monday, February 3rd.That means as I’m writing this email this brave officer is finally getting his chance to clear his name in court. The bad news is we must come up with $10,000 to ensure we have the funds to cover the trial expenses. **[**As a patriot who backs the blue, I'm asking you to donate $35 or more in the next 24 hours.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c779bcbdc6754934968f301025c36c2f&_e=v-SCgthGI88NZz4nG0-POmFnUkPXGGWoi_H6ZBA5cMFadzsqzMWYA30jHiqX7-Rt0w3XpBTZLjCrNUwwfhAb899qw_6oNMY1BumKNxnmKGo_AjN1gmxasgsonm-mX2oCJIyFT2WZlda55QlOEDPwBL3AQl3S645a1OzmvmYQoZvDqk97HTIb4IUYuwnOFxE8O4sDPeFTSToy2zHDoWAsVsBTPYfUHAvnyR8KUnoXvi8Scd-PQm8ID3uXsMif-l4MzqsRdDTvXPLAiGCUgVs33R3nFkkPaR0Tpd13PGMuU3dIUEC-eGV8n7Pdl1enGgjUfTQihBBqSmgIGPp35hXcfzUEkW3c9I72DfITPbOWFMQxuUIw2HndoGsZ0Oz22PAVCfYeiaG4NweBrzda1geCUw%3D%3D)** It's outrageous that Brad has even been charged in this case. He faces a charge of voluntary manslaughter for saving his partner's life from a suspect armed with a knife who was resisting being detained and violently threatened their lives.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. Brad had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's life. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.It was an act of heroism -- but because the cop was white, and the suspect was black...it instantly becomes a felony to a Soros-backed prosecutor. Now Brad Lunsford is facing 11 years prison. Let that sink in. 11 years in prison -- locked away from his wife and young children -- for following his police training and saving his partner's life.**[**I hope you can see why I'm asking you to donate $35 or more right away to help fund Brad's case.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c779bcbdc6754934968f301025c36c2f&_e=v-SCgthGI88NZz4nG0-POmFnUkPXGGWoi_H6ZBA5cMFadzsqzMWYA30jHiqX7-Rt0w3XpBTZLjCrNUwwfhAb899qw_6oNMY1BumKNxnmKGo_AjN1gmxasgsonm-mX2oCJIyFT2WZlda55QlOEDPwBL3AQl3S645a1OzmvmYQoZvDqk97HTIb4IUYuwnOFxE8O4sDPeFTSToy2zHDoWAsVsBTPYfUHAvnyR8KUnoXvi-yG_QEFN7lVhpO1c1NCBsLBL8Xx270U41RBGm78yY-EnkM_CcKbkYkVKUZm2VYzGG03it5ckqjdl3w-dyaKULNp2O6aaKdcrUY0LqyFjWyubg__X8DEdqUj_xZ6mYbhJn_ok3Iv6za0MhFlE-48l7KCvSdZpAR8wCz9EQarJkQNQ%3D%3D)** You see, trials are expensive.
---
* Those attorneys we've been paying hourly are suddenly on the case 8+ hours a day for as long as the trial takes.
* The expert witnesses required to put on a solid defense come with hefty price tags.
* And of course, there's travel and lodgings for our officers and their families -- who want to be there to support their loved one.

---
It's no small undertaking to pay for someone's legal defense. Here at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund we're blessed to be able to do this for wrongly accused officers because of the generosity of folks like you. But trials put a huge stress on our budget -- which is why I'm urgently turning to you for help.**[**Can I count on you to donate $35 or more right away?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c779bcbdc6754934968f301025c36c2f&_e=v-SCgthGI88NZz4nG0-POmFnUkPXGGWoi_H6ZBA5cMFadzsqzMWYA30jHiqX7-Rt0w3XpBTZLjCrNUwwfhAb899qw_6oNMY1BumKNxnmKGo_AjN1gmxasgsonm-mX2oCJIyFT2WZlda55QlOEDPwBL3AQl3S645a1OzmvmYQoZvDqk97HTIb4IUYuwnOFxE8O4sDPeFTSToy2zHDoWAsVsBTPYfUHAvnyR8KUnoXvi-Wpcz9joQXk6oa7AAqCMzCcha7YcPYwAas58JkDUPHXRLZJN2jeK-DOQjOYLpSW6YoFY7OvW9_jS1otCSX8aOPmUjXLJ_zqu_VSDc8ZW_wuAAwYSbR9CrLg5OkNE1Es9DhGvRRxYQ3In0Mlkfnr-lpMb8dz8wPmIwJQ8a4JewrhA%3D%3D)** Knowing we can count on folks like you makes it possible for LELDF to say YES to wrongly accused officers, like Brad, who need our help.Thank you for helping us provide top-notch legal defenses to all our wrongly accused officers.
---
Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c779bcbdc6754934968f301025c36c2f&_e=v-SCgthGI88NZz4nG0-POmFnUkPXGGWoi_H6ZBA5cMFadzsqzMWYA30jHiqX7-Rt0w3XpBTZLjCrNUwwfhAb899qw_6oNMY1BumKNxnmKGo_AjN1gmxasgsonm-mX2oCJIyFT2WZlda55QlOEDPwBL3AQl3S645a1OzmvmYQoZvDqk97HTIb4IUYuwnOFxE8O4sDPeFTSToy2zHDoWAsVsBTPYfUHAvnyR8KUnoXvi_0HCm3tce8UeLSPTeuPdDVMVPT8-RhHJuuTq0lu6efk8TlzQ1Q6n_hblz3xbBVTQ5WPjtd4CiE2t_n2IhP-o95SmVT8K8MgJ1Rxp0PIxSF0sriOeQTjvNprcIK2MCigtBnwpoMV09o5qBE6Ptlnk8G17G5IvhSy7Ek2I93ivG4Pg%3D%3D)
---
Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
---
P.S. We must raise $10,000 to ensure the trial for Officer Brad Lunsford is fully funded. **[**Can I count on your donation of $35 or more?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c779bcbdc6754934968f301025c36c2f&_e=v-SCgthGI88NZz4nG0-POmFnUkPXGGWoi_H6ZBA5cMFadzsqzMWYA30jHiqX7-Rt0w3XpBTZLjCrNUwwfhAb899qw_6oNMY1BumKNxnmKGo_AjN1gmxasgsonm-mX2oCJIyFT2WZlda55QlOEDPwBL3AQl3S645a1OzmvmYQoZvDqk97HTIb4IUYuwnOFxE8O4sDPeFTSToy2zHDoWAsVsBTPYfUHAvnyR8KUnoXvi8ilsCsPmJLsFc9PrJWicKWyL5_ku0EbfIzsCubm6fhh1DT1G1JQqHG-otMsm039VUpejLSsu06FsDngN3xLqVdH6Toh0uJUchpte5Qv8Bnf0QU3WqUFRAH3MyEVr0IgXz3n9-grtPWqUP2qiT20Bp_0uEQqzB5fZ7d_cnSWOucfw%3D%3D)** Thank you in advance for helping us provide the best possible legal defenses for all our officers.
---
| | [ **DONATE**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c779bcbdc6754934968f301025c36c2f&_e=v-SCgthGI88NZz4nG0-POmFnUkPXGGWoi_H6ZBA5cMFadzsqzMWYA30jHiqX7-Rt0w3XpBTZLjCrNUwwfhAb899qw_6oNMY1BumKNxnmKGo_AjN1gmxasgsonm-mX2oCJIyFT2WZlda55QlOEDPwBL3AQl3S645a1OzmvmYQoZvDqk97HTIb4IUYuwnOFxE8O4sDPeFTSToy2zHDoWAsVsBTPYfUHAvnyR8KUnoXvi8BmpuPTjT7T32-TUSkTmIyZTK1hBxoQCJM8ypI6RD2KwKaDkQOr0kruJJa_HbSG2Dplx2cwq_PCbZoyS4lo2QC-j9mkGc2JqUEaT8ZRgxMC7liwogy-waCmYAWzhcGvkHQ08korW7Y5Di4dTQF4UFJ_uGNM4oS2_cYkKsz5yKg8Q%3D%3D)
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_ ****[********](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c779bcbdc6754934968f301025c36c2f&_e=v-SCgthGI88NZz4nG0-POmFnUkPXGGWoi_H6ZBA5cMFadzsqzMWYA30jHiqX7-Rt0w3XpBTZLjCrNUwwfhAb899qw_6oNMY1BumKNxnmKGo_AjN1gmxasgsonm-mX2oCJIyFT2WZlda55QlOEDPwBL3AQl3S645a1OzmvmYQoZvDqk97HTIb4IUYuwnOFxE8O4sDPeFTSToy2zHDoWAsVsBTPYfUHAvnyR8KUnoXvi85PNn0-WZsNA44tNGCzG3QKnB1L8bZpT6YrImFLGTtae48k00cYzpfCHeew-QYqL1BPtY2C0oF-NX2mpIyaNr8sH6IwP7Bfo_lDKvzx4oV4MqrD7vSz6XkB05CKrlvscMbZ3Bmyu98dBQNwcRm6bzgmXnwa-J79I11D-A06-4BkQ%3D%3D)****

subject: Celebrating the newest Black Congressional Emerge Alums!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
This Black History Month, we’re celebrating the incredible Black women leaders who have stepped up to break down barriers and make strides toward ensuring our government truly reflects the diversity of its people.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101965519/527653674/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-02-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxMjkyYzhmLWQ2ZTgtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZmezlFsAG1l---dudUfYMjT6ClKWIddcHC192bKSWi4=)
---
| Peter,

This Black History Month, we’re celebrating the incredible Black women leaders who have stepped up to break down barriers and make strides toward ensuring our government truly reflects the diversity of its people.

_**Emerge is proud to highlight our newest Black Congressional alums – Rep. Janelle Bynum (OR-5), Rep. LaMonica McIver (NJ-10), and Rep. Lateefah Simon (CA-12) – who will be fierce advocates for their communities in the halls of Congress!**_
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101965520/527653675/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-02-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxMjkyYzhmLWQ2ZTgtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZmezlFsAG1l---dudUfYMjT6ClKWIddcHC192bKSWi4=)
Black women have long been at the forefront of change, but today, they make up only 5.4% of voting members in Congress. We must elect more Black women to every level of government and expand their leadership to build up power for the New American Majority!

[_**Will you contribute $25 this Black History Month to help us continue investing in Black women across the country who are ready to run for office and serve their communities?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101965521/527653677/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-02-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxMjkyYzhmLWQ2ZTgtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZmezlFsAG1l---dudUfYMjT6ClKWIddcHC192bKSWi4=)

clean_body: This Black History Month, we’re celebrating the incredible Black women leaders who have stepped up to break down barriers and make strides toward ensuring our government truly reflects the diversity of its people. | = | Peter, This Black History Month, we’re celebrating the incredible Black women leaders who have stepped up to break down barriers and make strides toward ensuring our government truly reflects the diversity of its people. Emerge is proud to highlight our newest Black Congressional alums – Rep. Janelle Bynum (OR-5), Rep. LaMonica McIver (NJ-10), and Rep. Lateefah Simon (CA-12) – who will be fierce advocates for their communities in the halls of Congress! = Black women have long been at the forefront of change, but today, they make up only 5.4% of voting members in Congress. We must elect more Black women to every level of government and expand their leadership to build up power for the New American Majority! = | = | = | = | = | = Happy Black History Month! Onward, A’shanti F. Gholar President, Emerge = * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 4 Embarcadero Center Suite 1400 San Francisco, CA 94111 United States

name: Dan Carr
subject: Freedom isn't Free
body:
Why Freedom Frontline?

| |
---|---|---
|
# Freedom isn't Free
### Why Freedom Frontline?
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Feb 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
America was founded on principles of liberty, personal responsibility, and the enduring belief in the Creator. However, these values are increasingly under attack. From cancel culture silencing dissenting voices to progressive policies undermining individual freedoms, conservatives often find themselves outnumbered and outfunded.
[Subscribe to the Freedom Frontline YouTube channel:](https://substack.com/redirect/42eb6060-773c-413e-96c1-628950a367a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Freedom Frontline Website:](https://substack.com/redirect/ca2edae4-2dd3-46b3-b7a7-09b8f5aaa30a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Freedom Frontline recognizes that winning the ideological war requires more than rhetoric. It demands action. By equipping grassroots activists, community leaders, and policymakers, Freedom Frontline seeks to create a robust network of patriots ready to defend the values that built America.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kYW5qYWNraWUyMDE0LnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.wwb9s7IiM62yl9w0y5WrN0G9VoakhpHs_qp2aB3Q8uE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156965563)
Dan Carr
(C) 2025 Dan Carr
18237 Hwy 53, Gulfport, MS 39503

subject: They’ll have to come through us

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101965839/527666265/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2E2ODFlNi1kOWU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEJa8jzPcqT3PyAUwga42lTLVdzOq_HMK4VmqcqJVWs=&emci=bc6e1022-d3e8-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e7a681e6-d9e8-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9818364)
---

| | In the wake of November's election, Republicans have been giddy about their plans to make deep cuts in the programs that millions of Americans rely on and have worked hard to earn — including Social Security. Elon Musk (who seems to have Donald Trump's ear more than anyone else right now) has amplified these calls, so know that we should take these threats very seriously. **In fact, new reporting indicates that Musk's "DOGE" team — hot off trying to raid the Treasury Department to steal your data — is looking to target the Social Security Administration next.** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101965840/527666266/-2044921950?refcode=2025-02-11-ss&recurring=yes&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e7a681e6-d9e8-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2E2ODFlNi1kOWU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEJa8jzPcqT3PyAUwga42lTLVdzOq_HMK4VmqcqJVWs=) But I've got a simple message for the GOP:**you come for Social Security, you come through the American people.** Republicans think they can just explode the deficit by giving tax cuts to billionaires and force everyone else to foot the bill. **They're about to find out that Americans value their families' well-being over the self-interested whims of Elon Musk, Donald Trump, and the other ultra-wealthy donors setting the GOP agenda.** Many are comparing our current moment to 2016. But I'm reminded of the aftermath of the 2004 presidential election (incidentally, the previous time Republicans won the popular vote). Democrats were dejected, and George W. Bush claimed he had a mandate to enact major changes. Among those changes? **Privatizing Social Security.** The first time Democrats began to regain their footing in the wake of the 2004 election was in our mobilization to defend Social Security. We had even smaller minorities then in both the Senate and House – but we found our voice in standing up for the right of Americans to be able to retire with dignity. It was the start of a political comeback for our party in which we would take back Congress and the White House within four years. **I will fight with the same tenacity to protect Social Security in 2025 that I did in 2005.** The Republicans think they have an easy path to enact their most extreme policy dreams. We need to organize and mobilize at every level to show them just how wrong they are. Together, we can harness public sentiment and stop harmful cuts to Social Security – and any other essential program Republicans want to put on the chopping block. More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I just left the Senate floor.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Democrats have held the Senate floor since yesterday against Donald Trump’s nominee for Director of National Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard.
#

Friend, Democrats have held the Senate floor since yesterday against Donald Trump’s nominee for Director of National Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard.
I just left the Senate floor myself, and in a moment I’m going to ask you to join me in opposing her nomination. Please, let me explain why this is so important:
It’s my job, as a United States Senator, to determine whether a president’s nominee has what it takes. The Director of National Intelligence is a position of tremendous responsibility, and it requires impeccable judgement.
Tulsi Gabbard does not meet the standard, so I am voting against her.
But this nomination is part of a broader pattern of activity from Elon Musk and the Trump Administration. They are attempting to gut critical government agencies — including our national security agencies — of the career civil servants who put our nation first and keep our people safe. In their place, they are installing loyalists who will put President Trump first and the people of this nation last.
I am taking whatever action I can, as a United States Senator, to counter President Trump, Elon Musk, and the Trump Administration’s assault on our institutions.
But the truth is, we need the public behind us. We need you to continue speaking out and spreading the word. While President Trump and his allies hold power in Washington, it’s up to us to show them that the American people are not on board.
**One thing you can do to further that goal is to sign on here and voice your opposition to Tulsi Gabbard as Director of National Intelligence.**
[**Please, add your name and join me in opposing Tulsi Gabbard.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/gabbard_em_feb25/?source=em250211-1-f&akid=5968%2E6688874%2E8nxktz)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/gabbard_em_feb25/?source=em250211-1-f&akid=5968%2E6688874%2E8nxktz)**
Thanks for your help.
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5968%2E6688874%2E8nxktz).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join the Movement to Protect Women’s Rights
body:
Making Women Female Again
| Peter, The time to act is now! With Donald Trump in office, conservatives have a powerful ally in the mission to protect women’s rights. **_Maybe the movement’s most powerful ally, yet!_**
However, you and I cannot achieve our goals without a strong, united front.
President Trump is a tremendous help for finally giving a voice to the women who are under attack from leftist policies. But there’s only so much he can do, Peter. Enter my ambassadors. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to building a movement of advocates dedicated to standing up for women. **Your support will allow the Riley Gaines Center to organize events, produce educational materials, and advocate for policies that prioritize women’s rights.** This is the on-the-ground grunt work that has a real impact in the real world.
Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country.
[Your gift of $50, $100, or even more can empower us to continue our vital mission.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fa917722e52b47669fdf7cb26736621f&_e=f1vS_Xy1PnIabmpcWMsCSt_eR0mZe2aWKuaFFpFdDaqJ3p8gAxht9nFi6AM2iNs7zJP3SRN4N93MkuLuCP297uuMGHa2Rku0T2LsQh9DiLVA_fYqph06G6r41h6nYHVY2g01ptLboh8ypiKm7fwmpGV4r5SalpDBDQoQD25ASKS6NIXLd0eLHIeeqnGT3KfYwF5oFyUa3s6yDpe_DAMJAVG0kgn_6mwDp0BtEnL6VK1Nak5QpQprlSJLbTtmQ8SdC5lNXc7xk_g-EeSJRxjy99iaw1gcQBd9KIxZil8rFd50hfX4WgkwGmo0jcTmEf6CKG_wczXq2v2vxHs7DfJFHYfVt4sn9Fiu8ozUhWT3hNDl1_69Ots_oVRYj2V74GyyWfueOUyp0SbiO7s3X9aHpSd4nznQVNMT9E7NOy6d0jk%3D) Your support is essential in this fight. Contributions help us fund initiatives, organize events, and promote awareness about the challenges women face today. Together, you and I can amplify our message and reach more people than ever before. Don’t miss the chance to be part of this vital movement. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center

clean_body: Making Women Female Again | Peter, The time to act is now! With Donald Trump in office, conservatives have a powerful ally in the mission to protect women’s rights. Maybe the movement’s most powerful ally, yet! However, you and I cannot achieve our goals without a strong, united front. President Trump is a tremendous help for finally giving a voice to the women who are under attack from leftist policies. But there’s only so much he can do, Peter. Enter my ambassadors. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to building a movement of advocates dedicated to standing up for women. Your support will allow the Riley Gaines Center to organize events, produce educational materials, and advocate for policies that prioritize women’s rights. This is the on-the-ground grunt work that has a real impact in the real world. Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country. Your support is essential in this fight. Contributions help us fund initiatives, organize events, and promote awareness about the challenges women face today. Together, you and I can amplify our message and reach more people than ever before. Don’t miss the chance to be part of this vital movement. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000

name: Every Eligible American
subject: POLL: Should D.C. become the 51st state?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Every Eligible American_
body:
| Every Eligible American is committed to preserving a safe, secure, and accessible democracy for every eligible American, regardless of zip code. If you’d like to unsubscribe from our list, [**click here.**](https://valuethevote.us/l/MqppAJZIVT8p)
---
| [ ](https://valuethevote.us/l/ZIXVMzH3XSly)
---
Friend, If you’ve kept up with the news lately, you’ve seen President Donald Trump float the idea of making Canada the 51st state. _What!?_ **While Trump is talking about statehood for Canada, there’s a clear need for better representation for a “state” here at home – namely Washington, D.C.** Our nation’s capital is home to over 700,000 Americans who don’t enjoy the same representation we do in the 50 states. They have ZERO Senate representation, and we think it’s past due their voice were strengthened via statehood.
[**That’s why we’re polling our top supporters today: Should Washington, D.C. become our 51st state?**](https://valuethevote.us/l/wCRH23HOumgz)
---
| **[YES](https://valuethevote.us/l/uVJknqrfHgUL)**
---
**[NO](https://valuethevote.us/l/JzPZqIY4HCAX)**

clean_body: | Every Eligible American is committed to preserving a safe, secure, and accessible democracy for every eligible American, regardless of zip code. If you’d like to unsubscribe from our list, | Friend, If you’ve kept up with the news lately, you’ve seen President Donald Trump float the idea of making Canada the 51st state. What!? While Trump is talking about statehood for Canada, there’s a clear need for better representation for a “state” here at home – namely Washington, D.C. Our nation’s capital is home to over 700,000 Americans who don’t enjoy the same representation we do in the 50 states. They have ZERO Senate representation, and we think it’s past due their voice were strengthened via statehood. | We’re looking for 500 responses before midnight to inform our strategy. Thank you, Every Eligible American | Paid for by Every Eligible American

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Why I’m running for Governor of New Mexico
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I’m fighting for the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101967229/527687764/-1790408634?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5699-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGM2ZjM5NC1lMWU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36VgsYYARjQQWkdPLrfpIs7yrwFcWiQJWuqXUTmfHlU=)
In case you didn’t see, I announced that I’m running for Governor of New Mexico, friend.
As a 35th-generation New Mexican, I know firsthand the struggles that New Mexicans face. I understand what it's like to be a single mother, having to decide between rent and groceries, struggling to keep a roof over your head.
I’m running to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids.
My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crimes so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state.
**The solutions are there if we are bold enough to fight for them.**
But we know we’ll have to build a strong campaign to get the future we deserve. That’s why our campaign set a goal of receiving support from **_2,500_** grassroots donors in the first 24 hours of this campaign. We’ve come so far, and we’re so close to hitting our goal. _I hope to see your name on the list, friend._
[**So, will you become a day-one donor with a contribution to my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101967230/527687765/-1790408634?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5699-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGM2ZjM5NC1lMWU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=36VgsYYARjQQWkdPLrfpIs7yrwFcWiQJWuqXUTmfHlU=)

body:
We have no choice but to kick our efforts into hyperdrive to win these key races and SAVE our House Majority.
New York Republicans JUST AXED Liberals’ bill – a Special Election will now take place within 90 days
| |
---
| | | Sorry to interrupt your day but this is urgent:

---
**FIRST: New York Liberals introduced a bill to DELAY the Special Election to replace Elise Stefanik - _denying representation to 700K+ New Yorkers_

THEN: We urgently called on 10,000 Patriots to help save our House Majority - _and we were blown away by your support_

NOW: New York Republicans SUCCESSFULLY blocked the bill - _now the Democrat Governor will be forced to call a Special Election within 90 days_**
---

Because immediately after Elise Stefanik's confirmation, our Conservative House Majority will shrink by ONE MORE SEAT. We already hold the Majority by the smallest margin in a CENTURY and there are two more Special Elections happening just weeks from right now.

_**[So we need to move FAST...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f66492cbcd344109916d31c732aee875&_e=u39uOgaH9DGiQc30szDeHKnsjeAk-VWdOxUShgGTr2GyOhPsmBQKAoWOOeZZnIGHlky3k8_SDg2_VSYg112iSyqtFvpRZhAQ2O9Qq_nZkK6OEWZPonlMeOBPcKXiz5Jv2vTG7LuUFrmn1QTUUim0-hGJH_IKFstoBtRiNfDiy024R9zCTQ1_uH7wwW8mslOW3xfoetJF9yf1a7FwgO0vw7FWId01WSV8CYhYIO-IQt2D0dqO9ZBtPpI-02Z4XluCylMe2zvEltQj9A_kGBl0lH-V5ELbqouBGMM-1OIn-PHiHMV5XtlQg-5AX2kaxgDbOmojw6Xp3OpYSGEwIZrks6AbeHs-gaPxeZwAgfPLsR3d8ooCv7FfGU7T1d7GQ45uwuu-lwr5oL36S6UYr0C8j-ZS0sQy3tgXjyHhON84St0%3D "So we need to move right here and right now... ")**_

We have no choice but to kick our efforts into hyperdrive to win these key races and SAVE our House Majority.

**Friend - we did the math. And our team concluded we need AT LEAST 10,000 contributions before the end of the week to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.**
_**INCOMING: 3 SPECIAL ELECTIONS**_ | | [PITCH IN NOW](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f66492cbcd344109916d31c732aee875&_e=u39uOgaH9DGiQc30szDeHKnsjeAk-VWdOxUShgGTr2GyOhPsmBQKAoWOOeZZnIGHlky3k8_SDg2_VSYg112iSyqtFvpRZhAQ2O9Qq_nZkK6OEWZPonlMeOBPcKXiz5Jv2vTG7LuUFrmn1QTUUim0-hGJH_IKFstoBtRiNfDiy024R9zCTQ1_uH7wwW8mslOW3xfoetJF9yf1a7FwgO0vw7FWId01WSV8CYhYIO-IQt2D0dqO9ZBtPpI-02Z4XluC0J3I5Jh-Z6ttJS7UX3evnEDjG6a--stYKfOMcuMicCt1eKuCe3HBmGjtCs42q4u7C-i9dc26rFsLzg8A5uZr3-dhsAqlc_uxm3LsRWEDMwv1NTb4xIuPcyhBUx1evIy0FlnSpmaPqwT9r1qrqHTfcn59foEG_rent3JMERmh8vo%3D "HELP WIN ALL THREE: PITCH IN NOW")
---

We won't beat around the bush with you. If too many folks ignore our call to action, we risk:

**1\. LOSING all three Special Elections
2\. SURRENDERING our House Majority to the Democrats
3\. ALLOWING for a full blockade of Trump's agenda **

Every single contribution is mission-critical to helping Conservatives refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and build winning campaigns.

Don't underestimate the impact of your dollar. We can't win key races like this without YOU.

But the question is - will you step up?

_**INCOMING: 3 SPECIAL ELECTIONS**_ | [PITCH IN NOW](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f66492cbcd344109916d31c732aee875&_e=u39uOgaH9DGiQc30szDeHKnsjeAk-VWdOxUShgGTr2GyOhPsmBQKAoWOOeZZnIGHlky3k8_SDg2_VSYg112iSyqtFvpRZhAQ2O9Qq_nZkK6OEWZPonlMeOBPcKXiz5Jv2vTG7LuUFrmn1QTUUim0-hGJH_IKFstoBtRiNfDiy024R9zCTQ1_uH7wwW8mslOW3xfoetJF9yf1a7FwgO0vw7FWId01WSV8CYhYIO-IQt2D0dqO9ZBtPpI-02Z4XluCLj_wkZy5MxyPOGrUBH6mnVpmef47yGROPpf8LtEELQcqbSAAsF0ozBhCD0-im6CpnF4s4oVCYfhkEuqjs90Ns_-kAiktO3CIujNA0g7RK94FGFZ24giDadogVPOL00UCyjDaofvzv9mtrzhuD30cZmH6IGpEZvyX-0JBBRsTJaM%3D "HELP WIN ALL THREE: PITCH IN NOW")

- House Republicans

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Whatever it takes to confirm President Trump’s Cabinet

body:
Friend, it's Navy SEAL and U.S. Senator Tim Sheehy.

I'm new to the Senate, but I'm no stranger to a tough fight.

When it comes to confirming President Trump's team, a tough fight is what we're getting from Democrats. They're doing everything they can to obstruct the process.

But Senate Republicans were elected to win tough fights.

_If that means working nights, weekends, and holidays, so be it._

**[Whatever it takes to get President Trump's Cabinet in place so we can get America back on track.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zENZ6KoeTm6JDDq5PEJdBg~~/AAVLBhA~/s-u9Vx3KAXuqGW0V8ZkORUKQVnrnfPAoCBph0w6bt1X2Vmk1Isr7-SaM5MlO3VBH3bEq2tgyYkwgYWuSbFrcmVps2yOUvdkK6ITWZSJonZocGq88nj4ON78yu3TquEAszY-agX7U-CeyVOgN2xanSEwhlsQcqnGiuHRTMPRpcx_UEdHohDiq_kfFCiV8sSrH_o4TjxDG5kkNV0FtrBZUr8lOYeBRF4963R1GbyzW0-k2bfqZ129AmXU87d8kolW4lGrb9u3I4lG0YXSCcWwM8NfgbHJkEWTbNN_qDyIn8ctoM5lmmXweAbCCKJGPxNuP6_eCPIB2TqU0E8sxZ6j21eSshqgFNdSYrjyP84cozHMCGhITJ8WvBYbpOas3VLwEZgI-LhHBIkj6QtKD4FbXeg~~)**

Friend, will you stand with Senate Republicans and me?

**[SIGN your name now to _demand_ Democrats end the obstruction and confirm President Trump's team. >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zENZ6KoeTm6JDDq5PEJdBg~~/AAVLBhA~/s-u9Vx3KAXuqGW0V8ZkORUKQVnrnfPAoCBph0w6bt1X2Vmk1Isr7-SaM5MlO3VBH3bEq2tgyYkwgYWuSbFrcmVps2yOUvdkK6ITWZSJonZocGq88nj4ON78yu3TquEAszY-agX7U-CeyVOgN2xanSEwhlsQcqnGiuHRTMPRpcx_UEdHohDiq_kfFCiV8sSrH_o4TjxDG5kkNV0FtrBZUr8lOYeBRF4963R1GbyzW0-k2bfqZ129AmXU87d8kolW4lGrb9u3I4lG0YXSCcWwM8NfgbHJkEWTbNN_qDyIn8ctoM5lmmXweAbCCKJGPxNuP6_eCPIB2TqU0E8sxZ6j21eSshqgFNdSYrjyP84cozHMCGhITJ8WvBYbpOas3VLwEZgI-LhHBIkj6QtKD4FbXeg~~)**

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zejtag06qntoqe32h284nehv8d2mef4r321kqe0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spim1o34c9h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zefk3p3cjru8hu88rru99o7stbuunga9dqeg82r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spim1o34c9h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zabbulnr1st2pr2ltcmmvah3n4ld3d6h9tcfaqv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spim1o34c9h2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9grbkh4dtto1kti3cu4j8epsgqeq3mbjni4uiq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spim1o34c9h2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu331682sdva0q503jiafa1kkfte7an5quvehtm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spim1o34c9h2bs)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj4ssa235p7lc0516ni8kdplpqqd9qgk0sbahkjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spim1o34c9h2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zso1apm78j2r8ia28c0g853bn651u285an18gf38_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spim1o34c9h2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znm0gtd43ni97lltirrqh3lft368ligb5kae71s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spim1o34c9h2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9g5vdd8b9u1d2v9qtp3ovbittkfavq286qo4ph0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spim1o34c9h2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6nkp172epmq4stjb59todn7fradu8buaipka6mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spim1o34c9h2bs)

Trump Train News
---

Elon Musk is counting on you to take our DOGE Survey

| | | Friend,

# **The Faith and Wisdom of C.S. Lewis**
Hillsdale College offers a seven-lecture DVD course that explores C.S. Lewis’s core lessons regarding the truth and goodness of the Christian faith and how to apply those lessons to your life.

Today, we would like to give you the “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” box set as a thank-you for a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more.

My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Fighting for No Tax on Social Security Income
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friend, I’m proud to serve on the House Ways and Means Committee which is responsible for writing our tax laws and helping President Trump extend his signature tax cuts.

| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs1n_ziNH1k_YwbHLEI3Wi)
---
| | | Friend,
I’m proud to serve on the House Ways and Means Committee which is responsible for writing our tax laws and helping President Trump extend his signature tax cuts.
**During the campaign, I was proud to partner with President Trump to propose ending federal taxes on Social Security income.**
---
[HELP ME FIGHT →](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs1n_ziNH1k_YwbHLEI3aZ)
[HELP ME FIGHT →](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs1n_ziNH1k_YwbHLEI3aZ)
**This is one of my top priorities!**
**For the last 40 years, the IRS has been taking a larger and larger piece of seniors’ Social Security income because the tax isn't indexed for inflation!**
In fact, this tax on Social Security benefits, which was only intended to cover high-income taxpayers, **now applies to seniors who make as little as $25,000 per year.**
| | | **Friend, that’s not fair and my legislation will help President Trump change it!**
---
[DONATE NOW →](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs1n_ziNH1k_YwbHLEI3aZ)

Sincerely, Nicole | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306, United States

name: Greg Stamps
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu92iu5lu6f2kp8hvebj62pts555vg8gqfs3d9q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphm8or1cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdvqttv05h9fu8tet34pg4uok6g908vctpl7b1i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphm8or1cth2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjf2hjd64h577dm4u4nu0ge2t848qqpdf3ap7jpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphm8or1cth2bs)
---
| | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zodtq01n5tkq09sa6rlkdgr5i6vfns4gtvs2ffgo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphm8or1cth2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge. [**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqp708lutnv3t0enjo7rb17roujjc6d9vf0e90n0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphm8or1cth2bs) Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

body:
New York Republicans JUST AXED Liberals’ bill – a Special Election will now take place within 90 days

| |
---
| | | Sorry to interrupt your day but this is urgent:

---
**FIRST: New York Liberals introduced a bill to DELAY the Special Election to replace Elise Stefanik - _denying representation to 700K+ New Yorkers_

THEN: We urgently called on 10,000 Patriots to help save our House Majority - _and we were blown away by your support_

NOW: New York Republicans SUCCESSFULLY blocked the bill - _now the Democrat Governor will be forced to call a Special Election within 90 days_ **
---

Because immediately after Elise Stefanik's confirmation, our Conservative House Majority will shrink by ONE MORE SEAT. We already hold the Majority by the smallest margin in a CENTURY and there are two more Special Elections happening just weeks from right now.

_**[So we need to move FAST...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4gv6lk1oobftu6b71ur8ur8plrpcc07b4c2htag_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphm8or1cth2bs "So we need to move right here and right now... ")**_

We have no choice but to kick our efforts into hyperdrive to win these key races and SAVE our House Majority.

**Friend - we did the math. And our team concluded we need AT LEAST 10,000 contributions before the end of the week to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.**
_**INCOMING: 3 SPECIAL ELECTIONS**_ | | [PITCH IN NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd9i56eru7qqu344t7jms56k12thk169kcidv8l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphm8or1cth2bs "HELP WIN ALL THREE: PITCH IN NOW")
---

We won't beat around the bush with you. If too many folks ignore our call to action, we risk:

**1\. LOSING all three Special Elections
2\. SURRENDERING our House Majority to the Democrats
3\. ALLOWING for a full blockade of Trump's agenda **

Every single contribution is mission-critical to helping Conservatives refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and build winning campaigns.

Don't underestimate the impact of your dollar. We can't win key races like this without YOU.

But the question is - will you step up?

subject: TO: ICE OFFICERS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Thank you for your bravery

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Our ICE Officers have been **working around the clock** to protect American citizens & save the integrity of our immigration system - thanks are in order!

Despite being stretched to the breaking point and facing extreme danger head-on, they refuse to back down.

**[We've prepared a special letter to show our support and appreciation, and we need YOUR signature in the next 60 minutes.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhnl555835omcr9r77ialessr0bsr94t34s2q5l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphm4pb6chh2bs "We've prepared a special letter to show our support and appreciation, and we need YOUR signature in the next 60 minutes.")**

---
| | | [READ THE LETTER & SIGN NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsvog8oeq05hb421k0k8o50ic39mvvtjr98o3h2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphm4pb6chh2bs "Generic Button")
---

By adding your name, you'll be sending a powerful message to our ICE Officers that their sacrifices haven't gone unnoticed. **You'll be telling them that you stand with them in their mission to _secure our borders_ and enforce the law.**

**[Don't wait, we are sending this SOON - sign the letter of support now and show our border heroes that they're not alone in this fight.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhdtcb0hmfbf1m48imnkuj3gijsttke6595f2cig_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphm4pb6chh2bs "Don't wait, we are sending this SOON - sign the letter of support now and show our border heroes that they're not alone in this fight.")**

---

Time is of the essence, Friend!

Alyssa, House Republican HQ

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Deep State Revenge - Is Your Retirement Safe?
body:
This isn't just a possibility

# Deep State Revenge: Is Your Retirement Safe?
Trump's victory wasn't just a political upset—it was a declaration of war against the deep state.
Now, they're retaliating.
And their target?
Everyday Americans who dared to back Trump.
The deep state isn't fighting with words—they're hitting your wallet.
**How They're Coming After You:**
* **Inflation Runs Wild:** They'll let the dollar collapse to fund their radical spending agenda.
* **Market Chaos:** Volatility is no accident—it's a rigged system designed to drain your savings.
* **401(k) & IRA Collateral Damage:** Your retirement accounts are squarely in their crosshairs.

This isn't just a possibility—it's happening as we speak.
If the deep state succeeds, your hard-earned retirement could evaporate overnight.
Years of savings, gone.
Security for your family, gone.
But there's still time to [protect yourself.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1drnk98s31veu47scomjfca3rkbidt9978mthjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphmcob2chh2bs)
You don't have to sit on the sidelines while your wealth is targeted.
There are simple, effective strategies that can help you safeguard your retirement before it's too late.
[Go here](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv8tnnjctgu0rr5ordu0hh9u1hdbe2qal0vrf768_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphmcob2chh2bs) to discover **3 critical steps** you can take right now to shield your 401(k) and IRA from Washington's overreach.
The battle lines are drawn, and your savings are at stake. Don't let the deep state control your future.
[Click here](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4ilq8fbh3b4qm3im9c08s2g5hk31fhqepd8ah50_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphmcob2chh2bs) to secure your retirement today.
**Editor's Note:** The deep state's retaliation is more than a political grudge—it's a direct threat to the financial well-being of millions of Americans. As inflation soars and markets become more volatile, retirement savings like 401(k)s and IRAs are increasingly at risk.
But you don't have to be a victim of their agenda. There are practical steps you can take right now to protect your savings and prepare for what's coming.
[Click here](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcj4ut48kh0jk9va27ho9kiio163glsdu1g3n1c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphmcob2chh2bs) to learn how to safeguard your retirement before it's too late >

name: Greg Stamps
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc5va8erokusdrlcvbtsv8qgibv3c13b6kt5mh9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphmaoj4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ejt9gop3vpbjqmi0a3ku6gqt89vfh0la7m5p30_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphmaoj4cjh2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcdjg349spu1816k60b77goldg9ebveb3blg0p7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphmaoj4cjh2bs)
---
| | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z03db65cunbatdh03q0rk0gj1d75v85qhdltue1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphmaoj4cjh2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge. [**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znvtf9stsg29m743djmrnrbcmok4mtj4lh8vma8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphmaoj4cjh2bs) Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

body:

---
Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpjc2d8bc95f9spet3vlqkc5vpeprpdh2c0dqjbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sphmaoj2chh2bs)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

|

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: The waste at USAID is INSANE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Major cuts need to be made

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIxMl9BRy1NSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDMyMDctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMTJfQUctTUsuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjAzMjA3LTI4OTkifQ/KnyEa5wufoJTWbCtLABmmw)
---
The waste being uncovered at USAID is unacceptable and should be a wake-up call for everyone in government. Seeing millions of tax dollars being wasted on entrenched bureaucrats' pet projects is an insult to the American people, and it's time for a change.

If you don't believe me, here are a few examples.
---
_**• $20 MILLION**_ for Sesame Street in Iraq
**• $2 _MILLION_** for Moroccan pottery classes
**• $2.5 _MILLION_** for electric vehicles in Vietnam
**• $9 _MILLION_** for Syrian civilians, which ended up in a terrorist group's hands
---
Not only is this spending immoral and unsustainable, **but it’s also dangerous.** We CANNOT allow millions of dollars in government funds to end up in the hands of our enemies, and that's exactly what's been happening right under our noses for DECADES.

I’m determined to put an end to this waste, but liberals around the country are fighting us at every turn to keep the endless USAID spending going. **So, Peter, I’m calling on America First patriots like YOU to help.** **[**Will you sign my petition to demand we uncover the waste and fraud in government?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIxMl9BRy1NSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDMyMDctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMTJfQUctTUsuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjAzMjA3LTI4OTkifQ/pwItEBJ7j6IGukjIbyL13g)**

[ ✎ SIGN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIxMl9BRy1NSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDMyMDctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMTJfQUctTUsuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjAzMjA3LTI4OTkifQ/HnTyjn6ytcTmsMBzdUNGZg)
---
[ UNCOVER THE FRAUD](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDIxMl9BRy1NSy4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MDMyMDctMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAyMTJfQUctTUsuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjAzMjA3LTI4OTkifQ/59mhkolpsSjt5GCtfMMv7Q)

subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85022eb82b7a4e18a9cd0231c06b92d2&_e=O-4Z_fJ6o6_Xp30MFI_YCbLdfBatheWMIU9w_T8QFhnSol6-sNVl9p5AQQKO8yuG0JSbYlpuoF_SZtZnxKdjFZosI920U2yjg1t9FzvjgMTG4huulfoJxkQOTD2ag93qJWiZEzluaa2kNx2uxjhBrnv97EFnauo_RSyklVRV8oU6HiujgkYd8Qvdvqz0YV2nhydGalV8whfcCfp_VaVuVjBh33IOgYsbixTmX0tQuhB_13HkPnzT3O4fO__HTul4gnakSYFlmcVYZcxG9-Y06A1bToF2rsdVZnIXRyuzsqUetsE5ed6n25wiIVy43RkTpH3mZXcVwsc_mDzEZ9rNagBvSQF59pADwEAUK8nMmSpty30RK0aN_urJ8KhlyebzoMyb2legrG1--N85WIv0HDKphRgjJPZ4a7H9BrAsewhIpEf6T80ndeuhJ3bRTrQ6rBmFEyYpcnHIfpQRNAfvdxzocHFkovjaFBtOs2LiTQ0%3D)

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85022eb82b7a4e18a9cd0231c06b92d2&_e=O-4Z_fJ6o6_Xp30MFI_YCbLdfBatheWMIU9w_T8QFhnSol6-sNVl9p5AQQKO8yuG0JSbYlpuoF_SZtZnxKdjFZosI920U2yjg1t9FzvjgMTG4huulfoJxkQOTD2ag93qJWiZEzluaa2kNx2uxjhBrnv97EFnauo_RSyklVRV8oU6HiujgkYd8Qvdvqz0YV2nhydGalV8whfcCfp_VaVuVjBh33IOgYsbixTmX0tQuhB_13HkPnzT3O4fO__HTul4gnakSYFlmcVYZcxG9-Y06A1bToF2rsdVZnIXRyuzsqUetsE5ed6n25wiIVy43RkTpH3mZXcVwsc_mDzEZ9rNamU3JU3SDpoXz5JtzSbAA0oWQH-g03--yNaPko1TiXtrgfdLGIdIwS_G8dcJFqBuBhLpsFLNZEbImJZIBi5pxz5yD3UZRQR30agWKeLNpbSOm8Xd0X63KYAFBC_q2XgljT_ldGlZsxMxUeX-yWL6BR4%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85022eb82b7a4e18a9cd0231c06b92d2&_e=O-4Z_fJ6o6_Xp30MFI_YCbLdfBatheWMIU9w_T8QFhnSol6-sNVl9p5AQQKO8yuG0JSbYlpuoF_SZtZnxKdjFZosI920U2yjg1t9FzvjgMTG4huulfoJxkQOTD2ag93qJWiZEzluaa2kNx2uxjhBrnv97EFnauo_RSyklVRV8oU6HiujgkYd8Qvdvqz0YV2nhydGalV8whfcCfp_VaVuVjBh33IOgYsbixTmX0tQuhB_13HkPnzT3O4fO__HTul4gnakSYFlmcVYZcxG9-Y06A1bToF2rsdVZnIXRyuzsqUetsE5ed6n25wiIVy43RkTpH3mZXcVwsc_mDzEZ9rNalcHpMLZNlDiPTLm0w7HeCxBQoOO6PklnYOwJKDNMkY9vt0J3dYDaG9foTEbB2yah77Zs_CzXNgArkUGpPeatzh7qPjoxdzNmiJAvrRPt7SeZpcUhnqAFFrY-yUa1Ju4FStxI8499r9YikG88eKQyd0%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **[hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85022eb82b7a4e18a9cd0231c06b92d2&_e=O-4Z_fJ6o6_Xp30MFI_YCbLdfBatheWMIU9w_T8QFhnSol6-sNVl9p5AQQKO8yuG0JSbYlpuoF_SZtZnxKdjFZosI920U2yjg1t9FzvjgMTG4huulfoJxkQOTD2ag93qJWiZEzluaa2kNx2uxjhBrnv97EFnauo_RSyklVRV8oU6HiujgkYd8Qvdvqz0YV2nhydGalV8whfcCfp_VaVuVjBh33IOgYsbixTmX0tQuhB_13HkPnzT3O4fO__HTul4gnakSYFlmcVYZcxG9-Y06A1bToF2rsdVZnIXRyuzsqUetsE5ed6n25wiIVy43RkTpH3mZXcVwsc_mDzEZ9rNar56Vk1rfh9HK90CqDLh-jp3AK4e89S4iLF6HOzaypg8Io_16_64W9Bb8ZVaVAp3FegHk6XJw_e1B1zVWaa2sBey5M8G4F1CbAy8ipv1JgOl9cmH1zul0VA30w31dY-btiw2Dnwbrw5qF0-yMU_zVZw%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85022eb82b7a4e18a9cd0231c06b92d2&_e=O-4Z_fJ6o6_Xp30MFI_YCbLdfBatheWMIU9w_T8QFhnSol6-sNVl9p5AQQKO8yuG0JSbYlpuoF_SZtZnxKdjFZosI920U2yjg1t9FzvjgMTG4huulfoJxkQOTD2ag93qJWiZEzluaa2kNx2uxjhBrnv97EFnauo_RSyklVRV8oU6HiujgkYd8Qvdvqz0YV2nhydGalV8whfcCfp_VaVuVjBh33IOgYsbixTmX0tQuhB_13HkPnzT3O4fO__HTul4gnakSYFlmcVYZcxG9-Y06A1bToF2rsdVZnIXRyuzsqUetsE5ed6n25wiIVy43RkTpH3mZXcVwsc_mDzEZ9rNauD0Tvce-LDHGYmr6_Pxtf2jJ_5jxmmnjHWwtWCTHSxUQZkGenlnUB-Uzb-FKFmM7fgUu5ERJBSJl3lq1te0VSO0PvT5NiI2ULSERzB6bKTFsawuPX5uPtwHUJZyj0DXnzzSKX_uxPGixo6OmEwxJa8%3D)
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85022eb82b7a4e18a9cd0231c06b92d2&_e=O-4Z_fJ6o6_Xp30MFI_YCbLdfBatheWMIU9w_T8QFhnSol6-sNVl9p5AQQKO8yuG0JSbYlpuoF_SZtZnxKdjFZosI920U2yjg1t9FzvjgMTG4huulfoJxkQOTD2ag93qJWiZEzluaa2kNx2uxjhBrnv97EFnauo_RSyklVRV8oU6HiujgkYd8Qvdvqz0YV2nhydGalV8whfcCfp_VaVuVjBh33IOgYsbixTmX0tQuhB_13HkPnzT3O4fO__HTul4gnakSYFlmcVYZcxG9-Y06A1bToF2rsdVZnIXRyuzsqUetsE5ed6n25wiIVy43RkTpH3mZXcVwsc_mDzEZ9rNahRmOWNy-jTGkYqNefIbyaNhfT3dYBeF5UBKnpEKcL8TCR7CAOQkf-8oSW5UQ69p7E2WT-f0CqewK8unoQ172FjULKVadBFiRZTbEDOBE61yZjwFti_eAXPwxEFxY7KqfwlNQoIjZ77-bjqwlItCT0E%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85022eb82b7a4e18a9cd0231c06b92d2&_e=O-4Z_fJ6o6_Xp30MFI_YCbLdfBatheWMIU9w_T8QFhnSol6-sNVl9p5AQQKO8yuG0JSbYlpuoF_SZtZnxKdjFZosI920U2yjg1t9FzvjgMTG4huulfoJxkQOTD2ag93qJWiZEzluaa2kNx2uxjhBrnv97EFnauo_RSyklVRV8oU6HiujgkYd8Qvdvqz0YV2nhydGalV8whfcCfp_VaVuVjBh33IOgYsbixTmX0tQuhB_13HkPnzT3O4fO__HTul4gnakSYFlmcVYZcxG9-Y06A1bToF2rsdVZnIXRyuzsqUetsE5ed6n25wiIVy43RkTpH3mZXcVwsc_mDzEZ9rNakcpcGBmBDDmYCtVzb5GV5X-7kXumTtW4IvIJoIaUytgblsWrR_f3pQuXdPgGaMJBZej7eEixMzvzzw-VS83thChRsMLj87t2MMDM4i3uXaRUN4HJ4k9hO6_hUNbS43F5R1ZwizJyvmTfG6gBDs2gns%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it's the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85022eb82b7a4e18a9cd0231c06b92d2&_e=O-4Z_fJ6o6_Xp30MFI_YCbLdfBatheWMIU9w_T8QFhnSol6-sNVl9p5AQQKO8yuG0JSbYlpuoF_SZtZnxKdjFZosI920U2yjg1t9FzvjgMTG4huulfoJxkQOTD2ag93qJWiZEzluaa2kNx2uxjhBrnv97EFnauo_RSyklVRV8oU6HiujgkYd8Qvdvqz0YV2nhydGalV8whfcCfp_VaVuVjBh33IOgYsbixTmX0tQuhB_13HkPnzT3O4fO__HTul4gnakSYFlmcVYZcxG9-Y06A1bToF2rsdVZnIXRyuzsqUetsE5ed6n25wiIVy43RkTpH3mZXcVwsc_mDzEZ9rNaiuNwPfICfO6nSJ630a-Dn5Cud8Y86KVGclC8EPV5jzbpvEZV1lanx1QRaahSYz10UPDdzEtjbdmLQObJermodqFz-EuE89twTup0tCsprS8LyWYvwy4R6fLEpdXPfESW5CxPyvgzwyGfnASn0bRpSk%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85022eb82b7a4e18a9cd0231c06b92d2&_e=O-4Z_fJ6o6_Xp30MFI_YCbLdfBatheWMIU9w_T8QFhnSol6-sNVl9p5AQQKO8yuG0JSbYlpuoF_SZtZnxKdjFZosI920U2yjg1t9FzvjgMTG4huulfoJxkQOTD2ag93qJWiZEzluaa2kNx2uxjhBrnv97EFnauo_RSyklVRV8oU6HiujgkYd8Qvdvqz0YV2nhydGalV8whfcCfp_VaVuVjBh33IOgYsbixTmX0tQuhB_13HkPnzT3O4fO__HTul4gnakSYFlmcVYZcxG9-Y06A1bToF2rsdVZnIXRyuzsqUetsE5ed6n25wiIVy43RkTpH3mZXcVwsc_mDzEZ9rNaosAFm22t2P1ZPaqRLk1vhNpdB96mKq5ZBrUv9Yo74Vah-ZUx5ZjzPmSRZLh9u2JahGNlPgWKGgXquf9yhegLieiV1DNMXO7Zyv9lq85M57WFdwQMTgZTwAow9fQQPAoDj3DCuSbFavsPLZaHqj9GLQ%3D) founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85022eb82b7a4e18a9cd0231c06b92d2&_e=O-4Z_fJ6o6_Xp30MFI_YCbLdfBatheWMIU9w_T8QFhnSol6-sNVl9p5AQQKO8yuG0JSbYlpuoF_SZtZnxKdjFZosI920U2yjg1t9FzvjgMTG4huulfoJxkQOTD2ag93qJWiZEzluaa2kNx2uxjhBrnv97EFnauo_RSyklVRV8oU6HiujgkYd8Qvdvqz0YV2nhydGalV8whfcCfp_VaVuVjBh33IOgYsbixTmX0tQuhB_13HkPnzT3O4fO__HTul4gnakSYFlmcVYZcxG9-Y06A1bToF2rsdVZnIXRyuzsqUetsE5ed6n25wiIVy43RkTpH3mZXcVwsc_mDzEZ9rNagT8A0YrnsI686wnct_bsLHc31Ll-5ngWDr9Ce2wB_GWC4_cHqw3F4ZPC_MuQ1IlBfYt3og_lmnxNGHfonJ487qHHJl2Sn-oJwOSTGjTaDARqbe6npF_gYhlZBDmZRDa6FjqpqMg9NmG-y7L0-ZzmtQ%3D)

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It's no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It's one of the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it's the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. "It's not just about volume," explains founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize." In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. Get started today. Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Why the Left is terrified
body:
Simply put, Democrats are terrified of the TRUTH.

Simply put, Democrats are terrified of the TRUTH.
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a0mz/?__vbtrk=Mjc1MTI2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1MTI2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend,
---
Are you loving President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency? Because I certainly am.
---
_Thanks to Elon Musk’s audit of the federal government, the American public is finally learning the full extent of the government’s corruption, waste, and inefficiency._
---
But the same can’t be said for the Democrats, who are having a meltdown over DOGE’s discoveries – and that’s putting it mildly. I’ve never seen them this angry.
---
**Watching the Democrats panic, you’d think our country was on the brink of collapse!**
---
So, what is the Left so darn afraid of?
---
_...The _TRUTH_._
---
Let that sink in: **Democrats and the media are revolting against President Trump because he’s taken an axe to the federal government and split it wide open to expose what’s been going on behind the curtain without your knowledge**.
---
_The same political party that hired 80,000 IRS agents to target hardworking taxpaying citizens is now terrified that YOU are finally getting access to the uncensored truth._
---
_Look, President Trump and I both ran on a promise to drain the swamp. But when you drain a swamp, you see, for the very first time, all the venomous creatures that had been lurking at the bottom._
---
And that’s what’s happening right now: The more that gets exposed, the more the Democrats will fight us tooth and nail.
---
**But so long as President Trump and I have the FULL BACKING of the AMERICAN PEOPLE, we will prevail against any attack the Democrats throw at us.**
---
_So, as the attacks from the Democrats and the media are on the rise, please take my public opinion survey:_
---
