FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20271/6374453/b73106c0e2383caa36f67142361193969985c8ec/a3bf21dd8b62533fd5813606086d1cf2fed4d089) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20271/6374453/b73106c0e2383caa36f67142361193969985c8ec/a3bf21dd8b62533fd5813606086d1cf2fed4d089). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000
Americans already have it
in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or – what's really cool – with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20271/6374453/b73106c0e2383caa36f67142361193969985c8ec/a3bf21dd8b62533fd5813606086d1cf2fed4d089) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Generator** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" **Angel H.**
"Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." **Sharon P.**

body:
A new series of [powerful winter storms](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvWHBgWN7YOiSLV07WhSO-FpsIjiF5t9XaeaO7-np6dP3cVkvjhId13e3o-WYV5AwCglCwRocpcdq-mAjIqDu0apJL_okx3HuN7ssqKSPHsfJfBotHUQ_m3HUKk7LpEJP9vkmQYFSBmAe5OK0Pi3jbAyaoLAzEgNxLsNXpoM3jOmR71gGn_c-2Y35Vjv91sG5g3NrbYj5p6Hj7TV5lq8kDmy1g_NOoWFl0ehgLKJyLrvwG3l3zeLbHdVV4YkfIiCXTCzqkZvg4u6YBO0357n2xYZbo5SonqbOyOvuKP0R8X-G7hZ-AwAA__-SnGtp) is expected to bring significant snow, ice, and rain from the Plains and Midwest to the Great Lakes and Northeast starting today.

# Wednesday, February 12, 2025
---|---

## Winter Storms Sweeping Across U.S.
A new series of [powerful winter storms](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvWHBgWN7YOiSLV07WhSO-FpsIjiF5t9XaeaO7-np6dP3cVkvjhId13e3o-WYV5AwCglCwRocpcdq-mAjIqDu0apJL_okx3HuN7ssqKSPHsfJfBotHUQ_m3HUKk7LpEJP9vkmQYFSBmAe5OK0Pi3jbAyaoLAzEgNxLsNXpoM3jOmR71gGn_c-2Y35Vjv91sG5g3NrbYj5p6Hj7TV5lq8kDmy1g_NOoWFl0ehgLKJyLrvwG3l3zeLbHdVV4YkfIiCXTCzqkZvg4u6YBO0357n2xYZbo5SonqbOyOvuKP0R8X-G7hZ-AwAA__-SnGtp) is expected to bring significant snow, ice, and rain from the Plains and Midwest to the Great Lakes and Northeast starting today. The first of [three forecasted storms](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6yAQheGnwR0RDDi2C4rb0OW2W1rYTOJZYYhgEstvv8r2Wx_p09H_dZtvgRLlx_-wo-N7mUFBLxVIDXMMlM7ZdtHdEQFNh04PZjJX1fdjtzk99csyYBymEPoRjFnDsky4oIlTr9F25D6aAg1aW4DxoqZgzHXqR2vRRo3CKozEpV6-C2Xe8J7O8sZ6WcveJbcxP5sw_wR4AT6fz9L4MwnwH1iAVyDAay3Av5rMeDQB_qDMWGXjUnfJW8XAmJvcKcrAKWSmVVJe0ytSfsh8yh25FhkqBnkQb3LD8D5ly-WQtKIA31UXnwelRO06CKsee6D0-5H_avZ28BMAAP__IqduyQ) swept across the U.S. Tuesday, placing over 80 million people under winter weather alerts as snow and rain fell from coast to coast. Another storm has formed over the Plains and is projected to follow a similar path. The second storm is [on track to impact](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu8zAMhJ_G3hRItOzYg4Z_8ZZ_7WiwFhWzlaVAImLk7YskQLeO5Hc43N3HZbkgR07X_7iTk5AX0NArDcrA4pHjY7Gtd4EIqGvJmXM3dYPu-7Hd3GrWAaceTZhCGHtLVpMOn34Yje7HdWrZPd00GDDGAownPWHXDVM_WkvWG2qsJs-Sy-krc5KNQnzkO5XTmvc2uk3kVpvuXwNzA_NBKNubNTBXyWWvzzcnodLAnOh43r8FtHoj9ZIqjowJ1S0ip6p29gdVUddCKCriN1WVcpGNsIoKudCKVdri_O3gGLkO58bq644cX-Hkr7HuDn4CAAD__1yGbS0) over 20 states from the Central Plains to the Midwest, Great Lakes, and Northeast into Thursday. A third storm has been identified in the Pacific, with officials anticipating it will make landfall later this week and eventually become a significant winter storm over the Plains, Midwest, and Northeast this weekend.
## DOJ Drops Charges Against NYC Mayor
The Justice Department has [dropped corruption charges against New York City Mayor](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuK8zAQRp9G6hxGo0ukQsXfpMvfbml0GSWzyHawRULefsn2W358cA6cr-t8Tdx5vf1PC8XRthkB7QQ4KZxr4v6ejayxESFpSVGdddAOrPXyHgFM07k0k51WCl1TBE2nbLPPGouVHD80QIVKGUR_gpC0dsF6Y8hURcIAVR7bfvreeB13av29PWk_lW2RPd7HeBxC_xN4EXhJj5Vex-f6jH1w6STwQjuXKdW0HBOvlctYaB2TgkDN-FxNyMWnWpS3cIZQQsjNOSf3WB8v7p0PdxYGbkvi_qsdf2V4RvwJAAD__1OzXPo) Eric Adams, citing concerns that the case interfered with his reelection campaign and his role in addressing illegal immigration and violent crime. The directive, issued by Acting Deputy Attorney General Emil Bove, does not assess the strength of the evidence but suspends further investigative steps [until after the 2025 mayoral election](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUxfGngS0WXC42Hhi6eEvXjhYf1wkVNpGNQv32lbt3O9KRftL_6z7fXcppe3y6lWxdygwC9E3ATcIcXcrnjDzahQhIcbJyUKPqhdaGP20chBZSKi-098bg6FVYArneKcJgBp7spQmQICUCmE6MTql-1AaRMEpiKCimWvbuu6StPmnJZ3nT3oWy8myftb4Opj4YTAym1lrnfbg-BtNG7WAwub2mkOma4Qf0Knt9Iha-2_hqKed09AND8Vhdyn9q_a_ybeE3AAD__9XnUms). Adams, who was accused of accepting illegal campaign contributions and luxury perks from foreign nationals, denied any wrongdoing and [vowed to regain public trust](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O8yAQAJ8Gd0SwgH8Kiq9xl6-90kLsOmyETQRcorz9KddfPdKMNF_X7Ro483n7Hw7yfS8bKHBSgdSwYeD83uyAficCMgN5PZnFjMq5eUjeRNTjorWjABMholnMAtEYHQnd7gb2H5sCDVpbgPmilmDMuLjZWrKoSVhFyL3Uy73w2RPt-V2eVC-xHEP2qfdHE-afgFXA2hMlzvnDBKypHHTSqwlYWw-d5Cv0mASsTpt5AiepcpQBw9EklruMpdbvR-dyyphCvZFEbge3FrKAdageHy_Omds4CatuR-Df0tD_uvL08BMAAP__qhxkRw). President Trump hinted at a pardon in December, saying the mayor had been "treated pretty unfairly" and that Adams was targeted for criticizing former President Biden's immigration policies.
## Danish Petition Seeks to Buy California
A satirical [Danish petition to "buy California"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL8Gb1j4gAQPDF28pWtH6wJHchWGyCZx_fdVund-0nt6X5f5gpy53D5xId9SnUGBlQrkAHNEzsdsuugTEZDuyA9nPeqTstZ1d68DoVNxtCGebQg2xmsaHYIC44K7Qsf-bVMwwDAYANerEbU-jdYZQyYOJIyiyK2u_Xfl0u6U8lFftPahLl3299Yem9AfAiYB077vfao_Gd9UwFRo3wRMEQttMuDyQL4VeX0eMmDmVNfCKNNaF_ncutXHx84583Y6C6NuC3L-q7T_rl8efgMAAP__Q9haaw) from the U.S. has gained nearly 200,000 signatures, responding to President Trump's renewed interest in acquiring Greenland. [The campaign](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGO6yAUheHVQIcFF7BxQfGadHntlBYJl5gJBguToOx-5Omn_3SO_q_rcnUxxfz47za0LZQFOGjGgQlYvIvpsyjqbUAElBStmOQsR661oaudQRruTBjHm-ZczcYpAZMUdyNvIUyKRnuucRAghAIwA5-dlOOsjVKovECiOPrYSh2-S8xtxZA-5Y11uJeNJru2th9E_iNwIXDpvQ8Z-9ERnycgcHkdzGPeXH2yVl_bzh4VMSeXPTslu7sUQ6k5OgYczKQNrdbvPaYUj3Eiij82F9PvXfsr_23hJwAA__91X1vn), titled _Denmarkification_ , proposes raising $1 trillion to purchase the state, promising to introduce Danish values, rename Disneyland to "Hans Christian Andersenland," and bring "hygge to Hollywood." Under the tongue-in-cheek plan, California would be renamed "New Denmark," and Los Angeles would become "Løs Ångeles." The campaign also suggests changing California’s flag by replacing the bear with a mermaid. To sweeten the deal, Denmark has offered Trump a lifetime supply of Danish pastries, which "Hollywood would pay for.”

We're sponsored today by , offering an investment opportunity in AI-powered technology. | Winter Storms Sweeping Across U.S. A new series of is expected to bring significant snow, ice, and rain from the Plains and Midwest to the Great Lakes and Northeast starting today. The first of swept across the U.S. Tuesday, placing over 80 million people under winter weather alerts as snow and rain fell from coast to coast. Another storm has formed over the Plains and is projected to follow a similar path. The second storm is over 20 states from the Central Plains to the Midwest, Great Lakes, and Northeast into Thursday. A third storm has been identified in the Pacific, with officials anticipating it will make landfall later this week and eventually become a significant winter storm over the Plains, Midwest, and Northeast this weekend. DOJ Drops Charges Against NYC Mayor The Justice Department has Eric Adams, citing concerns that the case interfered with his reelection campaign and his role in addressing illegal immigration and violent crime. The directive, issued by Acting Deputy Attorney General Emil Bove, does not assess the strength of the evidence but suspends further investigative steps . Adams, who was accused of accepting illegal campaign contributions and luxury perks from foreign nationals, denied any wrongdoing and . President Trump hinted at a pardon in December, saying the mayor had been "treated pretty unfairly" and that Adams was targeted for criticizing former President Biden's immigration policies. Danish Petition Seeks to Buy California A satirical from the U.S. has gained nearly 200,000 signatures, responding to President Trump's renewed interest in acquiring Greenland. , titled Denmarkification , proposes raising $1 trillion to purchase the state, promising to introduce Danish values, rename Disneyland to "Hans Christian Andersenland," and bring "hygge to Hollywood." Under the tongue-in-cheek plan, California would be renamed "New Denmark," and Los Angeles would become "Løs Ångeles." The campaign also suggests changing California’s flag by replacing the bear with a mermaid. body:
Thank you for your bravery

|

| | |
Friend,

Our ICE Officers have been **working around the clock** to protect American citizens & save the integrity of our immigration system - thanks are in order!

Despite being stretched to the breaking point and facing extreme danger head-on, they refuse to back down.

**[We've prepared a special letter to show our support and appreciation, and we need YOUR signature in the next 60 minutes.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0fc9fabb8e0445c3b4331bc080283f00&_e=bS17_rOJTTQ7bCJWD9FjkKFob1VXW_cpGP0JK2PZGQrvwPLHaMeVRrLMRuLOEEeWi_r8obWx7uX43Ewf0Ekufi9xB70cpAmDel8oKYolN5-oRWbhcD6OGJfEwqEaFBZ8QrIoznum5CgEcl4w2eW-zp63YnymGgbsqm9A7DwIczm0yIvnk_PyBWP0OPkqbIvqzMegR0j5iyERMQzuBYUutfYgfi4Akr7t7whJHU6igBpg33nooisunmhRmg9V6A17y7X-IOhVS_StxH6HUIYYjGnelEo5rvzekZ6AJsMdSQJRr4HI7uER2X_XeVqjXrORGWPXxxejf37RE6r3yrGjKsWyxUU7alOYXtuzrArLh2qjHC8aWlgzS4q076285sEx4_8pLbHiYAMx0elBRuIA2J2eQWDFqmkW4XBwzvb5Ynt4W4MuMgDVa7U8cY587Mao1Q7fHcBeLfJSZyopB7QUumkzwWEJ7eXc9l154rfO2do%3D "We've prepared a special letter to show our support and appreciation, and we need YOUR signature in the next 60 minutes.")**

clean_body: Thank you for your bravery | | | | Friend, Our ICE Officers have been working around the clock to protect American citizens & save the integrity of our immigration system - thanks are in order! Despite being stretched to the breaking point and facing extreme danger head-on, they refuse to back down. "We've prepared a special letter to show our support and appreciation, and we need YOUR signature in the next 60 minutes." | | | "Generic Button" By adding your name, you'll be sending a powerful message to our ICE Officers that their sacrifices haven't gone unnoticed. You'll be telling them that you stand with them in their mission to secure our borders and enforce the law. "Don't wait, we are sending this SOON - sign the letter of support now and show our border heroes that they're not alone in this fight. " | | | "Generic Button" Time is of the essence, Friend! # Deep State Revenge: Is Your Retirement Safe?
Trump's victory wasn't just a political upset—it was a declaration of war against the deep state.
Now, they're retaliating.
And their target?
Everyday Americans who dared to back Trump.
The deep state isn't fighting with words—they're hitting your wallet.
**How They're Coming After You:**
* **Inflation Runs Wild:** They'll let the dollar collapse to fund their radical spending agenda.
* **Market Chaos:** Volatility is no accident—it's a rigged system designed to drain your savings.
* **401(k) & IRA Collateral Damage:** Your retirement accounts are squarely in their crosshairs.

This isn't just a possibility—it's happening as we speak.
If the deep state succeeds, your hard-earned retirement could evaporate overnight.
Years of savings, gone.
Security for your family, gone.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/2NQYsSshRN1ORqIG3wBFvsOwjExyObyGxz5W6KL8r94q1GvKYjLy9ui032N7SdGcLfSbR590jvlic8tWlqtkt5i4H3Vu4VDe-8H_LfVZK7AxjPDQpbvVcl1IBXvDJ2d6gkV6a8TgfLgEQXIi5VxA5iOQHebpc6LEMzmv0CaxP7sfC0lbN7XgpGU-tg4J2dC5rKXlLsugyKkMchJRHB29KOL9nlAog76qH2-XYZyxQQ_az3gRV-RmwXwPk0JMF5YGduG4gZP0FdZwkI0fns6sxRPXNriumyXYRmjfZGbouo-6KaShbjG2QR0e_kV_Vz0FLQFMsl1D9zNOx620sjMbrz6e_krsa0mq-rcHcSPTgTgwHWAUNEfuLpizTNNGGslP1M7MuC_VGQxjn9HYq0QdtBXI-KMMgC31UTSTcyRWkIh7LfYg4whMI8A1WyTkiQ5DvjsJmPRcN2P6Y7Hf6DTnsvfzQewGmxGMwBYhEONWCi71FgLsoKetE-gwo1ufEuiKt6rt5rxb51g22gUUNT_tPHUjLOklQQ/zwAC8BitAjdsvQrKokXlLPSHA4ahQ7f8/6) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/SXfh14n4Y3ypqEf-4s6AmujMT8NcyLWycLA-ul3Y_9kYnP6HUhx3Kt1PitZ-nIC6T0N-cABDKjnAB6klMxzkG-W9_gSOek_dG-1VFiZ3Qupv8ssUzgWgtZPU5dN_VA0QSngeNXSC6vfgOMD4HWTo-Xkd7l64OyMF9LemKgSR-2WqePHy2vfKqz1ezcxkpsSsocPDNjlpEHT0UOrvVEQlZ7UTqW_gcIyBG-WkbOFtPxHoEmTQu1gyyB4N8NzdOcG6KPr_lzTDMj0Su9dqcHo0v3IZZ4JLSy1lpIvyGCz8_TstK9IOPXazhkoL6IHzElChIngR7oxAPO8DYEQFGTDWvPvXQS1W_MeGhfUesuB930glKR_n06FUi68WN21IFu-5lAtjYf2pfsKlYDYHXrFYLK7YoWsj55o50OfML2fhbQ5TQQfhzmV6CWLbzrcxNTu9m1rfgMWNPcOCTdCBeFtVVdyE8V7P6KeMIcuD0oqspJbdPAPAUkKU1l9JwMHR0gepn5vMPluMSVNzKLZMAlwmROPUK1DwrA/EKD5PLBM38F_eNKCV-APrPv0M4NhaNUW/6) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/VBv2N7WmXTGxYBToKSSMSy4pAzd74W1wMTM8Q8U2RdBBrouycbrzyPSjeHWL5esCYHopzflWzmMNB4ZRTOkeddz6kXYD10nl2k1p2pqeZmQ95y4sGsgVkB7nNeZwiuAuJTbT8TLVH6em1y12DxFRcKKb9kvx4AwFKrFE4vGs-24PDdOBM3iK4WngVVAv6A1BoFKePJSECNy_2_7R5JqwtGbU4RqmQXFbcB6YwuXdLNVD-iw-hqkgqWp--qBsn5AFMR527uqvS4bnch01S8Ej6W0Tloh8G2sWlJKX5hwaShSabzLt-VmmfiTlYozC7rgqrQcSXyDR2GhRFkikuHOqupYebjgYlus8SPmktroGBEWZYqzDStyh_J5BraZHPEzuWouzE-dhuOQmFS3zzmI9LwSpKAjGD3nOcHC91_9TyhUdPDe98IJqKz96vEBT2sxml1tLPaj0nKuSY6N3GFOhdLu3BEiR4_xwRRNiOGG7BgmZ2_oXUdZl2xh1DKj0PXK02JV7xPrP19rxmOrkz-JBYCm8-7r7rg/5R5HIYGFasbquji2GR-5lbQjblQhSkNR/6)
[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/q_VjggTXCJQfZwh1SyqKp6T7pqe39PzYMEbYaJWuRiGweh4YQi2Co20pxz9GOLUtxdW8wfYO27JqFvpvIMHZ8TXFYoXRps4ySAryiMsaIZlQUZqrBRVD7QN4Vid2F7AXAF3nqxtCFnuyFBCwN3u2OfOoQgrodryqGqBnhhdwfPECdRqkEDD_4ky3iha35QVOHF4OKYtolFYLbKCn1QiIPI-RP7UjF7RcPczXIdmDTX5AGoMQE_fe9JqpBIV-9XVRPLnA9gFm9V4KkpYAnW364uGNNcots_hL2h5ytN-BU57pKj6wNzGu20DGp_hWCvBuwEwJNJsStoTsYY7M3fTb4wXR0m5asoxoCtv7_2n4hAkOjr4SD6Z-J3IsKPgt_unACK6Thk65EcdWbyjQWIEslE5IsJ1tMhexkU4JcvYqDkM3WlY9v__k4tleym1SwsfW1Y4XN7P9l9KyNcck3td41Il0ZmdgQJ7awbCgR_oaxQo-l05KSS1Z-8BBP9WXg5D0Hre9IwKpb7CXU930v2h_Bk9_cBQ0dQ/myRwn-Z_ni3ufAOmtc5OifvdCltoMa6k/6)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/LFQqdetiihfog6ONrWpyDLivAJL5XuSOinVTnCN9gxxvBr-1KWsl3bShiBYz6X2mg1FHd0wXKa3_x-mn8NjP20gc6sBx58NN9gJIe57pR0tRWH0jgl8ZAMqOppZ5XNYTskqi6886VJrnbXctcjY8I1QHW9Aj4InTealQev9D0HYNn2w9KnqLAaGMRbWVBedOHzEP6V0ZgSX5g6R4A2e0kl7iG3f_luQmqUA3KMKVcUVsbPNlc6JKLkyiHCuk0V_xavmRqzGGMw3yEgnfHfj4H5LL7s9bbsWDaYQS3fLE43ydXolMdmPonUELJP943G56PbgTC8NrO9xoMCOy1UwpPKosfxWxznrD1nLDZ2EHB8qfZsZVdM0KWG9tNJxevPlVQbacqYgst7L4GlqpD7tCKncM2Snp4g9GJEDPzUlzXZCCRqIXlAPKzkJNch7JbsnHnJlDEUDJAu01JI_k5qXn7_SG0vtGmLhLWb_DPVdb80EjMNP_My3M7o4WxudZkK19fqiMDIPhvhzurO_QzzYmuCSnK4k2YQ/BPNPtcUMtm_IPwXjeny3PCI1z1qwlOWX/6) IX hearing aid so special?

name: History Facts
subject: Why people danced for two months straight in 1518
body:
The phrase “dance the night away” took on a more literal meaning back in 1518, when as many as 400 people were struck by a “dancing plague” in the city of Strasbourg in modern France. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dontevxmahbn1e293vmf1n33bs8hz5o86oluurtoswqvuiu2dqoec4dzz8s0oqiduwdenvvjjbfvbgxwdikrta405poqff5mx99edpcuzai1bqmdmastwwyp3yf33hiybpg7aawvc7nu3jf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srkkab&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [In the “dancing plague” of 1518, hundreds of people danced uncontrollably for two months.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srkkab&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srkkab&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srkkab&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he phrase “dance the night away” took on a more literal meaning back in 1518, when as many as 400 people were struck by a “[dancing plague](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srkkab&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)” in the city of Strasbourg in modern France. The epidemic began in July with a single woman known as Frau Troffea, who spontaneously began boogying away in the middle of the street. She danced alone and continuously for an entire week before several dozen others found themselves overcome by the urge to dance as well. By month’s end, the number had grown to several hundred. The mysterious dancing eventually waned, and Strasbourg returned to normalcy in September.
---
Authorities were concerned by this inexplicable rise in dance fever, though ill-informed physicians attributed the ailment to “hot blood” and suggested people simply needed to dance until they no longer felt the urge. As the weeks went on, several dancers collapsed from exhaustion, and some suffered fatal heart attacks. Locals sought answers, and some feared they had been cursed by St. Vitus, the patron saint of dance. Many modern historians posit that stress, coupled with the rise of new and untreated diseases such as syphilis, likely induced this mass hysteria. There had been numerous reported outbreaks of “dancing plagues” around the Holy Roman Empire in the preceding 500 years, including a significant one in 1374. Another theory points to a fungus known as [ergot](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srkkab&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), sometimes found on bread. The fungus causes convulsions if consumed, and may have been responsible for the uncontrollable dancing as well as other instances of mass panic.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srkkab&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srkkab&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## A Tanzanian boarding school suffered a laughter epidemic in 1962.
Laughter really can be contagious, as attendees of a girls’ boarding school in Tanganyika (now Tanzania) discovered in 1962. In January of that year, three students at a school in the town of Kashasha began laughing hysterically out of nowhere. The epidemic soon spread to other students, as individuals suffered laughing fits that lasted anywhere from a few hours to 16 days. With doctors unable to explain the phenomenon and students unable to focus, the school temporarily closed in March, though the issue only grew from there. The girls returned home and “infected” those communities, and entire towns were suddenly overcome with insatiable laughter. Fourteen schools closed throughout the country, with each wave of laughter lasting for around a month. In the end, there were thankfully no fatalities, though more than 1,000 people were affected by this mysterious event.

clean_body: The phrase “dance the night away” took on a more literal meaning back in 1518, when as many as 400 people were struck by a “dancing plague” in the city of Strasbourg in modern France. | T he phrase “dance the night away” took on a more literal meaning back in 1518, when as many as 400 people were struck by a “” in the city of Strasbourg in modern France. The epidemic began in July with a single woman known as Frau Troffea, who spontaneously began boogying away in the middle of the street. She danced alone and continuously for an entire week before several dozen others found themselves overcome by the urge to dance as well. By month’s end, the number had grown to several hundred. The mysterious dancing eventually waned, and Strasbourg returned to normalcy in September. Authorities were concerned by this inexplicable rise in dance fever, though ill-informed physicians attributed the ailment to “hot blood” and suggested people simply needed to dance until they no longer felt the urge. As the weeks went on, several dancers collapsed from exhaustion, and some suffered fatal heart attacks. Locals sought answers, and some feared they had been cursed by St. Vitus, the patron saint of dance. Many modern historians posit that stress, coupled with the rise of new and untreated diseases such as syphilis, likely induced this mass hysteria. There had been numerous reported outbreaks of “dancing plagues” around the Holy Roman Empire in the preceding 500 years, including a significant one in 1374. Another theory points to a fungus known as , sometimes found on bread. The fungus causes convulsions if consumed, and may have been responsible for the uncontrollable dancing as well as other instances of mass panic. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Tony Awards won by choreographer and director Bob Fosse 9 | | Year the ballet Swan Lake premiered 1877 | Year the ballet Swan Lake premiered 1877 | | Age at which Fred Astaire started dancing 4 | | People who participated in the longest-ever conga line 119,986 | People who participated in the longest-ever conga line 119,986 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- A Tanzanian boarding school suffered a laughter epidemic in 1962. Laughter really can be contagious, as attendees of a girls’ boarding school in Tanganyika (now Tanzania) discovered in 1962. In January of that year, three students at a school in the town of Kashasha began laughing hysterically out of nowhere. The epidemic soon spread to other students, as individuals suffered laughing fits that lasted anywhere from a few hours to 16 days. With doctors unable to explain the phenomenon and students unable to focus, the school temporarily closed in March, though the issue only grew from there. The girls returned home and “infected” those communities, and entire towns were suddenly overcome with insatiable laughter. Fourteen schools closed throughout the country, with each wave of laughter lasting for around a month. In the end, there were thankfully no fatalities, though more than 1,000 people were affected by this mysterious event. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: A Hero's Return, Fans Ejected, and a Smelly Deer Blind
body:
Texas Land Commissioner Dawn Buckingham is urging the White House to assist in recovering the remains of Lieutenant Colonel George Andrew Davis Jr., a Lubbock veteran who was shot down over North Korea in 1952. Reports suggest Davis's remains and dog tags may be in a Chinese museum.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1ugzAURp_GbEH2vWBg8FAJsaVS1aEj8s91sGRCBDchefsqaTt2_XR09Ol8HcejTTmdT-92JsP3uIwgoT5IOCgYg035MVZFME6GThVkVIMdamwAi8kEH7x1qHXrJUSnHWq0HqWWttWNxyKZp0yCAgXQqq4kF2LdRvQOfOhkFJWkkHhZS56I6W63mB_LjdbSL3ORzcR82QS-CRgEDPu-lzOlM9Pq6cJPRsCATYfwIWCo66P-fJI4XFMQ2KtK1VqA3q5OCex5ovFX_zOCwP5M-5aJ-W9Dgb2EUcGrQ7GacNlTzmnTjajkabYpv77xv7FuBr4DAAD__46waI0) | |
# Wednesday, February 12, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1888, [James Field Smathers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OhCAUxfGngU4DF1EpKLaxm223NHxclARlgmQc337j9FP9q_NLzt9jfpiY4r78mg11fYc8AwPZMGg4zN7EdM0d9doyrzhFzQehRC8GEHTVHbjgReAqSIaDHBGFUsFi30slpEMa9Y0x4MABRq5atD7IMQhnwXnFAukY-lhzaeuKFd_mCOnKLyytyxtNeq31eRDxQ2AiMJ3n2dZjNXlPccc2l4XA9Fk13lyNve4QmHCv5a4cJC3aP8-YUjz6gXRs2UxMH7x-ffvS8B8AAP__A9hXug)—the inventor of the electric typewriter—was born near Valley Spring. The State Capitol received some special visitors Monday—47 horses and riders with invitations to the Houston Livestock Show and Rodeo next month! Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGSsyAUBeCnwQ4HrjGGguJv7PK3Wzog18gs4TpARN9-J9l6-zPfOXO-7tPd-ODj4795oi7HQhMI6LkALmFyxodzujROW-GUbFDLoVPdtRuga1ZtDPY9KGnRDnYWqKBXwtn5ZmDoBdjG6zcmQIIEuEnVonVLf1u62cLslFjYRaDzhVJbVix4mLyEk3ZM7UzPJui1lC2z7h-DkcFYa20XOgbzysXHd4TBGLFmBuNKr1wo8uB3zIXmb55XqtxExxM5JL5RPDkeW8KcecJgTv7r8E9vk7Tbqg_B5-vALuLxND58VpQ_b9k1_AQAAP__haBpDg) in today's _Around Texas_ section. Learning a new language can be as close as 3 weeks away with today's sponsor, [Babbel](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1ugzAURp_GbEH2vWBg8FAJsaVS1aEj8s91sGRCBDchefsqaTt2_XR09Ol8HcejTTmdT-92JsP3uIwgoT5IOCgYg035MVZFME6GThVkVIMdamwAi8kEH7x1qHXrJUSnHWq0HqWWttWNxyKZp0yCAgXQqq4kF2LdRvQOfOhkFJWkkHhZS56I6W63mB_LjdbSL3ORzcR82QS-CRgEDPu-lzOlM9Pq6cJPRsCATYfwIWCo66P-fJI4XFMQ2KtK1VqA3q5OCex5ovFX_zOCwP5M-5aJ-W9Dgb2EUcGrQ7GacNlTzmnTjajkabYpv77xv7FuBr4DAAD__46waI0).

## San Antonio Utility Liable for Home Explosion
A Bexar County jury found CPS Energy liable for a [2021 house explosion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFyrCAUgOGnwQ4HDu6iBcVt7Pa2KR2Ug5JBDgPsZn37TNLnBf5_5vt4LA8bYkj7f3uiaW9PCwi4cQFcwuJsiNcydM6swk2yQyO1mtRdaVDdYbRUclN4H6d1GIXcvB-HEbXW6G4KLXTB_MQESJAAo5x6XJ2_jV5tK2xuEp4NAl1oVPp2YMO3rT5e9MLSb3R20Ryt5crUPwYzg7naZFOjFKhgptJ6KjuD-fNZLl6eESvfcuWYsOwXL1gzpRrWiNxT4SBA8oNO5PjOkWqgxGDuinH5K8QY6l2zQeynDfF33v7UeBn4DgAA__89NmRR) caused by a natural gas leak, awarding victims Robert Rymers and his mother $109.5 million. However, an agreement between the parties reached before the verdict capped the payment at $60 million. The explosion left Rymers with burns covering 65% of his body and killed his two dogs, while his mother also suffered injuries. Attorneys argued that San Antonio’s city-owned utility company failed to maintain its [aging natural gas infrastructure](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdIvWaxJC4eJv3OVvr0TGXgfrDEbGCuHtT1x_9YxmPn1fz_FpY4rr679dWNdPyCMh3QAJJI3exnSOXeP1hH6QDWvZq0HdVU-qmXWQ3aD6rnP3_uads5MjxI4wIFvlJDZRX2NIkiTRQw4tTz7cHkG5iZwfMIgO2ceaS1tnrvyxe0hnfnNpXV6apOdat12of4KMIHMcR_u923qFgszKxy7IpOxsEmSuK0EGSZCRKMi4bQdeubxOyMVzYQ81w2ZPWHJhqLNdQSLCElOKeYWQCxCShDkvDPzZUt5jXgWZpmi_HVdtv_eiw9diY_pFrH86e2v6CQAA___1GG0u), creating an environment in which an explosion was likely to occur. In a statement, CPS Energy disputed its liability and said it is "evaluating our next steps." The company was ordered to pay Rymers and his mother [by March 26](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX8N3mxxdzY2A0MXb-na0QJzJEjERIbGyb-vknbt9oZP7z19X6flZGOK2_nTXtnUR8gLShxaiS3g4m1Mz6VvvHHSa2jYwEiaFI1IzcWsKmhHE2kekV2gYeyDJztOagWnLDXRvMokAgLiBLpj58MwBVodrl7LIHrJPta8d_XClR-2hPTMd967NV-bZC613oqgD4GzwPk4ju62cyk7W__LCJy_ixU4F7u1dqt5i7nlx5tqNz6KwPnvA7ziBAOQ6mFSPQzQ7MbfjphSLGoUvTxfbUzv6fqvi7vBnwAAAP__XttfOw). _"If CPS is listening, hopefully it’s something they will take to heart and make a course change so that other families don’t have to go through this,"_ [said an attorney for Rymers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kbuO2zAURL-G6q5BXUl8FCrSqNu0KQ0-Lm0mFGmQtGX9feDttx7MGWDOn6_rl4kp5ttvs9Pa36FckeMCHGHEqzcxndd58KvlXo8DraOc9CQmidNwX7Xzfpk8odK4KK6Q61lRQCmcRWvDENcPjOOII6Ia9YWsD4sKk7PovOaBzZx87KVe-p06vU0L6SwvqhdX9iGt994fjU2_GG4Mt-M4Lv8ot-WTMtxM7dElYrhlOhrDLRVnEsOtmQwm95JjgW8qWHqbCq48cz_BPRpQpno7IUVjE8H-TD3CHlOKJUOj3hPtlDsEs8d0gjlM9eQh5r_PSh7ItA4teoKbaUDvRyrt0wyxEryo-ug6ww3lBDpYwaWXIAVKmIUSoBflwAmLbvFi5lINdfWP47PehGQzv-0mpu8L-o9OXiv-DwAA__-5vpEp).
## Effort to Return Airman's Remains Advances
Texas Land Commissioner Dawn Buckingham is [urging the White House](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMZuRfSYQBg9d2NK1IzLcOZxiMLLdkLx9Rfau_5N-On0_t_HmOPB2_3Yr2fLycQQFF6lAahjRcXiPTYV2UtjriqzuTG9a04GpFtsBeADTasB2AjTe6aszxlODHuduqtiemAINGuCq-5om9JerN_MEM_bKi0YRcompLgsVernswzs-KdVzXKtgl1L2LMyXgEHAcBxH_ZgnPI8ChtMWMCgQMGgtYPgAMrgN5RzXlXPmuFGSmejB213uiTIjbYVdkAuFXU7p7Dn-lkXuwfGW5ZMKJbdlmWj9hCWuJGCoksX94BA4t51o1H11HD5vln93e1r4CwAA__9Es3Ix) to assist in recovering the remains of Lieutenant Colonel George Andrew Davis Jr., a Lubbock veteran who was shot down over North Korea in 1952. Reports suggest Davis's remains and dog tags may be in a Chinese museum. Buckingham oversees the state's veterans cemeteries. In a [letter to President Trump](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuOqzAQxvGnMZ2RGW6hcHEaupx2S2Q8A4zWF2Q7IXn71abf_qdPn_5f9-Vu2HHY_xtPury2uICCXiqQDSxo2L2XrkK9KpyainQztlM7tCO01aFpRRppsnagYRgGZfquG7cet6bDG6KtWP-OKWigAbg1U00rbv1ta-0KFie1iU4RcompLgcVepm8uXd8Uqpt9JXTRylnFu0_AbOA-bquenex_sB6j08Bs1njo8jdRQHzmShnmciRyZQFzB8onQkobfSec-YYKMn1Yb857IfxMlPALB2VQkmW9PCnNOg5cC7JFI6hShrPi53jPIyiU7s37D73yp-9nhp-AgAA___noXL_), she indicated her office plans to hold an interment ceremony for Davis when the West Texas State Veterans Cemetery is dedicated later this year. Davis joined the U.S. Army Air Corps in 1942. He flew more than 260 combat missions during World War II and 59 missions during the Korean War. He was awarded the Silver Star, two Distinguished Flying Crosses, and the [Congressional Medal of Honor](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGO6yAQANDTQGdrGCCJC4rfuMtvt7QwM9hIOESA4uT2q91-L_Ck93Vf7j7l9Nj--4Ndf8eyIKAdAAeFC_mUP4uR5FagSUl26qonfdFX1HJ3ZjVIGnUIAAxkNVkLYKxViie6RZncDwaoUCHe1DTyStHeog4rBpogCgNMqZc69p07v32L-VNeXMdQDpnd3vuzCf1P4CxwPs9zDEfZ21jqJnCuHNIz8aM3gfPGpW48-IH8KzVZHT3PlHNql6swsB0-5V-0_7l8OfwOAAD__8vTVOo). “ _It’s always important that every veteran come home when the fight is over_ ,” said VFW District Chaplain Steven Bailey. A petition with more information about the effort to bring Davis home can be [viewed here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngS3WcZAAA0MXb-na0cK-w0bCIcIkTd6-avc-wP9L39d1usZc8m39jDuH_kp1QsDzCfCkcKKYy3syksIM5JXkoKz2-qItarkFqxEjE-m4kHOEzgMYm84GAGb2SebwOwNUqBCd8gPPlM4u6WXGhTwkYYAp99qGvnHnVzxSedcnt2Gpuyxh6_1-CP0hcBQ4Nu6PdquPtnGrQ22rwFG2QPfvXEo-LlYYWPeYy1_d_-U8A_4EAAD__7FmTTQ).
## More Texans Than Californians by 2045?
A Realtor.com report suggests that Texas will surpass California to [become the most populous state](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOwyAURL8GOiy4JMEUFNu4y7ZbWjwuMVpsLEzi5O9Xdr_dFDNnpPNzH-825bQ8vu2Mpr1jGYHDlXFgAsZgU_6MFxqM40ELikYoqeVNKpB0Mt7x6PU1oroJaQOI3imPnFsleg1B02QOGAcBAqAXukMX4rWP0jvwQfNILhxDaqV2bcKGb7vF_CkvrJ0vM81mam3diPwiMBAY9n3vKtp89H2ZCQwL7huBoVVcwhkOBJvKc0vLg822_mJja1mf2bZUFubKOaPVhHVPOaftpsiFP2ab8nnZ_nXwMvAXAAD__170YL0) in the country by 2045, with an anticipated 42 million residents. As of last year, 39.2 million people lived in California, while Texas had 30.9 million residents. Between 2014 and 2024, Texas led all states with [3.9 million new residents](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_GdIvsxUAoXFxDl2uvRIu9TqwzGGEnJH9_Cv2Vo9GMnt7PdbpSiGG9fdPCprx8mlBiCxJB4eQoxPekK2dm6QZVsVF9MzRd02NT3Y0m3VM_e8fMQ9czt7bzfOkI3eCV9lUwnzOJChXiRQ01z863F9_YGa0bpBdasgsl7XW5c-EXZR_f6cl7bdNSRXMvZcui-RI4ChyP46h_X7R-SoHjykcWOJ4zgePOW9oLnBFsekQHbGPYMoOlGHza10BAGZaUC2xpe8T0yJALFYb5DSh1K3CsduO2I8QYctcLLW8LhXjilH_9PA3-BQAA__9p-msO). During this time, California gained 803,700 new residents, good for the sixth-most in the country. Many of these new Texas residents came from California, motivated largely by the desire for cheaper housing, according to the report. Between 2009 and 2023, more than 781,000 people moved from California to Texas. The report also found that despite Texas [leading the nation in building new housing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMR3IXgM2hYu_ocvfXonW3nWwZELO-ELy9qekv_6bGWm-LssFU06363_c2NVn3BeQMLQSWgULYcqvpW_IeUmTatgpoyc9agO6WZ023kjUNGrWegDJfT-YCGEMihGMaZJ7l0lQoACsmjr2FAcbdfAQaJJR9JIp1b10deXKTzxifu0PLl3Ytya7tdb7IfQ_AbOA-TzPtwt8q1yO7x8s_HYC5k9UwIylppB5UcRgI8mWrZ1apTi23hO06O2EFsmzwm6tW26Ko_uZck7HaEQvrxum_Bmvf77xcPAbAAD__xgVYYM), only 16% of houses on the market are priced within the range that most Texans can afford. Read the [full report here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL9uwyAYxJ8Gb1jw4YR4YOhQtnRoI3W0-PMRI2FjGRonb1_RvePpTvc73fd1upqY4nr_MAuq-gx5AgYnyoBymLyJ6TUNnVeW-ZF3qLgUozgLCaKblXTSSndidhwksrPz1nJhGTBvOYaL7KJqZQw4cIALH3u0PpwuQTgLzo8skIGhjzXvfZ2x4tOUkF75gXvv8tIlNde6FSLeCGgCevcOXV7zEl3pjw3Xe1yxJQnoY6MurxXXSkD_bCkbXwjoxiegGSegP9GkhnJ5obcZ6a3x6Fc1FWkOtNn0vTTZbz50u_LbEVOK5SzJwO6LielvVv33p4eC3wAAAP__evhrqw).

However, an agreement between the parties reached before the verdict capped the payment at $60 million. The explosion left Rymers with burns covering 65% of his body and killed his two dogs, while his mother also suffered injuries. Attorneys argued that San Antonio’s city-owned utility company failed to maintain its , creating an environment in which an explosion was likely to occur. In a statement, CPS Energy disputed its liability and said it is "evaluating our next steps." The company was ordered to pay Rymers and his mother . "If CPS is listening, hopefully it’s something they will take to heart and make a course change so that other families don’t have to go through this," . Effort to Return Airman's Remains Advances Texas Land Commissioner Dawn Buckingham is to assist in recovering the remains of Lieutenant Colonel George Andrew Davis Jr., a Lubbock veteran who was shot down over North Korea in 1952. Reports suggest Davis's remains and dog tags may be in a Chinese museum. Buckingham oversees the state's veterans cemeteries. In a , she indicated her office plans to hold an interment ceremony for Davis when the West Texas State Veterans Cemetery is dedicated later this year. Davis joined the U.S. Army Air Corps in 1942. He flew more than 260 combat missions during World War II and 59 missions during the Korean War. He was awarded the Silver Star, two Distinguished Flying Crosses, and the . “ It’s always important that every veteran come home when the fight is over ,” said VFW District Chaplain Steven Bailey. A petition with more information about the effort to bring Davis home can be . More Texans Than Californians by 2045? A Realtor.com report suggests that Texas will surpass California to in the country by 2045, with an anticipated 42 million residents. As of last year, 39.2 million people lived in California, while Texas had 30.9 million residents. Between 2014 and 2024, Texas led all states with . During this time, California gained 803,700 new residents, good for the sixth-most in the country. Many of these new Texas residents came from California, motivated largely by the desire for cheaper housing, according to the report. Between 2009 and 2023, more than 781,000 people moved from California to Texas. The report also found that despite Texas , only 16% of houses on the market are priced within the range that most Texans can afford. name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5ciio9ioa0l29sip9t0cbjqsbv43h0t7i4jfem0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spge4ob4c1h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z242m9a2fkvefj8mc7md77idejc4llma2ue6ln7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spge4ob4c1h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zk6l96sehmhepfudgovmm1inf6atv6jgl2dtja10_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spge4ob4c1h2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ze76m20tgcurkgn48ie2rp3rr97ubhpafrvr6tqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spge4ob4c1h2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1st76k1f17b185fm35f1pdi8139m9egisbne238_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spge4ob4c1h2bs)
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zv1q70tnukce4nbf6tl8jl60g3h3joib66ifl16g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spge4ob4c1h2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zdtmdlblobc1fi72ccqmgslluntm1v68gg7dq3n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spge4ob4c1h2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbesun4bhfb0mon3vmc0210lmtbp31fd4gu87788_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spge4ob4c1h2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7msntvh7f64a1tg69i87blns93fplgqc0fmiu78_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spge4ob4c1h2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2htncqce8q176fg9kpo8oikq6igcoqsducf7ei8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4spge4ob4c1h2bs)

Real American Reporting
---

body:

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/KcEngbxuPqdkKW1M3JxhL-IB1gVZB5alfUZb9_rktU5Sqo4uMft9Qoh-65p6elSnLy2PACyBNiVsB1yFIFrY8H-7m1nVsxZmHvW2D8ROqCB-IOCDpCMwyo6NCd9xXbiTywLd7I2fzJoqeYGRX6NPVXp2IWbNuG3aUUiV17Ix_kX9TrQ6fPDc_S1_Q6BTiQ6_Z2H_L0GRhBxonB-ylLQ410q-cVJmAXBQAvxjWdg8BNSpHvLqrLcCoCykbhXwBrCRI9NYI7sIQPqkUWxcUDmYqe6aBSR6L0NnquG_XBbm5E8E4Xooy-GgPqmJQkJ-aRfwYgy8pW1QKxs6niQ62GfVD4C9f4sQjQadD8XkDL2S5lywW49wNFbS6Pxd0OEqPnTD-qq0amsHmQwM6-1l1huAEOniwG6ghOT14g2Jx4kSxw/iBF5rVWEbbRxhE-NnnHgHZfay1htM4yE/6)

| | “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/15RCyMJrAnZllgeUOA2l1V1qNmBc4seMQnqnkZHlK-2aDPphMq2O2r12Dh2Tg9TwQgLIDjVeXLdeR6TWga_Hfuv8qNWGTmYq67BAPwvN5BPJnBIEGBgSwf3lGY89ww2gsPjYOzRRHDOO6JLDqt6pXbiyn94BonNqm6fb3W_3fRFE8jeo871BvAKZOjVAGF03uePzjBMilMY39EgL8QqKZKW1VnIqRCZhHoFU3kcVGA45ylnIfp8e1HLL2ajNfrA7_HElpvMnhxHlylKE5bQLmbjzCHwrJ9bYsB5TO5PvYY3IpzuP0G8M6xHTeFAOpol4LDdZne-VIefwUpgEEBRk0qoPM7ZtxYzrxHVp9TrnLkViYWbRhU1YC7iyMI29YM2wdgfUfjmOLahxQDhKLRKt2boAipN3vzGbj4LAgskA_A/hzDgek9A9-HqDhZGvjeI49WNtANPO6CP/6) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge. [**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/TYrfuByQpHyM1VqNXmIJW-kfEor5n9S3lngvlcTYRL8xvjIjPMED34clRZGPUMCKK2StQpJpKPJ2kAL9QIzmcBFkgWZpLDp1ID08rzuZDwfwlM-2yY6sfYbkFPa-R-Gzn6g6WA8SEzNAXe8cKYlYN5D3xcjMRuA2J4Fc8qzZike5vY8D6t7-LysVC_3qNmlr6DBrBzTqT08qVc29nDrvFGS_R6WO-RyHpkkgtiEsno2okFu-L7gRAJ7UEIL7oxvMx_R6vi8kztwknf9aosbgoCHvMeqomZkAMQio2VF34Y7bzlIPIyow4-41XdW5HzSY2y6RRe3kHlahqa4ZxACLN_zOa5_ny9KkxO5bUtq7clGR3jMAXztaw3erVKAtisSeljVZfGY1ZyrTXYYyeKqg_piQbZNFYz6jpQZ0aW1XaQ/MB1U8vxvYNPjXcLFrZxvXBv8bVdnzxK9/6) Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University

_**America, this is our chance.**_

This week, we have the opportunity to confirm Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as the next Health and Human Services Secretary.

The Democrats are ready to block our every move. This is going to be a fight, but I made a promise to you and our great nation - _**I will always put America First.**_

[**I 'm reaching out to ask if you will support my fight and donate just $4. **](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=255f1490b08e44cf8b6691583ea1cdd1&_e=GrPn51e7aN-cIuxs4_1LJBRvhYV4CbeEKKsjwwl4Ig_QXRK1AsAf22-o0nMd6wze_UUgqIGpFT4LA2O2IfBqHSUD8QF9zAaQDr3P_CGhnf0flejbNhyyx_zTzJ4lUfUWosGG4loXHzijTikdpwuRoQiFSQ969d9v6RHHNhgLTNn5HYyook4eYplHT2_IPigYheGvxwH0nqqQyUmMzzggslwkF38PY_oswxYaalfH02_vNA2H92staNsak43MeuhUCY8QGGkD8XyfsUqMQEnxDynEb2HReYgE0oMylEk72ofN-hIOi2prRCevsHIFo3aDxAmtSCDlQgX8EUlJ8txbJA%3D%3D)

_$4 because RFK Jr. is crucial to Making America Healthy Again.

$4 because the Left is determined to block President Trump's nominees-and they'll stop at nothing.

$4 because we cannot afford to fall short in this confirmation battle.

$4 because it's our responsibility to ensure a better future for our children and grandchildren. _

| [ **RUSH $4 ->** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=255f1490b08e44cf8b6691583ea1cdd1&_e=GrPn51e7aN-cIuxs4_1LJBRvhYV4CbeEKKsjwwl4Ig_QXRK1AsAf22-o0nMd6wze_UUgqIGpFT4LA2O2IfBqHSUD8QF9zAaQDr3P_CGhnf0flejbNhyyx_zTzJ4lUfUWosGG4loXHzijTikdpwuRoYhtg_ASfoAXL_aozf4tpISkMPh-h_kBagQ-3RrEFrhhI40aHk1chkxMft8g55GnE_U3Kt7t5L6WQXUzKDuHhfb56CAE_bEB--O_-TvyxJiQj0L1Py4Dr9NNmA1825-mnVr-WbqlCbc0UcWZaQvHOdxR4BghyO2DwyK4uDXL31yuUjUF7Xj2IdL8D7WtZ41p_A%3D%3D)

**The stakes have never been higher. If we fail to confirm RFK Jr., our entire agenda will be derailed, and everything we 've worked for will come to a standstill.**

Peter, I'm counting on you to fuel our fight. I've stood with President Trump since Day One, and I don't plan on backing down any time soon.

[**So, will you step up and chip in $4, or anything you can spare, to help strengthen our America First Movement and support RFK Jr. before the Left ruins everything we have worked so hard for?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=255f1490b08e44cf8b6691583ea1cdd1&_e=GrPn51e7aN-cIuxs4_1LJBRvhYV4CbeEKKsjwwl4Ig_QXRK1AsAf22-o0nMd6wze_UUgqIGpFT4LA2O2IfBqHSUD8QF9zAaQDr3P_CGhnf0flejbNhyyx_zTzJ4lUfUWosGG4loXHzijTikdpwuRoQiFSQ969d9v6RHHNhgLTNn5HYyook4eYplHT2_IPigYXhhGdLlYqccQXejCvt1WIyfBIg9yLB1a030oAzs3wR_18Vmm_oOZCj8R8sgVVKCU3qNB6JkHm3w8ufjW5DcgIOeA6Euyuimu5l1j4mO-nzX76iWQCLdsOucbEdPeH09jrHkLCl2L5mpbbSS4XSABkg%3D%3D)

Thank you,
_Coach Tuberville_

[**P.S. The Democrats are mobilizing against us, and time is running out. Will you step up today and donate just $4 to help us secure America 's future? Your support will make all the difference.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=255f1490b08e44cf8b6691583ea1cdd1&_e=GrPn51e7aN-cIuxs4_1LJBRvhYV4CbeEKKsjwwl4Ig_QXRK1AsAf22-o0nMd6wze_UUgqIGpFT4LA2O2IfBqHSUD8QF9zAaQDr3P_CGhnf0flejbNhyyx_zTzJ4lUfUWosGG4loXHzijTikdpwuRoQiFSQ969d9v6RHHNhgLTNn5HYyook4eYplHT2_IPigYhjR1adHesh5JJ1AJ8D7kWwLuRGQOSSlznGm5lbOX8Fr8XSIbVbN9FAaptU9Coai5VafeqraVRgI23ZlMpJCx2n12jXEDOj0_SKQ3tYXwmBBhlu5_B8D71dvTWrrnpxVEgYJSwrM-9HgtGTwjLyX9wQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=255f1490b08e44cf8b6691583ea1cdd1&_e=GrPn51e7aN-cIuxs4_1LJBRvhYV4CbeEKKsjwwl4Ig_QXRK1AsAf22-o0nMd6wze_UUgqIGpFT4LA2O2IfBqHSUD8QF9zAaQDr3P_CGhnf0flejbNhyyx_zTzJ4lUfUWosGG4loXHzijTikdpwuRoQiFSQ969d9v6RHHNhgLTNn5HYyook4eYplHT2_IPigYhGy3qpx07PO689By-51y1SmUdHcvCNXEPZyU-5fMOoiwq7XgY9OcEHUy5Xd0qwArmKHDpj9q6EdnOOqgQuA07Z3OBHsSpwWlqS9FjKhp0Pjmh3cv7OH6BxdPR36ihVaRyNseKac1pd4UpYTTIpydfg%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=255f1490b08e44cf8b6691583ea1cdd1&_e=GrPn51e7aN-cIuxs4_1LJBRvhYV4CbeEKKsjwwl4Ig_QXRK1AsAf22-o0nMd6wze_UUgqIGpFT4LA2O2IfBqHSUD8QF9zAaQDr3P_CGhnf0flejbNhyyx_zTzJ4lUfUWosGG4loXHzijTikdpwuRoQiFSQ969d9v6RHHNhgLTNn5HYyook4eYplHT2_IPigYTNKBXTMFoOGMgkgX2Q3DS5lAT56B9Ejtl3H8hvDFbTsvDT1l1OqqqBrnkRsgyTICPuXBK8Av8ufPsxcRo7b6SuTUmwZA2O8oNDyW7axX9X_qxrVCPJDNUGRyPK6hTtycUI8wS0C2elB6x_Aap8Xq7g%3D%3D)

name: Troy Downing
subject: Democrats are trying to DISMANTLE DOGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We can’t afford to lose DOGE

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ SIGN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Just days after President Trump’s plan to dismantle USAID because of the tremendous amount of waste and fraud discovered, Democrats have found their next boogeyman:

The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

DOGE is one of the best things to come out of this new Administration. Just weeks into the administration, we’ve already seen its impact by scoping out the waste at USAID and just this week eliminated another $182 million from HHS. **However, Democrats are starting to go after it with everything they have.**

They’re even going so far as to call Elon Musk a “Nazi” and say he’s orchestrating a “coup.”

First, they tried to stall Elon Musk by denying him access to critical data. Now, they're calling for the complete elimination of DOGE. Any hope of restoring fiscal sanity in our government will be gone in one fell swoop. _We can’t let them get away with this._ **[**Peter, will you sign my petition to support DOGE and protect it from the Democrats?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._-8Ot3CXDQPuoBXvKvcg)**
---

---
Thank you for signing,Congressman Troy Downing

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T426c728d-4851-4576-a151-1aed28bede55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Because let’s face it: **this is only the beginning.** Just look at what Trump and his confirmed cabinet nominees have already said! We need 1,000 responses from Democrats in 22122 before midnight!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4308eb62-299e-4d23-9d15-93b629ca536d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal polls and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc65b57c-b459-4bff-b47f-b0eb23166a90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Photo by [Glen Carrie](https://substack.com/redirect/7c117eb1-721e-4d4d-a2cb-1b1d3844f15d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/8ba67734-d4e2-4930-93f9-cb05d01b5449?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Mississippi** - As municipal Republican primaries approach across our great state, it's vital for every conservative to step up and make your voice heard. Here's why your vote in these local elections is not just important, but absolutely critical:
**1\. Defend Our Values**
In Mississippi towns, where every vote counts, your participation directly impacts who will uphold our conservative principles. From protecting our Second Amendment rights to ensuring low taxes, the officials we elect will be the guardians of our community's conservative values. Your vote ensures we keep our towns true to our roots.
**2\. Prioritize What Matters**
By voting in the primary, you're telling candidates what you care about most. Whether it's safeguarding our schools from liberal agendas, supporting local businesses, or keeping our streets safe, your vote influences which conservative leader will fight for these priorities in the general election.
**3\. Keep Government Accountable**
Voting isn't just a right; it's a duty to keep our government transparent and accountable. By showing up, you're sending a message to any potential politician that Mississippi's conservatives are watching closely. We demand leaders who respect our Constitution, our faith, and our freedoms.
**4\. Make Your Vote Count**
In local elections, low turnout can mean your vote has even more power. Each vote can tip the scales, especially in primaries. Your single vote could be the deciding factor in who gets to represent conservative values in your municipality.
**5\. Shape Future Elections**
The results of these primaries could set the tone for future elections across Mississippi. High voter turnout from conservatives shows we're engaged, we're not complacent, and we demand candidates who stand for our beliefs. It might just inspire a new wave of conservative leadership in our communities.
**6\. Republican Primary - Our Time to Shine**
For Republicans in Mississippi, these primaries are our moment to ensure candidates reflect our conservative ethos. It's not just about party; it's about choosing leaders who will fight for our conservative agenda over any liberal overreach.
**7\. Lead by Example**
By voting, you're setting an example for the younger generation or new residents. Show them what true conservative participation looks like. Encourage them to join our ranks in defending our way of life.
The upcoming Republican municipal primaries across Mississippi aren't just another election; they're our chance to shape the future of our towns with conservative leadership. By casting your vote, you're not only selecting leaders but actively participating in the battle to keep our communities conservative. Don't let this opportunity slip by - your vote is your power in Mississippi.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFuYWNyaXN3ZWxsLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.i0RXyqgAb1bTZRn--4QenDAneraZOwKqiuXH9nTZAds?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156788392)

name: Team Connolly
subject: Time to take a stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gerry Connolly for Congress
body:
https://gerryconnolly.com/ [https://gerryconnolly.com/]
Hi friends,

Let us cut straight to it: the fight for democracy isn’t over — it’s just getting started.

Gerry’s role as the Ranking Member of the Oversight Committee makes him one of the last lines of defense against Trump and MAGA’s dangerous agenda. They’re already targeting him, flooding the airwaves with misinformation, and doing everything they can to block real accountability.

Here’s the reality: Trump and his allies aren’t just plotting their comeback — they’re setting the stage to tear down every safeguard we’ve built. They want to strip away reproductive rights, dismantle Social Security, and rig the system in their favor. If we don’t act now, they’ll succeed.

This is our moment to draw the line. Gerry can’t do this alone — and that’s where you come in.

Every dollar you give strengthens our fight to expose the truth, protect our rights, and defend our democracy. Can Gerry count on you to step up? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/GCVA-11-Email-ONB2025-ONB-ONB?&refcode=E11947-2025-ONB3Team-SL-Other&amount=25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

$5 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcva-11-email-onb2025-onb-onb?express_lane=true&refcode=E11947-2025-ONB3Team-EG-Other&amount=5] $11 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcva-11-email-onb2025-onb-onb?express_lane=true&refcode=E11947-2025-ONB3Team-EG-Other&amount=11]

$100 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcva-11-email-onb2025-onb-onb?express_lane=true&refcode=E11947-2025-ONB3Team-EG-Other&amount=100] Other → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcva-11-email-onb2025-onb-onb?express_lane=true&refcode=E11947-2025-ONB3Team-EG-Other&amount=Other]

History will judge how we responded in this moment. Let’s make sure we’re on the right side of it.

- Team Connolly
https://www.facebook.com/congressmanconnolly [https://www.facebook.com/congressmanconnolly] https://twitter.com/electconnolly [https://twitter.com/electconnolly] https://www.instagram.com/connollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/connollyforcongress/]
Gerry Connolly is the Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee and a Democratic member of Congress representing Virginia’s 11th District, located in Northern Virginia. Gerry and his wife Smitty have lived in Fairfax since 1979 and have one daughter, Caitlin. Gerry previously served as the Chairman of the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors. In Congress, Gerry has worked continuously to grow Northern Virginia’s economy, to ensure a world-class education system, and to preserve Social Security and Medicare. Gerry has our backs in Congress, so let's have his back on the campaign trail. Donate to Connolly for Congress today! clean_body: [] Hi friends, Let us cut straight to it: the fight for democracy isn’t over — it’s just getting started. Gerry’s role as the Ranking Member of the Oversight Committee makes him one of the last lines of defense against Trump and MAGA’s dangerous agenda. They’re already targeting him, flooding the airwaves with misinformation, and doing everything they can to block real accountability. Here’s the reality: Trump and his allies aren’t just plotting their comeback — they’re setting the stage to tear down every safeguard we’ve built. They want to strip away reproductive rights, dismantle Social Security, and rig the system in their favor. If we don’t act now, they’ll succeed. This is our moment to draw the line. Gerry can’t do this alone — and that’s where you come in. Every dollar you give strengthens our fight to expose the truth, protect our rights, and defend our democracy. Can Gerry count on you to step up? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: $5 → [] $11 → [] $25 → [] $50 → [] $100 → [] Other → [] History will judge how we responded in this moment. Let’s make sure we’re on the right side of it. - Team Connolly [] [] [] Gerry Connolly is the Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee and a Democratic member of Congress representing Virginia’s 11th District, located in Northern Virginia. Gerry and his wife Smitty have lived in Fairfax since 1979 and have one daughter, Caitlin. Gerry previously served as the Chairman of the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors. In Congress, Gerry has worked continuously to grow Northern Virginia’s economy, to ensure a world-class education system, and to preserve Social Security and Medicare. Gerry has our backs in Congress, so let's have his back on the campaign trail. Donate to Connolly for Congress today! ## DeepSeek Release Reveals Hidden Dangers of AI – RedState
Artificial intelligence is rapidly reshaping how we access information, make decisions, and interact with the world. But what happens when the AI systems we rely on are programmed to manipulate rather than inform? With the recent release of DeepSeek, a Chinese-developed AI model, concerns about politically biased AI need to take center stage. White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt **[shut down CNN's Kaitlan Collins](https://substack.com/redirect/c7d6be39-e7db-4d8a-9b7a-246fcbf176bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for challenging the legality of President Trump's government agency cuts and the firing of certain officials who previously investigated the president.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c7d6be39-e7db-4d8a-9b7a-246fcbf176bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c7d6be39-e7db-4d8a-9b7a-246fcbf176bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Who advised the president on the legality of telling government agencies that they don't have to spend money already appropriated by congress?" Collins asked.
Leavitt pointed to a White House Office of Management and Budget (OMB) memo that confirms the legality of President Trump's actions, "The White House's council believes this is within the president's power to do, and therefore he is doing it!"
Collins then questioned Trump's firing of prosecutors from the DOJ who had previously investigated Trump. "How is the administration deciding which laws to follow and which ones to ignore?" Collins asked.
Watch Leavitt's fiery response:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c7d6be39-e7db-4d8a-9b7a-246fcbf176bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
• More than 2 million lost jobs
• Stocks plummeting over 20%
• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling
**We can't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it. # _**Resurfaced:**_**Candace Owens SNAPS at narcissistic "victim" with BRUTAL comeback...**
Candace Owens **[snapped at a woke college student for trashing the police](https://substack.com/redirect/f9b9e999-853c-4368-a26b-e40a4d96042b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with ignorant Black Lives Matter slogans during an off-the-rails campus speaking event with Charlie Kirk and TPUSA.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f9b9e999-853c-4368-a26b-e40a4d96042b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f9b9e999-853c-4368-a26b-e40a4d96042b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We say 'f*ck the police' because it's the entire system that is racist!" the girl told Owens. "If you have to ask us what our problem is, there's no point!!"
Candace didn't hold back, "I refuse to take a black person seriously that wants to talk to me about .0004% of the unarmed black people that are shot by police officers and does not want to have a conversation about the 17 million black babies that were aborted!"
What Owens said next was the mic drop moment...
"There's a lot of emotion, and there no facts!!" Candace erupted at the student. "More police got shot by black people than the other way around,... more black people got struck by lightening than shot by police..."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f9b9e999-853c-4368-a26b-e40a4d96042b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

body:
It turns out, these guys actually have a FEW things in common – and it’s ALL very troubling.| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101990227/527737774/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250212forget_N_AS_90DO_12_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNzYwYjE0LTUyZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gjJIjjGELZqIZ888QB8OiR_KCCcsaw3bS3ZKqyzaqu4=)
---
Hi Peter,

**If you’ve been paying attention to the news since Inauguration Day, you likely already know that our country has been thrown into unprecedented chaos.** Trump has assembled an army of extremists who have publicly expressed sexist, misogynistic, and outdated viewpoints about women’s roles in society. It’s very troubling.

**Our candidates are running for office to counter the potential damage from people like...**

**Pete Hegseth, who has been confirmed for Defense Secretary:** Every Senate Republican voted to approve him, with the exception of 3 GOP Senators. **_Two were women_** – Lisa Murkowski (AK) and Susan Collins (ME). He was confirmed, despite his history of violence and sexual misconduct, including rape allegations, as well as interviews in which he proudly states he doesn’t believe women should serve in military combat roles... [**Urgent: Many of our funding sources and partners have been deeply affected by Trump’s funding freezes. As we depend on first quarter fundraising to budget for our efforts each year, our success this year will greatly depend on the generosity of our grassroots donors in response to emails like this one. Chip in so we can elect pro-choice, pro-democracy women who will represent us in the rooms where decisions are being made. Donate $20.25 or more today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101990228/527737775/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250212forget_N_AS_90DO_12_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNzYwYjE0LTUyZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gjJIjjGELZqIZ888QB8OiR_KCCcsaw3bS3ZKqyzaqu4=) [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101990229/527737777/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250212forget_N_AS_90DO_12_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNzYwYjE0LTUyZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gjJIjjGELZqIZ888QB8OiR_KCCcsaw3bS3ZKqyzaqu4=) Now, Hegseth is on a mission to remove “woke” service members and implement major changes to our national defense systems. He has already created new obstacles for transgender service members and will be reinstating personnel who refused to get a COVID-19 vaccine.

**Robert F. Kennedy Jr., Trump’s nominee to lead the Department of Health and Human Services** , has a concerning record of embracing debunked theories about vaccines. He’s stated he would embrace Trump’s anti-choice policies, and, as alleged by his cousin, Caroline Kennedy, he has a disturbing history of extreme animal cruelty. As The New York Times confirms, RFK Jr. has no medical or public health degrees, experience, or expertise.

According to _Vanity Fair_ , a woman who worked as a nanny for Kennedy’s children described inappropriate behavior and sexual advances, including an incident in which Kennedy approached her from behind and allegedly groped her in a pantry. At the time, the woman was 23. Kennedy was 45 and married with five children.

[**We’re working to elect women to serve as a representative voice in our checks and balances system as these men make decisions that impact our safety and lives. Join us by pitching in $20.25 or whatever you can today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101990230/527737778/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250212forget_N_AS_90DO_12_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNzYwYjE0LTUyZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gjJIjjGELZqIZ888QB8OiR_KCCcsaw3bS3ZKqyzaqu4=)

**Elon Musk has been recklessly overseeing the new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE):** This unelected and unvetted billionaire has spent the last month stripping government support from Americans as well as millions of people around the world who depend on American aid in various forms.

According to _CBS News_ , **eight** employees of Musk’s company, SpaceX, have accused him of creating a hostile and abusive work environment “rife with sexual harassment” that demeaned women and the LGBTQ+ community. He has also been accused of exposing himself to a flight attendant...

**Far too many of these men have been credibly accused of sexual misconduct, which isn’t surprising given that Trump himself has been accused of sexual misconduct by at least 15 women.**

[**We CANNOT sit back and watch our government become overrun with misogynists and sexual predators. We need women in government with these men to hold them accountable and protect our rights. Help us continue the work to elect WOMEN to office by pitching in $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101990232/527737779/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250212forget_N_AS_90DO_12_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNzYwYjE0LTUyZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gjJIjjGELZqIZ888QB8OiR_KCCcsaw3bS3ZKqyzaqu4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101990239/527737780/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250212forget_N_AS_90DO_12_NG_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNzYwYjE0LTUyZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gjJIjjGELZqIZ888QB8OiR_KCCcsaw3bS3ZKqyzaqu4=)

name: Eva Piatek, Evergreen
subject: We want to hear from you, friend
body:
How are you holding up, and what do you need from us?
| | |
---
| Friend—

I wanted to make sure you got my message from a few weeks ago. We’re checking in to see how you’re holding up in these tumultuous times, and [**we hope you’ll let us know by filling out this brief survey.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3320117/87SdQ4wZ)

I promise we will read every single answer. Because your input will help us keep our work aligned with the people who make this movement run—**people like you.**

Thanks for sharing your comments with us today.

– Eva

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Eva Piatek, Evergreen Collaborative
Date: Sat, Jan 25, 2025
Subject: Quick temperature check 🌡️ |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3320118/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi there,

It’s been a few days since President Trump’s inauguration and the flurry of horrific executive orders that immediately followed. We’ll have more for you on what it all means for climate next week.

With everything going on right now, it’s okay to feel overwhelmed. We’re all in this together, which is why we want to check in.

**How are you feeling? What do you need from our movement?**[**Take our brief survey and let us know where you’re at.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3320119/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3320120/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We’re gearing up for a lot of fights in the coming weeks—from defending key programs of the Inflation Reduction Act to fighting for low-cost clean energy solutions—but none of it works without your input and support.

[**Take a minute to share your thoughts with us today**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3320121/87SdQ4wZ)**—because you’re an essential part of the Evergreen community.** |
---
| With hope and gratitude, |
---
| | |
---
### Eva Piatek
Email Production Manager
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3320122/87SdQ4wZ)

clean_body: How are you holding up, and what do you need from us? | | | | Friend— I wanted to make sure you got my message from a few weeks ago. We’re checking in to see how you’re holding up in these tumultuous times, and I promise we will read every single answer. Because your input will help us keep our work aligned with the people who make this movement run—people like you. Thanks for sharing your comments with us today. – Eva \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Eva Piatek, Evergreen Collaborative Date: Sat, Jan 25, 2025 Subject: Quick temperature check 🌡️ | | | ---|---|--- | Hi there, It’s been a few days since President Trump’s inauguration and the flurry of horrific executive orders that immediately followed. We’ll have more for you on what it all means for climate next week. With everything going on right now, it’s okay to feel overwhelmed. We’re all in this together, which is why we want to check in. How are you feeling? What do you need from our movement? | | We’re gearing up for a lot of fights in the coming weeks—from defending key programs of the Inflation Reduction Act to fighting for low-cost clean energy solutions—but none of it works without your input and support. —because you’re an essential part of the Evergreen community. | | With hope and gratitude, | | | | Eva Piatek Email Production Manager Evergreen Collaborative * | Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- 1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 700, Washington DC 20036 | | content © 2025 Evergreen Collaborative. ## **GOOD MORNING!**

body:
