[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ba19f802429048d0864984432c92a485&_e=WhCuTDPxhyQnyxEKRa1_hNknhVwit9To7cFg0VgG3JjTJw3DpPb689_LAukY9d-fZtNc993PUopwexu5MJqZ3vgP9nSIyedCVojOYU_FFprVSxMYJginXvWjsBvj6rvGCeSeAhI4cgiDZyFXStRxrwRDnOW6yYrVnR5g8HRlEJTWQ7VSiM7jkKy2dEnpTrmezHpxQCDEZsSSr-W0g173dJrZYD6PR4FGeCJ4CboUqZGDEeTpRNJHhdetRrg0xKfPHf5Th2KXBM83IEi3DRFAOMLqaKh6ROCHEB9aKgaV4m8vpvJeTY3t1MWIONYpFHbJFHT2SZCGCTDHHAielCdjUIZzQVGFz8a_U5itKNVL9N-m4kVeHgFW-3bX1OSVNZcVTUZQJ2o4GG0CaynSmT-B4w%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

The battle to keep our House Majority has already started, and in the words of the _Cook Political Report,_ it will be a **_“Knife Fight.”_**

We knew this would happen with such a slim Republican Majority in the House, but I didn’t expect it to be this bad. We currently have a two-seat majority, and the outlook isn't promising. This election will be critical.

_**Here are the quick stats:**_

**Total Toss-Ups: 18 seats
Republican Toss-Ups: 8 seats **
Fellow Conservative, we can’t afford to stand by while the Democrats prepare to flip these seats. With just a two-seat Majority, anything could happen. name: No Dem Left Behind Executive Director, Hassan Martini
subject: The World Is On Fire.
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2weqi3-uwr69b-kyd76rh3/)
---
# **The World Is On Fire**
---
|
---
| | | | Hello friend, I know it feels like the world is upside down right now—likely because it actually is. Trump's rhetoric has shifted from absurd and radical to the new normal for the GOP. We hear something insane for the first time, brush it off in disbelief, and then realize they are completely serious. Reality keeps hitting us in the face every single time. For example, Republican members of Congress are being inundated with calls from their own voters about Trump's Middle East strategy. While Democrats and Independents clearly disagree with these policies, it’s the backlash from Republican voters that is causing the most pushback. Gaza is not for sale, and America is not the king of the planet, no matter what Trump, Netanyahu, or their cronies think. Borders are sovereign, internationally guaranteed territories, and that principle should not be up for negotiation. On the issue of borders, we now have a "drunken frat boy" Secretary of Defense outlining new Ukrainian borders at the behest of Trump and Putin. Together, they are negotiating how to execute Putin’s demands. The official U.S. policy now involves redrawing Ukraine’s borders to appease the Kremlin. Elections have consequences, and we are living through them right now, fighting back with everything we have. We’re reaching out to Republicans and Democrats alike because nobody—across the political spectrum—is happy with what’s happening. Republicans didn’t vote to surrender their rights to a few corporate oligarchs. While we may disagree on the Second Amendment, we can all agree on one thing: America and the world are not for sale. Foreign policy is not the only disaster unraveling under Trump’s administration. Project 2025 might fit their distorted version of reality, but it’s a nightmare for the rest of us. Today, inflation numbers were released, and they are the highest we’ve seen since June— _before_ Trump’s reckless tariffs even kick in. If these tariffs were a good idea, wouldn’t we have tried them by now? The concept of forcing foreign countries to "pay us more" to enter our markets sounds good on the surface, but that’s not how it works. Other countries simply raise prices on American consumers, meaning _we_ end up paying more. Essentially, Trump is raising taxes on Americans at a time when inflation was finally beginning to stabilize. His arbitrary 10% tariff here, 25% there—numbers plucked out of thin air—further demonstrate his incompetence. The corrupt media establishment, which serves the same oligarchy Trump represents, tries to spin this as a "negotiating tactic." But it’s not. He’s simply a _moron,_ and it shows. Remember when he addressed the United Nations and declared himself the greatest President in U.S. history? The entire room, filled with diplomats and seasoned officials, broke out in laughter. It was one of the most humiliating moments in our nation’s history. That’s who Trump is, and this is what a Trump presidency looks like. Now let’s talk about his cabinet. **_It’s a “who’s who” of incompetence,_** corruption, and compromised individuals. If the goal is to dismantle our government institutions completely, these are the people you’d pick to lead. The Secretary of Health and Human Services doesn’t believe in science—an ironic and horrifying choice. Meanwhile, the cowardly Republican Senate refuses to object to their anointed king. What’s worse: RFK Jr. as Secretary of HHS, or Tulsi Gabbard as Secretary of National Intelligence? Tulsi, who has already been caught parroting Assad propaganda, is now being handed control over national intelligence. As a Syrian, I’ve been speaking out about Tulsi long before she joined Trump’s circle. Traitors naturally gravitate to other traitors, and this administration is full of them. These developments fill my days with anger, heartbreak, and determination—on loop. The media is reveling in this chaos, raking in profits as ratings soar, while our nation and the world are literally on fire. We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines while our nation’s future is at stake. The stakes are too high, and the consequences of inaction are too dire. No Dem Left Behind is fighting every single day to push back against this chaos, to hold leaders accountable, and to restore power to the people. But we can’t do it without you. [**_Now is the time to get involved. Join us in this fight by donating today—every contribution, no matter the size, fuels our efforts to flip districts, support progressive candidates, and build a better future for all Americans. Together, we can stand up to the madness, protect our democracy, and ensure no one is left behind._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2weqi3-uwr69c-kyd76rh4/) In Solidarity, Hassan Martini
---

---

Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.

**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003

Those who want to undermine our elections are already gearing up:
🚨 **Pardons for January 6th criminals** – Some of the most extreme people who stormed the Capitol are walking free, emboldened for the future. At least two have already broken the law again.
🚨 **Homeland Security stepping back from fighting disinformation** – DHS Secretary Kristi Noem made clear that countering election lies isn’t a priority anymore - and Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene spread misinformation to try and discredit the agency’s important past work in pushing back against propaganda from our foreign adversaries.
🚨 **False claims about our elections will continue** – We know the playbook: Attack mail-in voting, cast doubt on the results before Election Day, and refuse to accept reality when they lose.
🚨 **On Day One on the job, Attorney General Pam Bondi disbanded** a critical FBI task force on foreign influence. This decision could make our democracy less safe.
**That’s why we must act now.**
[**This week, I need 250 people to chip in any amount to ensure we have the resources to push back against these lies. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Why the Left is terrified
body:
Simply put, Democrats are terrified of the TRUTH.
Simply put, Democrats are terrified of the TRUTH.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtu6jAQhp_G3hF5xnEMCy-4KOeoFRelqtouHTsBoxjnRlLevoLSbGe-mf_Tr31dufKmiFwRxJOzHUEkfEkQm6_Rt9ezf_0322egZ02y8-K-xfUTHXCCL0Z_bpdvh8V5veq2Tejrj-9mgAnvb3Uxwc_QqPDaVfep3FCreGlZTAsFki-4TBhKelKl0KWAXBQ5zBmgKDnXhnELwK2NkwV1ChkKhoAgxFzMIx2zPJfAY2CJQWZJzB45kfZF64yGrh9124bgIxM8rdSp7-vuIZYSTMc2RJerqYpr93tmgieYPpUJpgPBNPsv7PGlTLId4emjNL6x-1X2fvDB0lbZenRV5bpEkpgd_97QQeFPAAAA__9PS26P)

| [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j81ymzAUhZ9G7MxIV394oUUchi5aN5l0kXaVuUhyLA8CLIRp3r6Dh3r73e_OOQfj2IXTlyH6QADOwU0EgPAnAnD9s8Q0X-L3b7uXN4a7q_oZ5XqF5029wUPuLf4-Pv163V-eD9PxOuTx_e_1xh56_hr9Q95CSx8xdCvVdeEMPzkqCm-Y5nuuFQVdnA1T6CW27V610ioQmlYeQWiBikJ1aotggIKkwIBJWcmqREHbVjMuGFUWqCOC3nNKjD4Fi2zKC6Y0DLG0Qyw6c855nO7FGgLN5O2cfLmEPnm3GgSa7DHuLkNy2BNo5F5UYAWVDk9oWbX-8WbO8cNiHDF89oTXWylGQK2X6F2YI-H1NvkOs08rWtJ_axrmZD3h9dv7x2Fjduiz7zPh9cuP42uRjBuX0HVhUpoI-nlftu64GfgXAAD__-pwjAY)
---
Patriot,
---
Are you loving President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency? Because I certainly am.
---
_Thanks to Elon Musk’s audit of the federal government, the American public is finally learning the full extent of the government’s corruption, waste, and inefficiency._
---
But the same can’t be said for the Democrats, who are having a meltdown over DOGE’s discoveries – and that’s putting it mildly. I’ve never seen them this angry.
---
**Watching the Democrats panic, you’d think our country was on the brink of collapse!**
---
So, what is the Left so darn afraid of?
---
_...The _TRUTH_._
---
Let that sink in: **Democrats and the media are revolting against President Trump because he’s taken an axe to the federal government and split it wide open to expose what’s been going on behind the curtain without your knowledge**.
---
_The same political party that hired 80,000 IRS agents to target hardworking taxpaying citizens is now terrified that YOU are finally getting access to the uncensored truth._
---
_Look, President Trump and I both ran on a promise to drain the swamp. But when you drain a swamp, you see, for the very first time, all the venomous creatures that had been lurking at the bottom._
---
And that’s what’s happening right now: The more that gets exposed, the more the Democrats will fight us tooth and nail.
---
**But so long as President Trump and I have the FULL BACKING of the AMERICAN PEOPLE, we will prevail against any attack the Democrats throw at us.**
---
_So, as the attacks from the Democrats and the media are on the rise, please take my public opinion survey:_
---
**Do you support President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency?**
---

[YES](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j81ymzAUhZ9G7MxIV394oUUchi5aN5l0kXaVuUhyLA8CLIRp3r6Dh3r73e_OOQfj2IXTlyH6QADOwU0EgPAnAnD9s8Q0X-L3b7uXN4a7q_oZ5XqF5029wUPuLf4-Pv163V-eD9PxOuTx_e_1xh56_hr9Q95CSx8xdCvVdeEMPzkqCm-Y5nuuFQVdnA1T6CW27V610ioQmlYeQWiBikJ1aotggIKkwIBJWcmqREHbVjMuGFUWqCOC3nNKjD4Fi2zKC6Y0DLG0Qyw6c855nO7FGgLN5O2cfLmEPnm3GgSa7DHuLkNy2BNo5F5UYAWVDk9oWbX-8WbO8cNiHDF89oTXWylGQK2X6F2YI-H1NvkOs08rWtJ_axrmZD3h9dv7x2Fjduiz7zPh9cuP42uRjBuX0HVhUpoI-nlftu64GfgXAAD__-pwjAY)
---

[NO](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j81ymzAUhZ9G7MxIV394oUUchi5aN5l0kXaVuUhyLA8CLIRp3r6Dh3r73e_OOQfj2IXTlyH6QADOwU0EgPAnAnD9s8Q0X-L3b7uXN4a7q_oZ5XqF5029wUPuLf4-Pv163V-eD9PxOuTx_e_1xh56_hr9Q95CSx8xdCvVdeEMPzkqCm-Y5nuuFQVdnA1T6CW27V610ioQmlYeQWiBikJ1aotggIKkwIBJWcmqREHbVjMuGFUWqCOC3nNKjD4Fi2zKC6Y0DLG0Qyw6c855nO7FGgLN5O2cfLmEPnm3GgSa7DHuLkNy2BNo5F5UYAWVDk9oWbX-8WbO8cNiHDF89oTXWylGQK2X6F2YI-H1NvkOs08rWtJ_axrmZD3h9dv7x2Fjduiz7zPh9cuP42uRjBuX0HVhUpoI-nlftu64GfgXAAD__-pwjAY)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j81ymzAUhZ9G7MxIV394oUUchi5aN5l0kXaVuUhyLA8CLIRp3r6Dh3r73e_OOQfj2IXTlyH6QADOwU0EgPAnAnD9s8Q0X-L3b7uXN4a7q_oZ5XqF5029wUPuLf4-Pv163V-eD9PxOuTx_e_1xh56_hr9Q95CSx8xdCvVdeEMPzkqCm-Y5nuuFQVdnA1T6CW27V610ioQmlYeQWiBikJ1aotggIKkwIBJWcmqREHbVjMuGFUWqCOC3nNKjD4Fi2zKC6Y0DLG0Qyw6c855nO7FGgLN5O2cfLmEPnm3GgSa7DHuLkNy2BNo5F5UYAWVDk9oWbX-8WbO8cNiHDF89oTXWylGQK2X6F2YI-H1NvkOs08rWtJ_axrmZD3h9dv7x2Fjduiz7zPh9cuP42uRjBuX0HVhUpoI-nlftu64GfgXAAD__-pwjAY)

name: Team Jay
subject: Can we add you to our team?
body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]

Hi there, it’s Jay Jones’ campaign team.

We’re hard at work reaching Virginians in every part of the Commonwealth to talk about why Jay Jones is the best choice to serve as Attorney General, and we wanted to share just a few of those reasons with you!

But if you already know YOUR reasons for backing Jay, would you take a moment to make a special contribution to his campaign today? You’ll help us reach more Virginians with our message! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

DONATE NOW → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

Folks, here are three powerful reasons why we need to elect Jay in November:

1) Since Roe v. Wade was overturned, over half of the states have placed serious restrictions or outright bans on abortion care – and Gov. Youngkin is trying to severely curtail the availability of abortion services in Virginia. Our current Attorney General, Jason Miyares, supports Youngkin’s efforts.

But Jay Jones is a firm believer in reproductive freedom – which is why he serves on Virginia Planned Parenthood’s board. Jay would make sure all Virginians have the ability to choose the reproductive outcomes that work best for them and their families.

2) A lifelong resident of Hampton Roads, Jay is committed to making Virginia the best place to live. As a Delegate, Jay fought to increase pay for our hardworking educators, increase the minimum wage, and expand Medicaid. As Attorney General, Jay will continue to put Virginians’ interests at the front of every decision he makes.

3) Jay comes from a family of civil rights leaders – and, like them, a commitment to equality and justice guides Jay . As Attorney General, Jay will ensure that wrongful conviction claims are investigated thoroughly and fairly, and he’ll work to modernize our state’s legal code to guarantee no discriminatory language impacts Virginians’ experiences with the legal system.

Jason Miyares, on the other hand, gutted the Attorney General’s office responsible for looking into wrongful conviction cases and fired several of his office’s civil rights attorneys when he took office.
If those reasons were convincing, and you agree that Virginia needs Jay, please chip in whatever you can spare today to support his campaign. It’s going to be a long fight to replace Jason Miyares, so we need you to give us the resources we’ll need to win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=100]
DONATE $200 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=200]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

clean_body: jayjones.com [jayjones.com] Hi there, it’s Jay Jones’ campaign team. We’re hard at work reaching Virginians in every part of the Commonwealth to talk about why Jay Jones is the best choice to serve as Attorney General, and we wanted to share just a few of those reasons with you! But if you already know YOUR reasons for backing Jay, would you take a moment to make a special contribution to his campaign today? You’ll help us reach more Virginians with our message! [] DONATE NOW → [] Folks, here are three powerful reasons why we need to elect Jay in November: 1) Since Roe v. Wade was overturned, over half of the states have placed serious restrictions or outright bans on abortion care – and Gov. Youngkin is trying to severely curtail the availability of abortion services in Virginia. Our current Attorney General, Jason Miyares, supports Youngkin’s efforts. But Jay Jones is a firm believer in reproductive freedom – which is why he serves on Virginia Planned Parenthood’s board. Jay would make sure all Virginians have the ability to choose the reproductive outcomes that work best for them and their families. 2) A lifelong resident of Hampton Roads, Jay is committed to making Virginia the best place to live. As a Delegate, Jay fought to increase pay for our hardworking educators, increase the minimum wage, and expand Medicaid. As Attorney General, Jay will continue to put Virginians’ interests at the front of every decision he makes. 3) Jay comes from a family of civil rights leaders – and, like them, a commitment to equality and justice guides Jay . As Attorney General, Jay will ensure that wrongful conviction claims are investigated thoroughly and fairly, and he’ll work to modernize our state’s legal code to guarantee no discriminatory language impacts Virginians’ experiences with the legal system. Jason Miyares, on the other hand, gutted the Attorney General’s office responsible for looking into wrongful conviction cases and fired several of his office’s civil rights attorneys when he took office. If those reasons were convincing, and you agree that Virginia needs Jay, please chip in whatever you can spare today to support his campaign. It’s going to be a long fight to replace Jason Miyares, so we need you to give us the resources we’ll need to win. name: Bill Gray
subject: A tough question
body:
Get “The Great Principles of Chemistry” on DVD

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9690f6fa37134e8fa83ac0d28b2d63e4&_e=7DLGiVE1hDC079aXo4b1kMubgfVhMq4OhTdBQtRTBcN34Vh2pL4YJVU6yszXnZZOEpQEpAxnAvDy9e9kY40VnrvZQvv5zc9tnoQExt1deX9kiOru8XoXoGJOkaBwrnEkOFXCL5oHh_EqD4lSTjm7wjPwu1ekqozjqigeiZ31Ft-addkumH1Kky75fmHLyoVUQZMuL2F8U6aygv-_a0cSVvedtAdJ9aTGvpk4dvsJD5vooENfO_sOMUVvxCOhUCtCLJyYZWlYjbzuB6B_mSoiMK0ykWLq0XSOGJJXNCLQe65tEbRnKuAHRFnA9XlHWi_nwrykfyJxdDUA91TXwgQ80Vhj1_V6hKf3XUqJ4PjAHCq9Kzg8ReirMhblpGeTvnKtgTP0NfP3-m1Vpfa7phAPjGPg3RDUChMjDkx4u00FeZk%3D)
---
| | Peter,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9690f6fa37134e8fa83ac0d28b2d63e4&_e=7DLGiVE1hDC079aXo4b1kMubgfVhMq4OhTdBQtRTBcN34Vh2pL4YJVU6yszXnZZOEpQEpAxnAvDy9e9kY40VnrvZQvv5zc9tnoQExt1deX9kiOru8XoXoGJOkaBwrnEkOFXCL5oHh_EqD4lSTjm7wjPwu1ekqozjqigeiZ31Ft-addkumH1Kky75fmHLyoVUQZMuL2F8U6aygv-_a0cSVvedtAdJ9aTGvpk4dvsJD5vooENfO_sOMUVvxCOhUCtCLJyYZWlYjbzuB6B_mSoiMOFgOFTHVzTJJtNOIyFeZZjlU8D6pMtOkFPWcoUS_fSltxL5s9AWt_NYe5KMAO_z9uzLRJNMyV0H5MLpO-L014OH16E7Uv73S0E9oHVXKb1KjDAL1avKKp9zLGPoXVe1GAZhv6P_qDNDiLtiRKxleUQ%3D)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=9690f6fa37134e8fa83ac0d28b2d63e4&_t=z0wFao3DqGtc_qeHgLlScfabszcy4Rk4sc6_XjqOdhvzDmhbGOO3_yn2gv9GsByg7g0ZdbJl_iiaxKEFcPqsQlE9qOHugCPnELHsi2NoxHqv7ZZQDZJJ1Sq3U_3n3xln)

**While Florida faces real challenges** —rising insurance costs, attacks on public education, and threats to our democracy—**Republicans in our state legislature are wasting time on symbolic nonsense.** Their latest move? A bill to rename the Gulf of Mexico as the "Gulf of America" in state laws. _Yes, you read that right._ This is Gay Valimont, candidate for FL-1, and concerned Floridian and American. The government my district adheres to is more concerned with renaming a body of water instead of addressing real issues, **and YOU can help me fight back today in order to address real concerns.**

**It’s no secret the GOP is in a rough position: listen to Trump or face repercussions. clean_body: I’m going to cut out the B.S. and get right to the point. | Fellow American, I’m going to cut out the B.S. and get right to the point. > Do you want to see all of Pres. Trump’s cabinet nominees confirmed? > Do you want to stop Democrats from derailing Pres. Trump’s agenda in the Senate? If your answer is yes to either of those questions, Senate Democrats are waging an unprecedented deception campaign to block President Trump’s nominees and defy the will of the voters. If they flip another Senate seat, they will have a free pass to obstruct President Trump’s legislative agenda. Support from grassroots Republicans like you Fellow American, is integral to fighting back against the lies Democrats are circulating on social media and the mainstream press. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Why the Left is terrified
body:
Simply put, Democrats are terrified of the TRUTH.

Simply put, Democrats are terrified of the TRUTH.
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/uV5is7t7LlF645jxEdu5fC_we2igdqGmlyum3P2vcleor3cG0wpa9XTySE9hHlFQMVN58zvBW3M6QifO73H_iCqGHTbkgCWd3xKKL7lPxC5eZ-UXCQUKye167e7OcyoWFpfq2orhVF2tBo3UlJ-wyzj7timLlQP7avXBDFa7iD0cRSET7Dy2qoAt6bk-7_0dIHWhIxBmjpI-zb3Xqp4_wXoBu2znexi9Nh9AeiL--8LA8PDmf4Qmk8NomAZYI71s_1ZvcPXUWDHRuENoskYCrTEb1hbfaAVW1kbOD3qcWeFCO--gRh6BK4yAcY8Iz-yiO60zEO0Yg1ScYFQFc6j5S-JYB9uF51rfJmiuTpE2ONnpdtt0z4JuBDCWoWHdNk35ytQXKaN0wM9nCQMP-St6-LLqkJT2W2qSDpDkjA/scoKDIF4kOMsyScm-U1WTPD8cG6ga8fa/6)
---
Friend,
---
Are you loving President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency? Because I certainly am.
---
_Thanks to Elon Musk’s audit of the federal government, the American public is finally learning the full extent of the government’s corruption, waste, and inefficiency._
---
But the same can’t be said for the Democrats, who are having a meltdown over DOGE’s discoveries – and that’s putting it mildly. I’ve never seen them this angry.
---
**Watching the Democrats panic, you’d think our country was on the brink of collapse!**
---
So, what is the Left so darn afraid of?
---
_...The _TRUTH_._
---
Let that sink in: **Democrats and the media are revolting against President Trump because he’s taken an axe to the federal government and split it wide open to expose what’s been going on behind the curtain without your knowledge**.
---
_The same political party that hired 80,000 IRS agents to target hardworking taxpaying citizens is now terrified that YOU are finally getting access to the uncensored truth._
---
_Look, President Trump and I both ran on a promise to drain the swamp. But when you drain a swamp, you see, for the very first time, all the venomous creatures that had been lurking at the bottom._
---
And that’s what’s happening right now: The more that gets exposed, the more the Democrats will fight us tooth and nail.
---
**But so long as President Trump and I have the FULL BACKING of the AMERICAN PEOPLE, we will prevail against any attack the Democrats throw at us.**
---
_So, as the attacks from the Democrats and the media are on the rise, please take my public opinion survey:_
---
**Do you support President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency?**
---

[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/medfqyKj80tUnnJ__FXUhcZgBQvficT46CTthfK13SvJnMnOvaaepJ2H5myZugLPRLI2BJcShV5MelVLlcjUvmCaCduvpZ_A9fsjL3HvxN7haK-zLIcWpqyZ6l4fQeK8RLsUsQ8wYYEBMKoEQbIPHdPGhl7HVBmQMhywrkbVbHMuu9jqqzPTV7wNGotcTXE5laNIzE89ECYp_rHN1DW4GRnJCX1lD9e6twKIN15XPuXOOaUdgqLInnS3HwoNa_kPtbnLbv8nD9vaG8cWUwUTE4M6OTh6X-8jYj0Ngk0C2M8VFMO6A72kpAYGAVPtQYIKrd3CEZe5Sd6Vu7uoEJK9dqLAmlx1HvLmBQWcx4nMuvmqlRnh-Z0AsdrOf2E_GVBsKAYqdhxj4S9GApPgZPyqwo8aX-1q6yHNBxBBWg/z1Aef29acaXJ9X2YH8k8aa41jWljXZpD/6)
---

[NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/k69PZhL3kIj9_K3sdsqdjsI3kfxjo6n3CoZv_JgHlS72hODFaC_1kleSAS99ITeJt2-ptcgupLohGj8-ErfHxj4pDIuC2b2XB8ssnaOKn1U3nTWIPCiGSaVQnLPQsytZ1O1iPHYXgeA90BGli2RucbNaNaEGlA6Ptw-D_46MVFoCAIOUj4KApjp8bUCOwDFStbdr6djijLo3Bgy8YKsWR-FOE-y18NcvvDoz2WCzShk7YtMnEVQ7xYbiXVzH0Hyux6bIA3Qat4MEYZhfttHmB4U5FebRiXn5Jymrp31NtkaK5FL1h3w-RWqWKndjznctgWeNiQ-vL8VEshcqeCtyib3D53Y-ClkZCXIT-Iwnt1M8BqrOTlTF2pAN33Nx_yPTJDu22MzC6belKvQsUCzCSJHuZvQCjink2OO4fQ/akAAq4ZRg9GQ-4IUmjanE-YN_M1FOGK4/6)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/szIH7jguZgF3n9Smhm7_bxGewjvBqj3RIes4vXYXs_ltcsdzIfGMJn4wsU-6-JWEyHSXqibbhyxPXPH978zHccchQCE2OKRW13jsP7JfErm35rO28qT-LVasbskqMDdrKk_4sKCi8X5-473lEHlrk8W4gKaC3xAde21fM_O5jJSEKOlr1ILDWQaRxDMPxt6ka07phVFDij0in5drIhuZw1G0HWXxRMSNwqLakPqfbqmbRhcgnJtOHAajFybNk72nw_5bPBIwL_VbZ8DWisgDdzglTRsxVVGFb1W0z8wWauKZS4PZt9Mx6zjdhZ6xIRbTchWFFuP_UKKIb4E4V3slKJFqqT7cdLdnrtQSBizSHBYpkJI-vfPyRkCTdZ-m5f1zrWjA4CAyEvH8hYZibCCATcbUtE6bEDzGQJgjJw/i1QufUUvup4sMgIG_6brGUOb4koHc4Ql/6)

clean_body: Simply put, Democrats are terrified of the TRUTH. Simply put, Democrats are terrified of the TRUTH. | Friend, Are you loving President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency? Because I certainly am. Thanks to Elon Musk’s audit of the federal government, the American public is finally learning the full extent of the government’s corruption, waste, and inefficiency. But the same can’t be said for the Democrats, who are having a meltdown over DOGE’s discoveries – and that’s putting it mildly. I’ve never seen them this angry. Watching the Democrats panic, you’d think our country was on the brink of collapse! So, what is the Left so darn afraid of? ...The TRUTH. Let that sink in: Democrats and the media are revolting against President Trump because he’s taken an axe to the federal government and split it wide open to expose what’s been going on behind the curtain without your knowledge. The same political party that hired 80,000 IRS agents to target hardworking taxpaying citizens is now terrified that YOU are finally getting access to the uncensored truth. Look, President Trump and I both ran on a promise to drain the swamp. But when you drain a swamp, you see, for the very first time, all the venomous creatures that had been lurking at the bottom. And that’s what’s happening right now: The more that gets exposed, the more the Democrats will fight us tooth and nail. But so long as President Trump and I have the FULL BACKING of the AMERICAN PEOPLE, we will prevail against any attack the Democrats throw at us. So, as the attacks from the Democrats and the media are on the rise, please take my public opinion survey: Do you support President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency? Thank you and God bless you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040 Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

I respectfully ask you to stop what you're doing and read this:

Karoline Leavitt - _President Trump 's excellent Press Secretary_ - is a devout Catholic and strong Conservative. She doesn't apologize for her beliefs. I admire her for that.

**Which is why it INFURIATES me that the Liberal Mob just launched a coordinated smear campaign against her.**
| | [HERE ARE THE DETAILS](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/badD77nVsYF_yVhypHtMvvfrgtm-GFmkBfOxaPcUiabs41u2cjtxKgZk8Hb99VmnzoGKNFZ1j2XXLrnbIVIjg0JnR6fcLX9C6okgYq9aX4rfdVvZ8rUh3obiBj7ZiNRVCalq8U76Mq6rcNjzZOJx07D2INoXXlSo0jTYoo3Q389d8WazoXrrCtJJ7N1rN4J_QR4FAYidZIXNuaZNilMhgpiS7UHf360OQvJVS4D1oxkNkfcMOS_Vuz67DztyvNc9kh_BZxy3fLPL-if2L948q0AyKhSV5mxq8jznN7BFcrJhSjWS6XFwEeg0eJRPb9Y_rUMub-q0l5yd0TR1PCjk2TIQs51R83GUedOhLkSN8LXtBO5cInhdOEB9KBQNVZMBXjCxg6d6p51LnoQFde-uF-capTOJLnfOW5H-eBifnckarVAcAeRKDvWQw_Zl9QkhsPw2b5Nk-dynPDmm-OHsxyUtEp0TW98q3cPFuisFx1v6DzwVMHw-Z9vvZ72mGYegzJS-Xw45srJ7LMXkNAhcLFYAByf4lgUiuoedDIriiQPu/NiiaQGbUA4CwuXqA-HyoZM5_GqQ0jMvX/6 "HERE ARE THE DETAILS")

* Joy Behar went on national TV claiming Karoline was only hired for her appearance
* A freshman House Member took to social media slamming her as "a Fake Christian"
* Salon ran a 2,000-word hit piece demeaning her first-ever White House press briefing
* CNN gave her a disgusting nickname, coining her as a "spinmeister"
* The Guardian published an article entitled: "Trump's press chief shows she's more than capable of going full North Korea"

Look,

We knew the Liberal Mob would come out in FULL FORCE against members of the Trump Administration...

The Liberal Mob thinks it can get away with anything. Liberals think no one will stand up to them.

_Will you stand with us?_

body:
The Democrats are losing their minds over this: |
---
Fellow Conservative,

The Democrats are __**losing their minds**__ over this:

[
](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=50171de756004630a604de2b136e052b&_e=at4iIWPYBFazEi58i8uMn56H6HeTE9Rq7fGETe09nRCJfAG4RoNLkhrifqbfjCrh4A5fAhTRA86G1VRzSwO1d7xnif83HIjXYPSv-8yGSMlwviBGPyCcqoYyocIxSrRCnwmVh5XkbmvevEGC4mHC4B1ETgWjbap7THwGwfYFvE-t3AurCTaSKo8uVO_IcMjSBpUovIulFTJZGxgZ0MiP7TEHJ6MVvZYwGbKP6EYrJX5QznB4RTlnVO_mk7QQ8oMLp2PFigYPF6uIUn12ADG7e2gjgUOLTIZjJRerGjFor-vooEyc6BaSac8OAtx___PvaN4GfF_fpiDBSrORY9-vFRbbUtMA7DkIw1ogQDP8ypCUSEu_TSdXeovcSsUzlNXXeoO5Hru5VaCDChjQ1tIseg%3D%3D)
**President Trump is doing exactly what he promised on the campaign trail: gutting the Deep State, draining the swamp, and Making America Great Again.**

The Left can’t stand it.

They can’t stand that their hidden woke agenda’s funding is being cut, federal workers are getting back to work, and we are making government smaller -- not bigger. It’s simple, Fellow Conservative:

name: Ron Wyden
subject: The most unqualified nominee for HHS I’ve seen
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
My Democratic colleagues and I are holding the floor to stand against Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
|
---
| | I’m about to head to the Senate floor where I’ll be leading Senate Democrats in holding the floor as long as possible ahead of the confirmation vote on Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. My Republican colleagues may have caved to MAGA bullying and allowed him to advance through committee, but nothing changes the fact that **Kennedy is the least-qualified, most dangerous nominee for Health and Human Services Secretary I've seen in all my years in Congress.** Americans are already feeling the impact of the Trump administration's freezes on medical research and assaults on public health infrastructure. **Kennedy will be nothing more than a lapdog for this very same dangerous agenda.** The public needs to be aware of the stakes and consequences of this moment — and Senate Republicans must be ready to own the disastrous consequences when they confirm Kennedy. To the final minute and final roll call, we are not backing down from this fight. More soon, _Ron_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102001686/527767634/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOThkOWFhMi02MWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KWMT5D1SFJLM1lSVITj0GAXVJhIKMdpInp_7N_7-Dp4=&emci=4a86fce6-5ee9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=098d9aa2-61e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9818364)
---

Yesterday, I pressed Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. — Trump's nominee for Secretary of Health and Human Services — about his long and disturbing history of peddling and profiting off of anti-vaccine and anti-science conspiracy theories. He refused to take any accountability and gave me zero reassurance that he no longer holds these dangerous views.
He couldn't answer basic questions such as, "Is measles deadly?" He failed to clarify his role in one of the most deadly measles outbreaks in recent history in Samoa. **Every dodge and weave made it all the more clear that he's deeply unqualified — and a truly reckless pick — to run our nation's health care systems.**
It was equally alarming to see Kennedy struggle to grasp essential details of programs such as Medicare and Medicaid. In the wake of millions of Americans' health care being put in jeopardy by Donald Trump's reckless attempt to freeze federal funds earlier this week, the last thing we can afford is an HHS secretary _who doesn't even understand the job he's nominated to do._
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102001687/527767635/-2044921950?refcode=2025-02-12-rfk&recurring=yes&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=098d9aa2-61e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOThkOWFhMi02MWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KWMT5D1SFJLM1lSVITj0GAXVJhIKMdpInp_7N_7-Dp4=)_
RFK Jr. made clear he is unqualified and untrustworthy to be our nation's health care chief, and will not push back on Trump and Republicans' plans to rip health care away from millions of Americans and put insurance and drug companies back in the driver's seat of our health care.
Our nation and its people deserve so, so much better, and I remain laser-focused on pushing back against any plan that doesn't improve care and bring down costs for families.
_Ron_

Kennedy, Jr. | | | I’m about to head to the Senate floor where I’ll be leading Senate Democrats in holding the floor as long as possible ahead of the confirmation vote on Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. My Republican colleagues may have caved to MAGA bullying and allowed him to advance through committee, but nothing changes the fact that Kennedy is the least-qualified, most dangerous nominee for Health and Human Services Secretary I've seen in all my years in Congress. Americans are already feeling the impact of the Trump administration's freezes on medical research and assaults on public health infrastructure. Kennedy will be nothing more than a lapdog for this very same dangerous agenda. The public needs to be aware of the stakes and consequences of this moment — and Senate Republicans must be ready to own the disastrous consequences when they confirm Kennedy. To the final minute and final roll call, we are not backing down from this fight. More soon, Ron Forwarded Message | Yesterday, I pressed Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. — Trump's nominee for Secretary of Health and Human Services — about his long and disturbing history of peddling and profiting off of anti-vaccine and anti-science conspiracy theories. He refused to take any accountability and gave me zero reassurance that he no longer holds these dangerous views. He couldn't answer basic questions such as, "Is measles deadly?" He failed to clarify his role in one of the most deadly measles outbreaks in recent history in Samoa. Every dodge and weave made it all the more clear that he's deeply unqualified — and a truly reckless pick — to run our nation's health care systems. It was equally alarming to see Kennedy struggle to grasp essential details of programs such as Medicare and Medicaid. In the wake of millions of Americans' health care being put in jeopardy by Donald Trump's reckless attempt to freeze federal funds earlier this week, the last thing we can afford is an HHS secretary who doesn't even understand the job he's nominated to do. = RFK Jr. made clear he is unqualified and untrustworthy to be our nation's health care chief, and will not push back on Trump and Republicans' plans to rip health care away from millions of Americans and put insurance and drug companies back in the driver's seat of our health care. Our nation and its people deserve so, so much better, and I remain laser-focused on pushing back against any plan that doesn't improve care and bring down costs for families. Did you catch Good Morning America, team?
NextGen’s President, Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez, just exposed the GOP’s opposition to the rule of law!
After spending the first few weeks of the new administration signing insane executive orders and slashing funding to critical government programs, Trump and Elon Musk were ordered by federal judges to halt some of their most egregious actions. **But JD Vance doesn’t think the courts should tell the president not to dismantle our democracy.**

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Trump’s “jokes” about a third term are not funny.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Donald Trump wasted no time after winning a second term to start urging his Republican allies in Congress to “do something” that would allow him to serve a third term in 2028. And his MAGA lackeys listened. **Three days after Donald Trump’s inauguration, Rep. Andy Ogles (R-TN) introduced a resolution to change the 22nd Amendment to allow Donald Trump to serve a _third term_ as president.** This is exactly what we expected from a man who said he would be “a dictator on day one.” Trump’s Republican lackeys in the House of Representatives are doing his bidding and trying to change the rules. And Trump is rewarding them: a few days later, public reports indicated that the Trump DOJ had dropped a criminal investigation into a non-existent $320,000 “loan” Ogles made to his campaign. Back in November, Republicans brushed off his comment about a third term as a “joke.” But I know that Trump’s “jokes” are never actually jokes. Instead, it’s his way of floating trial balloons that sycophantic Republicans rush to support before the idea is normalized. But I’m not waiting for the same formula to play out. Instead, just a few days after his “joke,” I introduced a resolution reaffirming that the 22nd Amendment prohibits any president — _including Donald Trump_ — from serving more than two terms. **[If you can, please chip in to help me stop Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans from changing the Constitution to make Trump a dictator>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102002810/527770681/-585077023?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTViMTRmZS02MmU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xi0z7M4s7aVmbd6J7JsUhVWNY3nvuxeb_WR0uudRiIo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102002811/527770682/-585077023?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTViMTRmZS02MmU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xi0z7M4s7aVmbd6J7JsUhVWNY3nvuxeb_WR0uudRiIo=)

clean_body: | Peter, Donald Trump wasted no time after winning a second term to start urging his Republican allies in Congress to “do something” that would allow him to serve a third term in 2028. And his MAGA lackeys listened. Three days after Donald Trump’s inauguration, Rep. Andy Ogles (R-TN) introduced a resolution to change the 22nd Amendment to allow Donald Trump to serve a third term as president. This is exactly what we expected from a man who said he would be “a dictator on day one.” Trump’s Republican lackeys in the House of Representatives are doing his bidding and trying to change the rules. And Trump is rewarding them: a few days later, public reports indicated that the Trump DOJ had dropped a criminal investigation into a non-existent $320,000 “loan” Ogles made to his campaign. Back in November, Republicans brushed off his comment about a third term as a “joke.” But I know that Trump’s “jokes” are never actually jokes. Instead, it’s his way of floating trial balloons that sycophantic Republicans rush to support before the idea is normalized. But I’m not waiting for the same formula to play out. Instead, just a few days after his “joke,” I introduced a resolution reaffirming that the 22nd Amendment prohibits any president — including Donald Trump — from serving more than two terms. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me in support of the Constitution, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Get a 2025 member card delivered straight to your door:
body:
---
Derek, **This moment demands a strong Democratic Party, and we’re asking for your help to keep building it.** But before we ask you to add a contribution to claim your very own 2025 member card, we wanted to send you a note about the contributions we received at the DNC last cycle and share a bit about how that money has been spent. [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025-member-card?refcode=em_20250212_2773_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2773_22930333_9D1nsc&akid=2773%2E22930333%2E9D1nsc) From data, tech, and cybersecurity to human resources and operations, the DNC methodically invested early in state party infrastructure last year. These investments helped lay the groundwork for critical Senate wins in states like Wisconsin, Arizona, Michigan, and Nevada. It helped make key local, congressional, and ballot-measure wins possible across the country. In states where Democrats came up short, Trump and his allies had some of the narrowest wins EVER recorded. That’s why as a key member of this grassroots team, your support right now could not be more important. By getting your very own member card, you’re sending a powerful message that you’re ready to keep building the strongest possible Democratic Party, invest in state parties all over the country, win key statewide races in states like New Jersey and Virginia this year, win back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028. **That's how we'll use that $3 contribution we're asking you to make today. What do you say?** [**Can you donate $3 today to reserve your member card and get it delivered to your door?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025-member-card?amount=3&refcode=em_20250212_2773_fr&refcode2=2773_22930333_9D1nsc&akid=2773%2E22930333%2E9D1nsc) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025-member-card?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250212_2773_fr&refcode2=2773_22930333_9D1nsc&akid=2773%2E22930333%2E9D1nsc)**

The Democrats

subject: My thoughts on Tulsi Gabbard’s confirmation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102003343/527771932/-549350672?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GabbardVote_250212_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc3Njg0MC02M2U5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqJaaQva2PauIeYsSo4PGIIYJVjlEEDNVMzkNIHky_8=) Wow, Derek.

The GOP-controlled Senate voted to confirm Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence. To say I’m disappointed would be an understatement.

I worked tirelessly across the aisle to strike a bipartisan consensus on Gabbard. I thought my GOP colleagues would join me in recognizing the seriousness of this job and that they’d do what was right for our country’s safety and security. Instead, they ignored Gabbard’s questionable past and lack of experience and voted for her.

We need more Democrats in the Senate, Derek. Full stop. It couldn’t be more clear that Republicans will turn a blind eye to what’s right for our country in the name of party politics.

[_**So I’m asking: will you chip in anything you can today to support my re-election campaign and flip the Senate blue in 2026?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102003344/527771933/-549350672?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GabbardVote_250212_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc3Njg0MC02M2U5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqJaaQva2PauIeYsSo4PGIIYJVjlEEDNVMzkNIHky_8=)

Thank you. I really appreciate your support.

Mark Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102003345/527771934/-549350672?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GabbardVote_250212_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjc3Njg0MC02M2U5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqJaaQva2PauIeYsSo4PGIIYJVjlEEDNVMzkNIHky_8=)****

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I voted NO on Tulsi Gabbard’s confirmation just now - here’s what you need to know.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Folks, Tulsi Gabbard has officially been confirmed as our Director of National Intelligence.
I voted no, and I want to talk briefly about why:
The safety of America’s communities and our national securities are my top priority, as they should be for any senator.
With that in mind, I simply could not support Tulsi Gabbard’s nomination to this role — one of the principal advisors to the President on national security matters.
The Director of National Intelligence is trusted to safeguard our nation’s most sensitive secrets and leads 18 intelligence agencies composed of men and women who have devoted their lives to the security of the United States.
Tulsi Gabbard is not the right person to hold this position — especially as we face rising threats from China, Russia, Iran, and other bad actors around the world.
Gabbard has praised Vladimir Putin and Bashar al-Assad. She supported Edward Snowden. I held, and still hold, serious questions about her ability to do this job.
All of that is why I, along with every one of my Democratic colleagues, cast a definitive NO vote on her confirmation.
But there’s something else that is of great significance and concern: Many of my Republican colleagues shared my concerns — and expressed deep reservations behind closed doors about Tulsi Gabbard holding this position.
By confirming her to this post, we are shown yet another example of the GOP inability to stand up to President Trump — even in defense of our national security.
When faced with this reality — leaders who are unwilling to put America first, continued evidence of extremism taking root, downright chaos — I know it can be easy to feel disheartened.
But right now, more than ever before, we must continue to speak out together about the failures of the Trump Administration and the Republican congressional majority.
Our resistance does matter. Our activism does matter. I will continue to do everything in my power to protect Virginians and Americans, and I hope you’re with me. Please add your name today to say you’re still in the fight. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jZXW8i8SQkiDxAQYwStUqg2]
Thank you for reading, and for standing with me.
-Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]

Williamsburg, VA 23185

ATTN: Fellow Patriot,
---
Now that Elon Musk is running an audit of the federal government, the Deep State’s corruption is finally being EXPOSED...
---
**A report reveals that in 2019 – while I was serving as President Trump’s attorney – the USAID allegedly spent _$20 MILLION_ on a Soros-backed operation to dig up dirt on me and bury me alive.**
---
This is just a glimpse of what the Deep State has tried to do to destroy me _and_ President Trump.
---
And unfortunately, the fight isn’t over.
---
_I am facing bogus CRIMINAL CHARGES in the state of Arizona – where President Trump is PROHIBITED from saving me with a PARDON!_
---
And if fighting the Mafia taught me anything, it’s that when villains get exposed, they don’t run – they dig their heels in _deeper_!
---
It’s honestly a miracle that after everything done to me and President Trump, not even an assassin’s bullet could end our movement.
---
I have to believe that miracle comes from God. But it also comes from the generous support given by kind souls like YOU, who’ve helped me prevail time and time again.
---
_Now, I’m asking for your support once again to win this pardon-proof criminal case so that I can FINALLY live as a FREE MAN!_

name: VoteVets
subject: Dork Vader is in control (but not for long)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Elon Musk ain’t the boss. He has no real power. He’s incredibly unpopular. And if we dial up the pressure, we can FIRE ELON.
#
Take a look at this, Peter.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250212-1-f&t=1&akid=34159%2E3013755%2E4dQOh0)
The “power behind the power” presidential element isn’t a new concept.
Most recently, in the George W. Bush administration, it was Dick Cheney. The list is long.
But take a look at that picture. Trump is sitting at the Resolute Desk, sure. But Elon Musk — **Dork Vader himself** — is the one in control. And if you watch the video of the press conference that this picture is from you will know that to be true.
Trump turned the entire presser over to Elon Musk, and Musk more or less called for the elimination of judicial review and the federal court’s role in restricting the actions of the White House.
We know why. Elon Musk is stripping the wires out of the federal government, in violation of the Constitution, dismantling Congressionally authorized and appropriated federal agencies, laying off staff, slashing grants, programs, and more. Circumventing and breaking the law, enriching himself, cutting benefits for Veterans and Military Families, and making our nation less safe.
Elon has been ordered repeatedly by federal courts to stop what he is doing and follow the law. He has proven himself either unwilling or incapable of following those orders. Billions in federal funding and grants continue to be frozen. USAID workers continue to be furloughed. The list goes on.
This is not approaching, or verging on a Constitutional Crisis. **This _IS_ a Constitutional Crisis. **
The richest man on earth — an unelected, unaccountable billionaire operating in near total secrecy — is running the country. But this is the important thing here: **Elon Musk ain’t the boss. He has no real power. He is incredibly unpopular. And if we dial up the pressure, we can FIRE ELON.**
Every Veteran swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. We will not break that oath. VoteVets is going to fight Elon Musk tooth and nail for as long as we have to — and we need you with us.
**[$5 might not seem much against the richest man on earth, but if everybody reading this chips in it’ll add up real fast. So, we’re asking you to donate $5 or whatever you can to VoteVets today. We’ll put it to good use fighting Musk and his goons.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250212-1-f&t=2&akid=34159%2E3013755%2E4dQOh0)

If this was a normal month, we’d be on track to hit our objective. Unfortunately, because we lose two days in February we’re running just behind our fundraising target. We calculated we need to raise an extra, $603.00 in the next 24 hours to get back on track. We need to keep this seat off-limits to Hakeem Jeffries and House Democrats to prevent them from expanding the Democrats’ map for November. These fundraising targets are the clearest signs to Dem leadership that we have the support needed to wage an aggressive defense of our Majority. We need fortify this seat so we can focus 100% of our resources and attention on securing battleground seats. Thank you, Dr. Greg Murphy P.S. We’re only $603 short of our objective. A major contribution of $250 or more from just a couple of donors will push us over the top. | | Paid for by friends to elect Dr. Greg Murphy to Congress Murphy for Congress P.O. clean_body: | | = Peter, Donald Trump’s tariffs will hurt Pennsylvania families. He says other countries will pay, but that’s not true. These tariffs are extra taxes on American businesses when they buy goods from other countries. And those businesses pass the cost to regular people like us. Pennsylvanians are already struggling with high prices, and now Trump is making it worse.And this time, he’s going after steel. For the first time since the "pandemic," the Idaho Senate has moved [an anti-mask mandate bill](https://substack.com/redirect/df37fa1a-e9d4-4e56-816a-a7210b6cbf85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the Senate floor for final debate.
This is HUGE news for Idaho, and long overdue.
**Watch my opening debate:**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0cb239a7-ca64-4ab3-9fe2-0e8143a88bce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Watch my closing remarks:**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/72c8453a-c52b-4ee7-9c76-f739142c0498?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Only two more steps exist: passing the Senate floor, and a signature from our Governor.
**Please email the Senate State Affairs Committee thanking them for pushing this vital piece of legislation closer to the finish line:**
**[Sen. Treg A. Bernt](https://substack.com/redirect/62dd1d67-6e4c-4969-94e1-2d680a60d2af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Children today have it tough, between grades, drugs, alcohol--and apparently, the threat of child marriage. This isn't hyperbole. To this day in 2025, thousands of children are forced into child marriage in the United States--and Republicans seem to want to keep it that way. With several thousand documented child marriages every single year--some involving as children as young as 10--we need need legislative solutions and penalties for those who exploit children. But where do we begin?
**Let 's Address This.**
**Earnest Ask!** I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join 115,000+ fellow activists.**

Passers-by are stunned by a social experiment stunt held in New York to highlight child marriage _(YouTube) via The Independent_
## How Widespread Is Child Marriage in America?
Despite widespread condemnation and international treaties against it, child marriage continues in the United States unabated. As reported in numerous outlets including the Washington Post and [The Independent](https://substack.com/redirect/24adfcdf-9ca8-4030-bd21-1c6dd280ef1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> At least 207,468 minors married in the US between 2000 and 2015, according to data compiled by Unchained At Last, a group campaigning to abolish [child marriage](https://substack.com/redirect/b66bd16f-87b8-4e88-a033-56c436f1e422?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and investigative documentary series Frontline. _The true figure is likely to be much higher because 10 states provided no or incomplete statistics._
> The youngest wedded were three 10-year-old girls in Tennessee who married men aged 24, 25 and 31 in 2001. The youngest groom was an 11-year-old who married a 27-year-old woman in the same state in 2006. Children as young as 12 were granted marriage licences in Alaska, Louisiana and South Carolina, while 11 other states allowed 13-year-olds to wed. More than 1,000 children aged 14 or under were granted marriage licences.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vwRoVYJAQCcN2RgrBMR9jOThtWji-MnWkmbfawMic2M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156922655)
And the problem persists. Unchained At Last conducted another study in 2021 and found _more than 300,000_ documented cases of child marriage, as reported by [Rolling Stone](https://substack.com/redirect/f0749567-2b78-4221-86c7-e4b45056cd4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> A [2021 study](https://substack.com/redirect/71243102-8c46-4878-9863-18731dd42121?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the advocacy group Unchained at Last found that 300,000 minors were married between 2000 and 2018 in the United States. According to the group, 60,000 of those marriages involved an age difference that would have otherwise been considered a sex crime.
Remember, this is yet incomplete data as 10 states do not adequately report this data. But there's yet another element of horror to this situation. In many states, children who are married cannot divorce--making child marriage a daunting one way ticket. As divorce lawyer [Nancy Zalusky Berg explains](https://substack.com/redirect/5941d348-aa40-447c-bcb6-3b84df1b10d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> A minor can't file for a divorce because they're not considered old enough to do it. That's because marriage is considered a contract, and most laws stipulate that only adults can enter into contracts. So, if a minor wants to change their marriage contract, they need an adult to help them do it.
## Who Is Perpetuating This Injustice?
Because while child marriage is a nationwide problem, Republican states lead the way. Nine of the top 10 states leading rates of child marriage are GOP run states. [They are as follows](https://substack.com/redirect/b4a53f91-ed02-4642-a33c-6bd655646788?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> 1\. Nevada (0.671%)
> 2\. Idaho (0.338%)
> 3\. Arkansas (0.295%)
> 4\. Kentucky (0.262%)
> 5\. Oklahoma (0.229%)
> 6\. Wyoming (0.227%)
> 7\. Utah (0.208%)
> 8\. Alabama (0.195%)
> 9\. West Virginia (0.193%)
> 10\. Mississippi (0.182%)
This epidemic persists under the radar, often defended and protected by lawmakers, particularly within the Republican Party, who cite tradition, religion, and a shocking misinterpretation of maturity and readiness. The latest absurd argument is that child marriage is better than abortion--notwithstanding that states that ban abortion also [suffer at least a 24% increase in maternal mortality](https://substack.com/redirect/793176cd-5274-4741-8c32-82b3df9444d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and have [the highest rate of infant mortality](https://substack.com/redirect/298d0dab-9aa3-4896-9d56-191224ddb033?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as well. Facts just aren't the Republican's thing--controlling women and children, is.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vwRoVYJAQCcN2RgrBMR9jOThtWji-MnWkmbfawMic2M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156922655)
West Virginia and Wyoming Republicans have also launched efforts to protect child marriage. And in New Hampshire, as recently as 2018, child marriage was legal for girls as young [as 13 and boys as young as 14](https://substack.com/redirect/a5668000-ce33-498e-b72a-f722fcd9be1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This is particularly concerning because about 86% of child marriages are of young girls to male adults. Worse, efforts to ban child marriage in New Hampshire faced opposition from legislators when 174 Republicans voted _against_ a bill to ban child marriage. One Republican lawmaker, State Representative Jess Edwards, described teen girls as "ripe and fertile,"--horrifying remarks that I address below:
Did not find video
Missouri tells a similar story, where Republicans continue to block attempts to raise the marriage age by arguing for "parental rights and traditional values," regardless of the immense harm to children. As reported by the [Missouri Independent](https://substack.com/redirect/01028f25-f1e8-4bae-8487-cb7c2d5c35eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The current law allows children aged 16 and 17 to marry with parental consent and younger children to marry with a judge's approval. Until the legislature voted to raise the minimum marriage age to 16 in 2018, Missouri had among the most [lenient](https://substack.com/redirect/c3f2b72f-4f6f-4cbd-bd2d-789c8c38f10a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) child marriage laws in the nation -- making it an especially popular state for [15-year-olds](https://substack.com/redirect/18bcfa39-663b-47a9-b872-008092ff50b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to travel to be married. Despite the 2018 change, Missouri law still does not align with international human rights standards, which set the minimum age at 18. [A]round 70 minors every year are entered into marriage in Missouri.
And the fact is, this hypocrisy extends beyond child marriage. The Republican Party, which often claims to champion the protection of children, also supports policies that endanger and undermine the well-being of minors. They are proponents of child labor laws, opponents of free school lunches for children, adversaries of the child tax credit, and critics of Medicaid expansion, which disproportionately benefits low-income children. I made this point in a [viral tweet](https://substack.com/redirect/366d37c2-0813-4db3-95ad-d42ad398ce4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), its virality indicating that many people see this hypocrisy for the cruel reality that it is.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f187a365-48f7-4186-8652-67cbda635a1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But surely there are international laws that ban child marriage, right? Well, it's sort of a good news/bad news situation.
The good news is yes, there are international laws and treaties that ban child marriage. For example, the Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination Against Women (CEDAW) calls for action to [specify a minimum marriage age of 18](https://substack.com/redirect/ecba3acf-f824-4068-87b0-bd9659ea09d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Therefore, any U.S. state law which forces minors into marriage is a de facto violation of CEDAW.
The tragic bad news is that while 186 of 193 countries have ratified the CEDAW treaty, the United States shamefully remains as one of only seven countries that has to date refused to ratify it. We join Iran, Sudan, Somalia, Nauru, Palau, and Tonga on this indefensible list. Therefore, CEDAW does not apply in the United States. Meanwhile, no Federal legislation exists to ban child marriage in the United States either.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..vwRoVYJAQCcN2RgrBMR9jOThtWji-MnWkmbfawMic2M?&gift=true)
## What Are The Solutions To This Injustice?
We need bipartisan unity to stop this injustice. For starters, this injustice further lays bare GOP hypocrisy on anti-Trans bills that they claim are designed to protect young girls--while they simultaneously openly support child marriage.
Moreover, all of the above notwithstanding, Democrats aren't off the hook either, and must do better. [As documented by UNICEF](https://substack.com/redirect/ecaaac62-4dea-4cc4-9a63-04dff23e924e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), only Connecticut, Delaware, Massachusetts, Michigan, Minnesota, New Jersey, New York, Pennsylvania, Rhode Island, Vermont, Washington, and now Virginia and New Hampshire just recently in 2024, have banned child marriage under the age of 18. That leaves 37 states where child marriage is still legal and recognized. It's long past time for change. Children forced into child marriages are often helpless, but we as adults, are not.
So what can you do?
The leading organization to help pass bans on child marriage is Unchained At Last. Visit their [website](https://substack.com/redirect/ae370f62-e1d6-4fa7-be06-a98a402af345?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), sign up for their newsletter, and if you can, contribute to their cause. Likewise, call upon your lawmakers to end this harmful practice and align with modern standards of human rights and dignity. We can do so by pressuring state lawmakers to ban child marriage on the state level, pressure federal lawmakers to pass national legislation banning child marriage (and let the Supremacy Clause quash all child marriage laws), and pressure the White House and Congress to ratify CEDAW and bring the United States up to speed with the vast majority of humanity.
Experts estimate that in 2024, roughly 50 minors were forced into a child marriage _every week_ in the United States, and that trend is expected to continue in 2025 unless something changes to ban this act. That number must come down to zero. It is critical we continue to speak up, create more awareness, and bring about this life saving change for human rights in the United States.
**Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

That number must come down to zero. It is critical we continue to speak up, create more awareness, and bring about this life saving change for human rights in the United States. Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

Yes, you read that correctly. **Donald Trump's efforts to completely eliminate the Department of Education have begun. **This is a campaign promise he made last fall, and now he is trying to make it a reality — **a move that would be absolutely _DISASTROUS_ for our country. **
Look, friend, we need the Department of Education. It plays a crucial role in funding public schools and making sure our students are learning at the appropriate pace and standards.
**Now more than ever, it's imperative that we stand up for this critical federal department and do everything in our power to STOP President Trump from dismantling it. That starts with grassroots activists like you speaking up TODAY.**

clean_body: Did you see this? | | | Did you see this, friend? ⬇️ | | Yes, you read that correctly. Donald Trump's efforts to completely eliminate the Department of Education have begun. This is a campaign promise he made last fall, and now he is trying to make it a reality — a move that would be absolutely DISASTROUS for our country. Look, friend, we need the Department of Education. It plays a crucial role in funding public schools and making sure our students are learning at the appropriate pace and standards. Now more than ever, it's imperative that we stand up for this critical federal department and do everything in our power to STOP President Trump from dismantling it. That starts with grassroots activists like you speaking up TODAY. Since you're a reliable Democrat in 43614, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand is counting on you to stand with us. So please, will you add your name to our petition before midnight tonight to help us protect the Department of Education? | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Save NPR via Our Revolution
subject: Breaking: New attacks on NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

🚨🚨Breaking news 🚨🚨: Trump and Musk’s vow to slash funding for our public
media just got even more real. Republicans in both the House and the
Senate are pushing forward bills to STOP all funding for NPR and PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21470?t=1011&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ][IMG]

With a $30 million budget shortfall that’s already forced NPR to lay off
staff and shut down podcasts, public media stations are not in a position
to launch a massive campaign to save themselves.

But we are. Republicans have come for public media before, and public
outcry has forced them to stand down. Now we need to do it again.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21470?source=email-02112025&t=1012&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]Our Revolution is already hard at work mobilizing record numbers and
unleashing a huge lobbying push on Congress. But to win this fight, we’re
going to need EVERYONE – will you add your name to send a message straight
to Congress to save NPR and PBS?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21470?source=email-02112025&t=1013&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]ADD YOUR NAME

It’s not surprising Republican members of Congress are piling on efforts
to wipe out public media. “NO MORE FUNDING FOR NPR, A TOTAL SCAM!” Trump
wrote on Truth Social last year. Musk is labeling public media as
“propaganda” and has clear plans to cut hundreds of millions in funding
for the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, which funds NPR and PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21470?t=1014&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ][IMG]Then the FCC launched formal ‘investigations’ into NPR and PBS...and
now Republicans in Congress are preparing a bill to COMPLETELY HALT
funding for the public media stations.

It’s completely outrageous, but to actually pass the bill, Republicans
will need almost unanimous support in Congress. This playbook had failed
before — so this is a fight we can win.

We’re going all out to raise the temperature and make sure they ALL hear
from thousands of constituents who believe in a public media so they know
that a ‘yes’ vote is a risk they don’t want to take ahead of the
midterms.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21470?source=email-02112025&t=1015&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]Will you urgently add your name?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-02112025.4WwBuf&t=1007&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-02112025.bTYGXj&t=1008&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-02112025.ropOoW&t=1009&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-02112025.M_0PYH&t=1010&akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7700%2E5885482%2ERkZOWU

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

While I've managed to fight back and win, the reality is that **Nevada is becoming increasingly attractive to Republicans with each new election cycle**. [**I represent Nevada’s most competitive congressional district, and Trump’s allies won’t hesitate to spend big in 2026 to unseat me and secure their majority in the House. Will you chip in to help us prepare for the flood of right-wing money that the GOP will pour in against me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102006677/527782449/670433136?refcode=EM_BNCC_LEE_250212_FR_GROUNDZERO_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWEyM2YyMC02OWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_2UmxsXM0E033PDuhUF92o-LWozWl-YBNASoPka07Q=) | | | [Chip in: Keep NV-03 Blue >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102006678/527782450/670433136?refcode=EM_BNCC_LEE_250212_FR_GROUNDZERO_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWEyM2YyMC02OWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_2UmxsXM0E033PDuhUF92o-LWozWl-YBNASoPka07Q=)

All eyes have been on Nevada the last few elections.
Democrats in battleground districts— _like mine_ —must show up strong in 2026 to reclaim the House majority and block Trump’s efforts to dismantle our progress.
Believe me: _This will be one of the most competitive elections in the country._
Democrats have always needed to stand united to win key races like mine, and this time is no different. That’s why I’m urgently asking for your support: [**Will you contribute to help defend NV-03 from Trump and his GOP allies, who are ready to do whatever it takes to flip Battleground Nevada?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102006679/527782451/670433136?refcode=EM_BNCC_LEE_250212_FR_GROUNDZERO_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWEyM2YyMC02OWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_2UmxsXM0E033PDuhUF92o-LWozWl-YBNASoPka07Q=)

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: RE: embarrassing loss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter,$7.53 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]

That’s how much a dozen eggs cost – despite Trump’s campaign promise to lower everyday expenses for our families.

$27,400,000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]

That’s how much cash on hand Trump has – and plans to give to every single MAGA Republican he can.

$5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]

That’s how much I need to rush resources to our Democrats, defeat MAGA Republicans running in THREE special elections, and build an economy that works for everyone.

I know $5 might not seem like much against Trump’s millions. But combined with thousands of other grassroots donations, your gift now is what will power our Democrats to win these special elections, defeat MAGA Republicans backed by Trump, and hand them an embarrassing loss. So please, Peter: Can I count on you to rush in $5? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]

Peter, let me set the scene for you:

I just blasted Trump during an Oversight Committee hearing for doing nothing while the costs of groceries continue to rise for working families like yours and mine.

As a Congressman, I made a sacred promise to prioritize your needs.

And that means working relentlessly to hold Trump accountable for his empty promises.

But I’ll be honest, Peter: I can’t do this alone – which is why I’m asking you again:

Will you do your part now? Please, if you’re able to, chip in $5 or whatever you can afford now to help me rush resources to Democrats running in critical special elections, hand Trump and his MAGA Republicans an embarrassing loss, and fight for working families everywhere. I’ve set a goal of raising another $1,624 online before midnight – and with your $5 now, I know we can hit our goal. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]

Chip in $5 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=5]
Chip in $19 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=19]
Chip in $24 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=24]
Chip in $50 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=50]
Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you for giving what you can, RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?refcode=footer]
Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
Friends of Raja for Congress
PO Box 681202
Schaumburg, IL 60168
United States

name: Josh Weil
subject: This race is Trump’s nightmare
