subject: [Sign] Fund our firefighters >>
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102011716/527798044/-2002425095?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVjZWVjOC03MWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jnI8N5xJDznbcI5QjJ-1_QiU_brbTlRCB9yvTkyTbC8=)
Peter,

This is an incredibly delicate moment for our democracy, and I’m doing all I can in Congress to stop the deluge of unconstitutional, unlawful activities we’re seeing from President Trump and his allies.

While we’ve had some success in stopping the blanket federal funding freeze, we need to keep pushing as we’re still seeing funding halts on crucial programs across the government. Right now, it’s even affecting our ability to hire and train new firefighters!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102011718/527798046/1253887841?refcode=em-2.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVjZWVjOC03MWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jnI8N5xJDznbcI5QjJ-1_QiU_brbTlRCB9yvTkyTbC8=&emci=a34943c2-71e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=1f5ceec8-71e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=36198509)
Trump’s freeze is halting the onboarding of federal firefighting crews ahead of the next wildfire season. The importance of hiring and training firefighters cannot be overstated, especially on the heels of the devastating January fires here in Southern California.

If the freeze on federal firefighters stands, we will miss the opportunity to properly staff and train first responders in time for the spring and summer fire risk – making any potential fires even more dangerous to our communities.

**[We need to fight back, and it’s going to take all of us. Please take action by signing my petition today to stop the freeze on firefighters when we need them most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102011721/527798049/1253887841?refcode=em-2.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVjZWVjOC03MWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jnI8N5xJDznbcI5QjJ-1_QiU_brbTlRCB9yvTkyTbC8=&emci=a34943c2-71e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=1f5ceec8-71e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=36198509)**
| ****[Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102011722/527798051/1253887841?refcode=em-2.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVjZWVjOC03MWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jnI8N5xJDznbcI5QjJ-1_QiU_brbTlRCB9yvTkyTbC8=&emci=a34943c2-71e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=1f5ceec8-71e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=36198509)****

Thank you,

George

clean_body: | = Peter, This is an incredibly delicate moment for our democracy, and I’m doing all I can in Congress to stop the deluge of unconstitutional, unlawful activities we’re seeing from President Trump and his allies. While we’ve had some success in stopping the blanket federal funding freeze, we need to keep pushing as we’re still seeing funding halts on crucial programs across the government. Right now, it’s even affecting our ability to hire and train new firefighters! Trump’s freeze is halting the onboarding of federal firefighting crews ahead of the next wildfire season. The importance of hiring and training firefighters cannot be overstated, especially on the heels of the devastating January fires here in Southern California. If the freeze on federal firefighters stands, we will miss the opportunity to properly staff and train first responders in time for the spring and summer fire risk – making any potential fires even more dangerous to our communities. | ** Thank you, George =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hi team,

We know it’s been a long few weeks. Elon Musk and his billionaire buddies have hijacked government systems, taken hold of Americans’ private data, and threatened programs you all rely on. Jason is fighting back.

The truth is, we know what Musk’s game is — he wants to prop up his billionaire buddies and leave Americans hanging. That isn’t what America voted for.

Jason grew up in a working-class home and enlisted in the National Guard to pay for college. He knows what it’s like to make ends meet. And he knows what it means to serve, something Trump and his billionaire buddies never will.

We have a long fight ahead and Jason needs your support now.

subject: Extremists are knocking on our doorsteps, and we can't let them in.

body:
Wesley isn’t afraid to call out corruption, defend working families, and protect our democracy. Peter – extremists in Washington are trying to reshape our government to fit their reckless agenda, no matter the cost.

Trump and his minions are targeting the federal workers who keep our country running – attacking their pensions, gutting resources, and setting the stage for mass layoffs. And even worse, Trump handed the reins over to his extremist friends, like Elon Musk, who is using his "authority" to eliminate agencies he deems unnecessary. Point blank: **Trump is ensuring the system only works for billionaires while the rest of us pay the price.**

This isn’t about good governance. It’s about handing unchecked power and confidential information to a billionaire like Musk, who’s hell-bent on helping Trump dismantle the federal government from the inside out.

[**This is a full-scale assault on our democracy, and we have to fight back. Ahead of Friday’s mid-month deadline, chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can right now to help Wesley stand up to extremists and defend our But you might be asking: How does Musk’s actions _actually_ affect Missourians?

It means cuts to critical safety net programs Missourians rely on to get by. It means less support for the small businesses that grow our economy. And it means fewer resources to help our state recover from natural disasters.

When Musk weakens federal agencies, Missouri families, workers, and communities are going to feel the squeeze first, all while billionaires like Musk get richer at the expense of everyday Americans in St. Louis and beyond.

[**Wesley isn’t afraid to defend working families and protect our democracy. But he can’t do it alone. Chip in $5, $10, or anything you can right now to help us build on our momentum and fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102012399/527800196/541679611?refcode=em25_250212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=99de099b-73e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTlkZTA5OWItNzNlOS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ddjKYhrE1WVc-NICuyneINE-SgO5Y7uDpf5rSdowSG4=)

It means cuts to critical safety net programs Missourians rely on to get by. It means less support for the small businesses that grow our economy. And it means fewer resources to help our state recover from natural disasters. When Musk weakens federal agencies, Missouri families, workers, and communities are going to feel the squeeze first, all while billionaires like Musk get richer at the expense of everyday Americans in St. Louis and beyond. = Thank you, Team Bell = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

subject: Trump: Call it the ‘Gulf of America’—or else
body:
Trump’s attempt to rename the Gulf of Mexico is authoritarianism at its most absurd. It’s about dominance and forcing people to validate his nonsense, turning blind obedience into a loyalty test.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102012537/527800596/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzI4N2I4YjUtNzNlOS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nE_t9E7I9oFyvTIsKTWfNldwh4FTL6uu0FaGlfBJdaY=&emci=c187b8b5-73e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c287b8b5-73e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
The Associated Press just reported that one of its journalists was barred from attending an Oval Office event with Elon Musk.
**Why? Because the AP refused to comply with Trump’s distressingly stupid executive order to call the**** _Gulf of Mexico_****the**** _Gulf of America._**
[**We’ll explain why AP being barred wasn’t just another one of Trump’s petty, self-serving antics in a moment—but if you support independent journalism that refuses to cave to his authoritarian effort to silence the free press, please chip in $25 or more today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102012541/527800605/2081197767?refcode=20250212-EM-AP-Gulf&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzI4N2I4YjUtNzNlOS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nE_t9E7I9oFyvTIsKTWfNldwh4FTL6uu0FaGlfBJdaY=)
Trump’s attempt to rename the Gulf of Mexico is authoritarianism at its most absurd. It’s about dominance and forcing people to validate his nonsense, turning blind obedience into a loyalty test.
But the mission of the AP—and of journalism itself—isn’t to cater to the whims of the powerful. It’s to hold them accountable.
**Julie Pace, the AP’s executive editor, put it plainly:**
_“Limiting our access to the Oval Office based on the content of AP’s speech not only severely impedes the public’s access to independent news, it plainly violates the First Amendment.”_
**Trump’s escalating war on the press should alarm every American who values democracy. A free press isn’t just a pillar of a free society—it’s a safeguard against tyranny. Yet Trump has made it clear: any outlet that refuses to fall in line will be punished.**
We’ve seen this playbook before.
✅ **Trump has sued networks** over critical coverage.
✅ **He’s threatened to revoke broadcast licenses.**
✅ **He’s vowed to seize control of the FCC** to silence independent media.
And now, he’s dictating who gets to cover his White House based on how obedient they are to his childish whims.
So this isn’t just about AP. It’s about the future of press freedom in America. It’s about supporting independent journalism and its core mission of speaking truth to power.
Peter, we have to stand up to this now before it’s too late.
**COURIER was founded to counter Trump’s attacks on the press and ensure the public has access to factual, independent journalism—especially in communities where right-wing disinformation dominates.**
**[But we can’t do it alone. If you believe in holding Trump accountable and ensuring the free press doesn’t bow to his demands, chip in $25 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102012544/527800610/2081197767?refcode=20250212-EM-AP-Gulf&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzI4N2I4YjUtNzNlOS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nE_t9E7I9oFyvTIsKTWfNldwh4FTL6uu0FaGlfBJdaY=)**

Here are three reasons why your support will make a huge difference:
1. **Governor Whitmer has a plan.** While too many are focused on partisan fights, Governor Whitmer is finding common ground to get things done — like fixing the damn roads, lowering costs, and investing in our schools.

It’s thanks to these investments that we were able to help elect leaders like Elissa Slotkin and Kristen McDonald Rivet in Michigan.
3. **The other side is already starting up their attacks.** One GOP candidate has already announced they’re running for governor and thrashed Governor Whitmer’s record. We can’t let their attacks go unanswered.

Governor Whitmer is ready to do the hard work to help rebuild the Michigan Democratic Party, invest in battleground races, and set the stage for wins up and down the ballot. Grassroots donations are a _huge_ part of our work, which is why we have to ask:

We need to RAPIDLY organize to stop Trump from serving any longer than he has to. _He’s already done _enough_ damage to our Democracy!_

[We’re building a public movement to STOP Congress from buckling under to MAGA monsters by allowing Trump to serve a third term, but we can’t do it without you: Join 10,000 top Democrats TODAY and rush $7 to join our efforts to STOP TRUMP and ensure these next four years are his last years in office! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86805?t=7&akid=18897%2E878179%2EhPPwqt) | [10,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: RUSH $7 TO ENSURE DONALD TRUMP REMAINS A 2-TERM PRESIDENT AND LIMIT HIS DAMAGE TO DEMOCRACY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86805?t=8&akid=18897%2E878179%2EhPPwqt)
---
Trump said it himself: **“It will be the greatest honor of my life to serve not once, but twice or three times or four times.”**

Folks, _not under our watch._

We can’t sit back and let him get away with this — but it will take all of us:

[We’re begging you, friend: Do your part to STOP TRUMP by rushing $7 towards our 10,000 donation goal _before_ tonight’s midnight deadline »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86805?t=9&akid=18897%2E878179%2EhPPwqt)

| | Hi D. P., In 1935, the Supreme Court overturned five of Franklin Roosevelt's executive orders (6199, 6204, 6256, 6284a and 6855). Congress has the power to overturn an executive order by passing legislation that invalidates it, and can also refuse to provide funding necessary to carry out certain policy measures contained with the order or legitimize policy.

subject: Constitution = DESTROYED ?!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22853%2E4449941%2Es_KzhM) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22853%2E4449941%2Es_KzhM) **J.D. Vance just took a wrecking ball to our Constitution:** | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59465?t=3&akid=22853%2E4449941%2Es_KzhM) | [ **_“Judges aren't allowed to control the executive's legitimate power”_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59465?t=4&akid=22853%2E4449941%2Es_KzhM)
---|---
This is 100% NOT TRUE and completely against Article 3 of the Constitution.

name: Voter Action Project NC
subject: This case is still going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021225_1&amount=25]
NC Newsline: Republicans on the NC Supreme Court block certification of the Democratic incumbent’s election [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=021225_1&amount=25]
This case is still going on in North Carolina, Team, and we have to spread the word because the media continues to ignore election theft in plain sight.
The North Carolina state Supreme Court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court , which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties.
For background: On Election Day, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- both of which increased Riggs' lead.
Now Judge Griffin has sued to remove 60,000 voters' ballots from the count , even though they've been validated in the recount. The state Board of Elections dismissed his request , but now his partisan, would-be colleagues -- the court has a 5-2 Republican majority -- have stepped in to adjudicate the election and possibly kick off one of their own.
Justices Anita Earls (D) and Richard Dietz (R) dissented while Justice Riggs properly recused herself, so the judicial stay on election certification was put in place by a 4-2, mainly party-line vote.
The bottom line is that the partisan Supreme Court is stepping into an election for one of their own members to try and reverse the results of the vote because their party didn't win. Opponents of voting rights are trying to steal this election in plain sight.
We've got to make sure everyone knows about this egregious intervention before these votes are stolen and the voices of the people are silenced. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and defend these votes in North Carolina and so many other votes across the country? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=021225_1&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021225_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021225_1&amount=25]

name: Jacob, Eric Sorensen for Congress
subject: Making your dollars go further
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102013552/527803807/1514584251?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjFhY2Q3NC03NWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hSavXI4DeZWNAfoibpQ86nYRnWUy8O2Cq-W4XH6AIo0=)
Peter, Like the working families we represent here in IL-17, we know a thing or two about making the most of every dollar. A major lesson we have learned after two hard-fought campaigns is that we need to build our war chest sooner – _before the election year_ – rather than leave things to chance when the race heats up. It took $5 million to win this seat last cycle. When Eric first ran for Congress, he made 1,600 hours of fundraising calls. Raising money early allowed us to make investments that brought in an extra $100,000 in interest. Smart decisions like this were the backbone of our success, and we need to do that again. **It’s critical that we don’t fall short early, and we’ve found that smart, early donations go much further than when they come at the last minute. Investing early means we can stretch your donation’s value for the long haul.** [**The bottom line is that this grassroots movement powered Eric to victory in 2022 and 2024 – and with your early support, we can do it again. Please consider donating $3 or whatever you can afford today to ensure our dollars go further when it matters most.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102013553/527803808/1514584251?refcode=em-2.12.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjFhY2Q3NC03NWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hSavXI4DeZWNAfoibpQ86nYRnWUy8O2Cq-W4XH6AIo0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102013554/527803809/1514584251?refcode=em-2.12.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjFhY2Q3NC03NWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hSavXI4DeZWNAfoibpQ86nYRnWUy8O2Cq-W4XH6AIo0=)

clean_body: | = Peter, Like the working families we represent here in IL-17, we know a thing or two about making the most of every dollar. A major lesson we have learned after two hard-fought campaigns is that we need to build our war chest sooner – before the election year – rather than leave things to chance when the race heats up. It took $5 million to win this seat last cycle. When Eric first ran for Congress, he made 1,600 hours of fundraising calls. Raising money early allowed us to make investments that brought in an extra $100,000 in interest. Smart decisions like this were the backbone of our success, and we need to do that again. It’s critical that we don’t fall short early, and we’ve found that smart, early donations go much further than when they come at the last minute. Investing early means we can stretch your donation’s value for the long haul. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your support, Jacob Finance Director | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. Earlier this week, I rallied alongside House Democrats and hundreds of supporters and employees outside of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) to stand up to the radical attacks on our government. **[**I want to tell you why this rally was important and what we need to do to fight back, then will you pitch in $3 to help us build the coalition we need to take back the House?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102013774/527804626/1740130684?amount=3&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGViYjc0NC03NmU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W42L8VSkpdVCGnA5AYrhd8lHRIIS3qStxJnzgQQV-Hk=)** | **[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102013775/527804627/1740130684?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGViYjc0NC03NmU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W42L8VSkpdVCGnA5AYrhd8lHRIIS3qStxJnzgQQV-Hk=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102013776/527804628/1740130684?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGViYjc0NC03NmU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W42L8VSkpdVCGnA5AYrhd8lHRIIS3qStxJnzgQQV-Hk=)**
The CFPB is a critical agency that works to protect everyday working people. They’re tasked with identifying fraud and abuse and holding predatory lenders accountable. _The same predatory lenders and billionaires that have allied themselves with Donald Trump._
Here in Arizona, we’re no strangers to the impacts of these schemes. Brokerage firms were purposefully deceiving Arizonans and keeping them from comparing fair prices for housing options. Whether you’re in Phoenix, in the rural Midwest, or in the South, everyday folks are struggling to afford housing because of these deceptive practices.
But the acting Director of the agency has told employees not to come into the office, or perform work tasks, and he **has essentially handed the keys over to Elon Musk, an unelected billionaire.**
I get it, Peter. It seems like every day, the Trump administration puts forth yet _another_ historically dangerous precedent or policy. Their entire goal is to wear us down and paralyze us into thinking there’s nothing we can do about their radical reshaping of our government.
****[**We cannot let this right-wing, authoritarian government create an environment of fear. We must fight back for the soul of this country, Peter. Will you pitch in $3 right now to help us build the Democratic coalition we need to fight back against this MAGA regime?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102013777/527804629/1740130684?amount=3&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGViYjc0NC03NmU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W42L8VSkpdVCGnA5AYrhd8lHRIIS3qStxJnzgQQV-Hk=)****

name: Office of Delegate Briana D. Sewell
subject: Delegate Briana Sewell's Crossover Update
body:
| |
---
# District 25 Weekly Newsletter
---
## Budget Update
---
Dear Inquirer,
---
**I am happy to report - last week, the Virginia House of Delegates passed an amended biennial budget with overwhelming bipartisan support!** I want to thank all of the House Appropriations staff for their diligent work in ensuring the budget bill [**HB1600**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/uIF_jsoPp8RrMTRoAKVG7g~~/AAS2yhA~/dSG654ycr7U5c3gPwY0yBhl3QKaLnqwGCtRDzkQY5O4YvyPX6SIyJqoVzv_jikMqOWhgKB9V7FCb02cKLJovOR-tP6yK1ysufl9NSf7Gt19Pt55LOK6BCeQ8sH-YNxHuKsXgTdU1Z4gmuDkeE8WfTwc13Je_6zCGEsqDgepOFPE~) was prepared and ready with member amendments in a timely manner. **The House budget contains several items that will directly support Virginia families struggling with the cost of living and ensure our physical infrastructure and schools are well funded.** I proudly cast my vote to advance HB1600 out of the House, and look forward to productively working with the state Senate and the Governor’s Office to establish a budget that puts Virginia’s families first.
---
|
---
**In this newsletter you’ll get the top line reports of the House budget, updates about the winter storm and its impact on Prince William County, visitors to our office, and events in and around the 25th District.**
---
|
---
# **Budget Highlights**
---
**First and foremost, the House budget allocates $1.1 billion for a one-time tax rebate of $200 for single filers and $400 for joint filers, plus an expansion of the refundable Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) to 20% of the federal level ($350M).** At a time of rising costs, this direct rebate and support for working families will help households keep a roof over their head and food on the table. **Our House budget also delivers on our promise to provide more K-12 education investments to strive to make Virginia schools the best in the nation.** HB1600 adds $773 million to the already allocated $2.6 billion from FY24’s budget. **These funds will provide much needed compensation to our hard working teachers. It also allocates $65M to keep colleges and community colleges affordable, $20M for HBCU partnerships, and $100M for the Virginia Military Survivors & Dependents Education Program (VMSDEP).** **Housing is a major concern for residents of the 25th district and beyond. I’m grateful that we are were able to pass $15M for a first-time homebuyer grant, $1.9M for eviction prevention, and $14M for local housing trust funds to help Virginia families find and keep their homes.** While this is obviously a small portion of what we have done with the budget, I wanted to highlight great work we are doing in the House of Delegates to help those who need it most. I strongly believe that our government is at its best when it is focused on helping families thrive, not just get by, and I will always fight to uplift my community at home and in Richmond.
---
# **Winter Storm Warning**
---
**A State of Emergency has been declared for the Commonwealth of Virginia. The National Weather Service has issued a Winter Storm Warning for Tuesday and Wednesday.** As snowfall continues, Wednesday will be heavily impacted. I strongly encourage all to stay off of the roads and only travel when absolutely necessary. VDOT crews are operating on 12-hour shift rotations (24 hours-a-day coverage). **As noted in our winter weather advisory, VDOT has asked that residents please park on the _odd_ side of the street to give crews space to work. While VDOT crews work around the clock in the next few days, should an unexpected need arise, we encourage them to reach out to their call center (1-800-FOR-ROAD) or at **[**https://www.vdot.virginia.gov/contact/**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/fQOVlibsxxnSzNfQqMau5A~~/AAS2yhA~/bM6FqnNADlQsxaT3WjkOjxTyu83XgpJanp3_vnr1JQ70E65Lv0yadCL50NzOAj9Ii-_-41d7SX_jCe56Msj8h_ox2355EaCPxV4AIhXRfKLEdi203XslBNuTBCfA43j6)**.**
---
**Visitors in the Office**
---
I want to thank members of the Farm Bureau, The National Coalition of 100 Black Women Inc, the Medical Society of VA, our Head Page from the House Page program, and many more, for their advocacy and sense of community. I want to thank members of the Farm Bureau, The National Coalition of 100 Black Women Inc, the Medical Society of VA, our Head Page from the House Page program, and many more, for their advocacy and sense of community.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
**Events in and around the 25th District** [**Firelight Nights - Friday, February 14 - 6:00pm-9:00pm - Mill House Museum, 412 Mill Street, Occoquan VA 22125**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/tiXIH4uNTFILGuhPiMhD3w~~/AAS2yhA~/nzoHEpR6cP4zKWOworT6EdJpPdHz8zJYnO4viFro_1ldGCrDvIUa7n8qrHzf8VemNIqaiAAX7Ekloyh30wLlqEld_43jofToHX_J6NlCY5nSGiQs5Zlha7fHtefbatd9) Enjoy an evening under the stars in historic Occoquan! The event features fire pits, live music, and food, beer, wine, cocktails, hot drinks, s'mores kits, and snacks for purchase. Bring your friends and camp chairs for a comfortable evening. Free admission!**** [**My Funny Valentine Cookie Decorating - Friday February 14 - 10:30am–12:00pm - Sharron Baucom Dale City Recreation Center, 14300 Minnieville Rd, Woodbridge, VA 22193-3004**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/5OggrRjyRu79YHsFFWGrOw~~/AAS2yhA~/xZ8WzRO8xuZJwzT5CAP73-GuoOqim61pI1TaHl3M5vBbdpfDEHm3nFnuNEnACpFwsGVETLwzFN2Y8xijlMO993erSU233zrd10WCx9FqJtL41spWtL3_w5n0dlGXYAxRDpA2bAskwMP2igE--vsmSQ~~) This fun and yummy Valentine themed cookie decorating class will put a smile on your little Valentine's face! (For ages 3 - 6) [**Presidents Day Celebration at George Washington’s Home - February 17, 2025 - 9:00am-5:00pm - Mount Vernon, 3200 Mount Vernon Memorial Hwy, Mount Vernoon, Va 21121**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/P8xx_Gm6nE5F6rkCvOG1OQ~~/AAS2yhA~/gN3CKiDvS7UW_egUw3PGtYCpQ-oEneQnddFpW10h63QGihJj4y8mNTeR3iXYqKJ74CMlnudNBIf2fZho6BKUnIgTJwnBif3nsyVxWilP8Df8ne8wkoUz2ygIwoYPGmRtRd2OxMrp2P8rca-dwSUttWjlERF3TWhLUv9hDqza-5DbmFmz-G1ko9n8sppa1ScKCg9aXRiQxEz8gHNwHUHpESus4KSa0X0Sp3WH0hpUverkMXNE6tG1ailA-8nDPz5jHQquFLwBZRo9hFOPjY5YxJlg2SbH-eh9t8VizBvyfLqksLnMqvp4jHGWnowbKjof4rL84eMSpoxKXYbSCfg6Sg~~) Celebrate the first president of the United States at his beloved home! Admission is free for Presidents' Day. Guests will have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to tour the first floor of the Mansion while preservation work is ongoing. The event schedule also includes a Presidential Tribute, an official observance ceremony, a meet and greet with General Washington, musical performances, a library open house, textile demonstrations, a birthday card activity for George Washington, an Army Caisson Training demonstration, and concessions. Don't miss this unique opportunity to explore George Washington's home and celebrate his legacy.**** [**Bad Art Night - Monday, February 24 - 6:00pm - 7:30pm, Chinn Park Library**](https://go.sparkpostmail.com/f/a/PQNxZqtR7eYdrzesYH7lVA~~/AAS2yhA~/nzoHEpR6cP4zKWOworT6EfM_tXOV4r2_OdSqzxxFx4a00UTmTCL0o49Z9-hrsQeEYGtLqeJfcYdtOZ775speWqP5Z9zfTO6SDYm0Qi33MIexOZsxKPWdhBrIu22L2tt_) Feeling artistically rebellious? Ready to embrace the beauty of imperfection? Then mark your calendars because it's time for Bad Art Night! Bad Art Night is a non-instructional program where we celebrate creativity without the pressure of perfection. So if you're a seasoned artist or picking up a brush for the first time, everyone is welcome to join in the fun! Bring your own art supplies or use ours—whatever floats your (bad) art boat.
---
|
---
Thanks again for reading our weekly update and staying in touch with our office. As always, if there is anything we can assist you with, please do not hesitate to call our office at 703-261-4787 or email us at [DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov.](mailto:DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov.)
---
In Service

clean_body: | | District 25 Weekly Newsletter Budget Update Dear Inquirer, I am happy to report - last week, the Virginia House of Delegates passed an amended biennial budget with overwhelming bipartisan support! I want to thank all of the House Appropriations staff for their diligent work in ensuring the budget bill ~ was prepared and ready with member amendments in a timely manner. The House budget contains several items that will directly support Virginia families struggling with the cost of living and ensure our physical infrastructure and schools are well funded. I proudly cast my vote to advance HB1600 out of the House, and look forward to productively working with the state Senate and the Governor’s Office to establish a budget that puts Virginia’s families first. | In this newsletter you’ll get the top line reports of the House budget, updates about the winter storm and its impact on Prince William County, visitors to our office, and events in and around the 25th District. | Budget Highlights First and foremost, the House budget allocates $1.1 billion for a one-time tax rebate of $200 for single filers and $400 for joint filers, plus an expansion of the refundable Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) to 20% of the federal level ($350M). At a time of rising costs, this direct rebate and support for working families will help households keep a roof over their head and food on the table. Our House budget also delivers on our promise to provide more K-12 education investments to strive to make Virginia schools the best in the nation. HB1600 adds $773 million to the already allocated $2.6 billion from FY24’s budget. These funds will provide much needed compensation to our hard working teachers. It also allocates $65M to keep colleges and community colleges affordable, $20M for HBCU partnerships, and $100M for the Virginia Military Survivors & Dependents Education Program (VMSDEP). Housing is a major concern for residents of the 25th district and beyond. I’m grateful that we are were able to pass $15M for a first-time homebuyer grant, $1.9M for eviction prevention, and $14M for local housing trust funds to help Virginia families find and keep their homes. While this is obviously a small portion of what we have done with the budget, I wanted to highlight great work we are doing in the House of Delegates to help those who need it most. I strongly believe that our government is at its best when it is focused on helping families thrive, not just get by, and I will always fight to uplift my community at home and in Richmond. Winter Storm Warning A State of Emergency has been declared for the Commonwealth of Virginia. The National Weather Service has issued a Winter Storm Warning for Tuesday and Wednesday. As snowfall continues, Wednesday will be heavily impacted. I strongly encourage all to stay off of the roads and only travel when absolutely necessary. VDOT crews are operating on 12-hour shift rotations (24 hours-a-day coverage). As noted in our winter weather advisory, VDOT has asked that residents please park on the odd side of the street to give crews space to work. While VDOT crews work around the clock in the next few days, should an unexpected need arise, we encourage them to reach out to their call center (1-800-FOR-ROAD) or at . Visitors in the Office I want to thank members of the Farm Bureau, The National Coalition of 100 Black Women Inc, the Medical Society of VA, our Head Page from the House Page program, and many more, for their advocacy and sense of community. I want to thank members of the Farm Bureau, The National Coalition of 100 Black Women Inc, the Medical Society of VA, our Head Page from the House Page program, and many more, for their advocacy and sense of community. | | | | | | Events in and around the 25th District Enjoy an evening under the stars in historic Occoquan! The event features fire pits, live music, and food, beer, wine, cocktails, hot drinks, s'mores kits, and snacks for purchase. Bring your friends and camp chairs for a comfortable evening. Free admission!** ~~ This fun and yummy Valentine themed cookie decorating class will put a smile on your little Valentine's face! (For ages 3 - 6) ~~ Celebrate the first president of the United States at his beloved home! Admission is free for Presidents' Day. Guests will have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to tour the first floor of the Mansion while preservation work is ongoing. The event schedule also includes a Presidential Tribute, an official observance ceremony, a meet and greet with General Washington, musical performances, a library open house, textile demonstrations, a birthday card activity for George Washington, an Army Caisson Training demonstration, and concessions. Don't miss this unique opportunity to explore George Washington's home and celebrate his legacy.** Feeling artistically rebellious? Ready to embrace the beauty of imperfection? Then mark your calendars because it's time for Bad Art Night! Bad Art Night is a non-instructional program where we celebrate creativity without the pressure of perfection. So if you're a seasoned artist or picking up a brush for the first time, everyone is welcome to join in the fun! Bring your own art supplies or use ours—whatever floats your (bad) art boat. | Thanks again for reading our weekly update and staying in touch with our office. As always, if there is anything we can assist you with, please do not hesitate to call our office at 703-261-4787 or email us at mailto:DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov. In Service | | The Honorable Briana D. Sewell \-- 25th House District DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov from future updates

body:
The Pennsylvania House is a top battleground state for the DLCC as we prepare for the 2026 cycle, and this special election will be one of the first opportunities to defend our majority. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| **Bat·tle·ground**
_noun_
A competitive chamber(s) where either party narrowly holds majorities.
_“The Pennsylvania House is one of our top battlegrounds this cycle.”_
* * *
Definitions from DLCC
---
Next month, Democrats will compete in an all-important special election for a tie-breaking seat in the Pennsylvania House, a key battleground for state Dems.
**This must-win race will determine whether we hold on to our hard-won majority or LOSE ground to extreme Republicans. We can’t spare any effort.**
[Can we count on you to help us win in battleground states like Pennsylvania and beyond? Your gift could help us BLOCK ultra-MAGA Republicans from taking power in state legislatures nationwide. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDBs5M1B9a8Y0-8wJfrZEwEHQvCaaKIo4emr2Wcm7dB0LpnD5cRexC6jrRszOAewbtJbQ5oi5dZyPHdFd4g93ky8hwms78ForWymkagqksfIPsdB2c2XMpzDgSlnTwhM56850kf5hNbB5clQ4cvpRVxlFjo4ajeVst-5z88ED-8PwMfclt3xwesPBPyR9kFXUaLaHRqeAqoG4e_llWDylZerHhtF8ldBuXMINEEk9YnchK-k3m-uhrAYUNDmX7ETH9OMzt1SgnotWpZRGMtk1gAwGjCYw0k_km8yiPA57miiLmz_ZxxtukfffjzqxgMdsHKkQZOqOcJJnYEnGTchmhord8AE8UWVNHizZVqNFVolLFrXhEqlzKDPQ38qz2J8t4E8tnl-P_cHIa1Zo8RzRNxA/4dy/C-MQR0phShu2babY5D_PEg/h0/h001.pRF45Rw0yIhHUUe6BEgFd2HHdqS92r6x7dZtuHXL3r0)

name: Rep. Pfluger
subject: Can you spare 2 minutes for a former F-22 fighter pilot?

My name is Rep. August Pfluger. I'm a combat veteran, Christian, husband and father, and former National Security Advisor to President Trump.

I'm in my third term as Texas's 11th Congressional District representative, and there's no more time for games. With a Republican House, Senate, and White House, we only have one chance to seize this opportunity.

The radical Left is shaking in their boots at the prospect of Patriots like me in control in Washington. However, our conservative majority in the House is razor-thin, and if we don't fight to protect it, this golden chance to retake America will be lost. _**We cannot afford to sit back and let the Left gain ground and spoil this window of opportunity.**_

That's why I'm asking you to join me in this fight, Peter. We need your support to ensure that our agenda stays on track and we can continue putting America First. **[**Can I count on your help to get the job done?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/-Pepykgpq7HN5_371DONJ4Un9Ew1sMnnga5USd3dNOLBzqC9o9k2iEAmvagzZKSaEyYGO562221rpg_pOKfUQ63wBgAqPBl8Zmhoak-JApoZT7N7EdubEJEqFjDnPSJPR5QKqITgC3pyvxzf_VuCuKDcIlT4SP917SpVZPsx2jqf3E4qnDj_Y3k_tn2sOzkpk654j_XQmNrxKQO5mLIGF24BttcVozAJb9nvJTBbaj0YAj8Lo99epczqaKC8Wd7bMOj5HMCUphSXIzZh3lT2huXilpVZBwnBAibiBDG_luy3d93Oyj9cyEqbxSoxOUPcIA0pZDaTswUwYodRm2s5jB1KcEVJQ_P6grI3X6rM0gmPKduRT6QaI71wgwkpl0u_HYrIsSkhaSzkbsd5IWBm63EYdxmhBoegRhCiKlEu-zBpVB7v1f-QbEgzOGx8b_wkJsXBA9SlSS2n8VDmtG15gimJmzs0BGzMygXce2UWn1os-E-l1jUj8rIqsrumVDq82XmuHBYxjeMCnuNfMFPmpL_nwRvI1EUf7gGCKhlUxj_WBGerZOLraiLm3Eyl5IHcHi_PWBxUnMxrR0k/2qLQcKkLKnbroOQhshvl9p4cQsUer5nW/6)**

name: Oregon GOP
subject: Honoring Abraham Lincoln.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
A Legacy of Leadership and Unity

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
| | Friend, Today, we celebrate the birthday of our first Republican President, Abraham Lincoln – a man whose leadership, courage, and vision forever shaped the course of our nation. Born on February 12, 1809, Lincoln rose from humble beginnings to become one of America’s greatest presidents, leading our country through its most challenging era, the Civil War. Lincoln was a champion of liberty, dedicating his presidency to preserving the Union and ending slavery in America. His Emancipation Proclamation paved the way for freedom, and his Gettysburg Address reminded us that our government is "_of the people, by the people, for the people_." His unwavering commitment to American ideals continues to inspire generations.
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/d84ahZ3p7Ys6/LzR3aS9mVG1ZQisvVG9qblVNdTlNSHNTc2xJZjBYK2JxN0hiYytJcEtZUzluSWR2TzRNR3NFR1RMRkZEU0xYSFloQWxPZFc1RlJpZXdzUXhiUVpGK2diV1FuL3dKUGJqU0J6UVBLQmNPVmc9S0/)
---
| | As we reflect on his legacy, let us remember the principles he fought for – unity, freedom, and perseverance. Lincoln once said, _“The best way to predict the future is to create it.”_ His words remind us that the work of shaping our country’s future is in our hands. Today, we honor his life and his contributions to our great nation. May we continue to uphold the values he so passionately defended. Thank you, Oregon GOP
---
---
---

name: Ilhan Omar (via Team Jayapal)
subject: I’m appalled.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250212?refcode=em20250212-4758&amount=3&refcode2=4758_420207_1DfqEe&akid=4758%2E420207%2E1DfqEe ][IMG]

Peter — it’s
Ilhan Omar. I’m appalled.

One of my Republican colleagues in the House, Rep. Brandon Gill, sent out
a fundraising email this week calling for my deportation, and asking his
supporters to sign a petition to make it happen.

Take a look for yourself at what he sent:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250212?refcode=em20250212-4758&amount=3&refcode2=4758_420207_1DfqEe&akid=4758%2E420207%2E1DfqEe ][IMG]

Reprehensible, racist, and un-American. The email went on to say that I
was “facilitating a full-scale invasion of our country," and that I am
committing “treason.”

Threatening to deport legal US citizens because you disagree with them is
fascism. Full stop. But I expect nothing less from the GOP under Trump and
Elon Musk.

Peter,
it’s clear that the far-right has been emboldened and out of control since
Trump took office.

Just look at what they are doing to our federal government.

Elon Musk is illegally slashing crucial agencies and programs while
protecting funding for his companies, like SpaceX. They’re scaling back
the core functions of our government so they can line the pockets of their
billionaire friends. It’s like the wildest dreams of the ultra-rich
finally coming true.

Our best response to the far-right in this moment is to organize all of
our people, all our resources, all of the tools we have at our disposal,
to stand against Trump’s administration.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250212?refcode=em20250212-4758&amount=3&refcode2=4758_420207_1DfqEe&akid=4758%2E420207%2E1DfqEe ]If that sounds like a plan to you, please, split a contribution between
my campaign and Pramila's so we can continue to fight back. We are
organizing to block Trump’s agenda in every way we can, but we need your
help to get it done.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250212?amount=3&refcode=em20250212-4758&refcode2=4758_420207_1DfqEe&akid=4758%2E420207%2E1DfqEe ]Contribute

The far-right may be emboldened right now, but the American people are
already seeing through their extremist agenda. It’s our job to keep
exposing them each and every day.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250212-4758-footer&t=1001&refcode2=4758_420207_1DfqEe&akid=4758%2E420207%2E1DfqEe

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4758%2E420207%2E1DfqEe

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

Peter

Hundreds of patriots like you have already accepted their invitation to be a Sustaining Member of my grassroots campaign to defend Texas, and I hope you will join them!

As I fight in Congress to secure our southern border, make the Trump tax cuts permanent, and unleash American energy, I need the help of each and every like-minded conservative.

I know it seems far away, but with the Governor’s Mansion, a Senate seat, and all of our House seats up for grabs, the Left sees Texas as their best way back to power in 2026.

My service as a Navy SEAL ingrained in me just how important having a good team is, and with so much on the line, I need you on our team if we’re going to defeat the Left and defend Texas.

name: Bonta HQ
subject: All of Trump’s executive orders we’ve blocked →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250212&t=1&akid=1635%2E1088799%2Euj_CeY)
We have another legal update: a court has ordered the Trump administration to comply with its temporary restraining order and restore access to ALL federal funding it previously froze.
This is yet another victory in Rob’s fight to uphold the rule of law. Since Donald Trump started wreaking havoc on our government and democracy from the White House last month, Rob has fought back every step of the way on behalf of the people — _and he’s winning._
**In every case Rob has filed, he’s successfully stopped the President’s abuse of executive power. California’s AG is batting a thousand!**
So far, Rob has sued the Trump administration and successfully blocked:
* Trump’s attempt to end birthright citizenship guaranteed by the 14th Amendment;
* Trump’s freeze on trillions of dollars in critical federal funding;
* Elon Musk and DOGE’s access to Americans’ social security numbers, bank accounts, and other sensitive information;
* Trump’s funding cuts to public and medical health research at institutions across the country, including California, that are working to find cures to cancer, Alzheimer’s, and more.

**[The Attorney General will continue to hold Trump and his far-right administration accountable to the rule of law: support him with a grassroots contribution of $5 or more to our campaign today!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250212?refcode=em20250212-1635&amount=5&refcode2=1635_1088799_uj_CeY&akid=1635%2E1088799%2Euj_CeY)**

clean_body: We have another legal update: a court has ordered the Trump administration to comply with its temporary restraining order and restore access to ALL federal funding it previously froze. This is yet another victory in Rob’s fight to uphold the rule of law. Since Donald Trump started wreaking havoc on our government and democracy from the White House last month, Rob has fought back every step of the way on behalf of the people — and he’s winning. In every case Rob has filed, he’s successfully stopped the President’s abuse of executive power. California’s AG is batting a thousand! So far, Rob has sued the Trump administration and successfully blocked: Trump’s attempt to end birthright citizenship guaranteed by the 14th Amendment; Trump’s freeze on trillions of dollars in critical federal funding; Elon Musk and DOGE’s access to Americans’ social security numbers, bank accounts, and other sensitive information; Trump’s funding cuts to public and medical health research at institutions across the country, including California, that are working to find cures to cancer, Alzheimer’s, and more. — Bonta HQ

name: Jason C. Johnson
subject: I have good news and bad news
body:
| | | Good news, bad news
---
| |
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3e07c7b2aace425495fcf3823210c0e9&_e=zTCpzqmeNnYU2eB4NPJGyjSoYyjtrkwa2Rgwk6i6nL-IUuDn2JLT4cw1KqIeRX3apFYh68Il0hQ7k4JurAXzCu73pY1zozvGnFRVddNcOQ6BQbICx6TcHAMP062KvLXVgNqMelgBVuAUkfaYTTrA223tCc2ww7zr0uGT49n1akb5lRv61__ixur_p-ODj9qgjpHej3KGTcT9kT-0sKWr1VNPL8h6DpJ4TuXSQ5ItVKDCwrsqnbMCxHWtMJR03K8mjtTwmjP_-LpNEhPSgnqbUnst_XTDnAH0PImV-lAoSgtNzT8xhgGnSJj7wa5oUClhWoQlLn0uHqAgFeOLg4eQA6S2zDbmLd-r6Lo9Mcxoy5IR5Z2U14uT7YD7MbDD30iRhkW0mnrzYSwRl-Fn99XW0w%3D%3D)
---
Peter, I have good news and bad news. The good news is the trial for Officer Brad Lunsford began on Monday, February 3rd.That means as I’m writing this email this brave officer is finally getting his chance to clear his name in court. The bad news is we must come up with $10,000 to ensure we have the funds to cover the trial expenses. **[**As a patriot who backs the blue, I'm asking you to donate $35 or more in the next 24 hours.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3e07c7b2aace425495fcf3823210c0e9&_e=zTCpzqmeNnYU2eB4NPJGyjSoYyjtrkwa2Rgwk6i6nL-IUuDn2JLT4cw1KqIeRX3apFYh68Il0hQ7k4JurAXzCu73pY1zozvGnFRVddNcOQ6BQbICx6TcHAMP062KvLXVgNqMelgBVuAUkfaYTTrA223tCc2ww7zr0uGT49n1akb5lRv61__ixur_p-ODj9qgjpHej3KGTcT9kT-0sKWr1VNPL8h6DpJ4TuXSQ5ItVKDCwrsqnbMCxHWtMJR03K8mmqAG5InvVHfdZNXNgW7IQMcj0MXPW3nWDiW5ooBpsUjc1MVP4fOreKVvldlnwGmnjqmZN9w4zzg9TqRGgzLgKe7ACRrY3EHIDQ-zLtBRCAJJaDTdcRUO-ATMWg8_DJhGlZ8ibhCQbvT5Zt2tfV9XIA%3D%3D)** It's outrageous that Brad has even been charged in this case. He faces a charge of voluntary manslaughter for saving his partner's life from a suspect armed with a knife who was resisting being detained and violently threatened their lives.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. Brad had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's life. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.It was an act of heroism -- but because the cop was white, and the suspect was black...it instantly becomes a felony to a Soros-backed prosecutor. Now Brad Lunsford is facing 11 years prison. Let that sink in. 11 years in prison -- locked away from his wife and young children -- for following his police training and saving his partner's life.**[**I hope you can see why I'm asking you to donate $35 or more right away to help fund Brad's case.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3e07c7b2aace425495fcf3823210c0e9&_e=zTCpzqmeNnYU2eB4NPJGyjSoYyjtrkwa2Rgwk6i6nL-IUuDn2JLT4cw1KqIeRX3apFYh68Il0hQ7k4JurAXzCu73pY1zozvGnFRVddNcOQ6BQbICx6TcHAMP062KvLXVgNqMelgBVuAUkfaYTTrA223tCc2ww7zr0uGT49n1akb5lRv61__ixur_p-ODj9qgjpHej3KGTcT9kT-0sKWr1VNPL8h6DpJ4TuXSQ5ItVKDCwrsqnbMCxHWtMJR03K8mLh0X6b1YCfJHynp_UAhGul67FHwOKjhFHVTdoVJSWNJWCcTyR4bDAbaUlMHXHcgUENGVnGU_yO3N1jKOPvpZ9ZXLy4kNZzop3hSHM-MR9tfb78rr8PuJzqMC9e5KL9c95O8IproHMW7IBjKrB3NzdQ%3D%3D)** You see, trials are expensive.
---
* Those attorneys we've been paying hourly are suddenly on the case 8+ hours a day for as long as the trial takes.
* The expert witnesses required to put on a solid defense come with hefty price tags.
* And of course, there's travel and lodgings for our officers and their families -- who want to be there to support their loved one.

---
It's no small undertaking to pay for someone's legal defense. Here at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund we're blessed to be able to do this for wrongly accused officers because of the generosity of folks like you. But trials put a huge stress on our budget -- which is why I'm urgently turning to you for help.**[**Can I count on you to donate $35 or more right away?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3e07c7b2aace425495fcf3823210c0e9&_e=zTCpzqmeNnYU2eB4NPJGyjSoYyjtrkwa2Rgwk6i6nL-IUuDn2JLT4cw1KqIeRX3apFYh68Il0hQ7k4JurAXzCu73pY1zozvGnFRVddNcOQ6BQbICx6TcHAMP062KvLXVgNqMelgBVuAUkfaYTTrA223tCc2ww7zr0uGT49n1akb5lRv61__ixur_p-ODj9qgjpHej3KGTcT9kT-0sKWr1VNPL8h6DpJ4TuXSQ5ItVKDCwrsqnbMCxHWtMJR03K8mjIBKXTIP5eZUSnCe4NRbCGkBPplu44YUjJ4Mpage591n20DV2MOKo83TGXOBREJBd5sWSOVDsUOqaQvpPRfmdOWWFiGYVrMUsIfWUsxRW1gpwR4wJQvbZ2b696vgDrLwjbXk3iuTUPdzLyH4CAAjSA%3D%3D)** Knowing we can count on folks like you makes it possible for LELDF to say YES to wrongly accused officers, like Brad, who need our help.Thank you for helping us provide top-notch legal defenses to all our wrongly accused officers.
---
Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3e07c7b2aace425495fcf3823210c0e9&_e=zTCpzqmeNnYU2eB4NPJGyjSoYyjtrkwa2Rgwk6i6nL-IUuDn2JLT4cw1KqIeRX3apFYh68Il0hQ7k4JurAXzCu73pY1zozvGnFRVddNcOQ6BQbICx6TcHAMP062KvLXVgNqMelgBVuAUkfaYTTrA223tCc2ww7zr0uGT49n1akb5lRv61__ixur_p-ODj9qgjpHej3KGTcT9kT-0sKWr1VNPL8h6DpJ4TuXSQ5ItVKDCwrsqnbMCxHWtMJR03K8mygfMK68CSKvy22BmIHUu9NKnPm0YBTn91r6m8iqNQDEkT0p_rYIg84YIFqNuR2CMe5bZB3E94rjqhsFbJp9VOTboIZz6BhFBWSJXkoqHI81pKLaMcB6cerS0-cYPLKPdFdp7TkWvkMANzzuX8CyJKA%3D%3D)
---
Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
---
P.S. We must raise $10,000 to ensure the trial for Officer Brad Lunsford is fully funded. **[**Can I count on your donation of $35 or more?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3e07c7b2aace425495fcf3823210c0e9&_e=zTCpzqmeNnYU2eB4NPJGyjSoYyjtrkwa2Rgwk6i6nL-IUuDn2JLT4cw1KqIeRX3apFYh68Il0hQ7k4JurAXzCu73pY1zozvGnFRVddNcOQ6BQbICx6TcHAMP062KvLXVgNqMelgBVuAUkfaYTTrA223tCc2ww7zr0uGT49n1akb5lRv61__ixur_p-ODj9qgjpHej3KGTcT9kT-0sKWr1VNPL8h6DpJ4TuXSQ5ItVKDCwrsqnbMCxHWtMJR03K8mY3EmiizsUTkG1DnniI7XqUCrXv38ZFoXj_RUWu-H56mtmL4tnTeZ9dAWAdtohNRLCCyl3z7Uzde8HXuMQHwcWbulY6z1WilD5UDeVNdP9Q8V-riXP5UcCfS9JB9h1wl9RuvkbaRXBu6g1a58ENLGLQ%3D%3D)** Thank you in advance for helping us provide the best possible legal defenses for all our officers.

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: It’s easy to feel overwhelmed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marie for Congress
body:
| | Peter, if you’ve been feeling overwhelmed and discouraged over the past few weeks, you’re not alone. At our town hall, out in the district, and in all communications, I’m hearing from many constituents that they’re frustrated by the national political landscape.

I hear you, Peter. It’s hard to cut through the noise and keep up with the news cycle, so I want to offer you a bit of reassurance. Even when things seem chaotic, I remain focused on the issues that matter most to WA-03, and making sure your voice is never drowned out.

**Transparency and accountability have already been central to my work in Congress. It’s important to me that I hear directly from you, especially now.** [Please click here and let me know what has been most concerning to you recently, and leave me a message about what’s on your mind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102016956/527815503/-87547011?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_90DO_250212_1_1&refcode2=c9865439-7ee9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg2NTQzOS03ZWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4kZe2CIfJp2yqmtuygR5Ftv1NQyScVxM7qVs0_LbijE=&emci=b6865439-7ee9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c9865439-7ee9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=31138575)
| **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102016957/527815504/-87547011?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_90DO_250212_1_1&refcode2=c9865439-7ee9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTg2NTQzOS03ZWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4kZe2CIfJp2yqmtuygR5Ftv1NQyScVxM7qVs0_LbijE=&emci=b6865439-7ee9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c9865439-7ee9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=31138575)**
---

I’ve said from the beginning that I’m willing to work with anyone if it means getting things done for Southwest Washington, but I also refuse to bend to dangerous extremism that does nothing but divide us.

Our campaign has always been about putting the people of our district first, and making sure the channels of communication between you and I remain open is just part of how I’m keeping that promise.

I look forward to hearing from you, Peter.

– Marie

clean_body: | | Peter, if you’ve been feeling overwhelmed and discouraged over the past few weeks, you’re not alone. At our town hall, out in the district, and in all communications, I’m hearing from many constituents that they’re frustrated by the national political landscape. I hear you, Peter. It’s hard to cut through the noise and keep up with the news cycle, so I want to offer you a bit of reassurance. Even when things seem chaotic, I remain focused on the issues that matter most to WA-03, and making sure your voice is never drowned out. Transparency and accountability have already been central to my work in Congress. It’s important to me that I hear directly from you, especially now. | I’ve said from the beginning that I’m willing to work with anyone if it means getting things done for Southwest Washington, but I also refuse to bend to dangerous extremism that does nothing but divide us. Our campaign has always been about putting the people of our district first, and making sure the channels of communication between you and I remain open is just part of how I’m keeping that promise. I look forward to hearing from you, Peter. – Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Republicans are calling for my deportation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250212-io?refcode=em20250212-36423&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36423_1203867_yYTLZF&akid=36423%2E1203867%2EyYTLZF ]Headline: House Republican fundraises with petition to deport Ilhan
Omar

Peter — it’s
Ilhan Omar. I’m appalled.

One of my Republican colleagues in the House, Rep. Brandon Gill, sent out
a fundraising email this week calling for my deportation, and asking his
supporters to sign a petition to make it happen.

Take a look for yourself at what he sent:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250212-io?refcode=em20250212-36423&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36423_1203867_yYTLZF&akid=36423%2E1203867%2EyYTLZF ]Screenshot from Rep. Brandon Gill’s email that reads: Friend, we should
have never let Ilhan Omar into our country. And frankly, America would be
a much better place if she were to be sent back to Somalia. Sign the
Petition - Deport Ilhan Omar

Reprehensible, racist, and un-American. The email went on to say that I
was “facilitating a full-scale invasion of our country," and that I am
committing “treason.”

Threatening to deport legal US citizens because you disagree with them is
fascism. Full stop. But I expect nothing less from the GOP under Trump and
Elon Musk.

Peter,
it’s clear that the far-right has been emboldened and out of control since
Trump took office.

Just look at what they are doing to our federal government.

Elon Musk is illegally slashing crucial agencies and programs while
protecting funding for his companies, like SpaceX. They’re scaling back
the core functions of our government so they can line the pockets of their
billionaire friends. It’s like the wildest dreams of the ultra-rich
finally coming true.

Our best response to the far-right in this moment is to organize all of
our people, all our resources, all of the tools we have at our disposal,
to stand against Trump’s administration.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250212-io?refcode=em20250212-36423&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36423_1203867_yYTLZF&akid=36423%2E1203867%2EyYTLZF ]If that sounds like a plan to you, please, split a contribution between
my campaign and Justice Democrats so we can continue to fight back. We are
organizing to block Trump’s agenda in every way we can, but we need your
help to get it done.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250212-io?refcode=em20250212-36423&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36423_1203867_yYTLZF&akid=36423%2E1203867%2EyYTLZF ]Contribute $5

The far-right may be emboldened right now, but the American people are
already seeing through their extremist agenda. It’s our job to keep
exposing them each and every day.

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250212-36423-footer&t=1001&refcode2=36423_1203867_yYTLZF&akid=36423%2E1203867%2EyYTLZF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=36423%2E1203867%2EyYTLZF

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eduardo_Ver=C3=A1stegui=2C_Sound_of_Freedom_Foundation?=
subject: Help rescue children who’ve been sold into slavery
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | | | | [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5IaITm72nxqar&s=PPGPKBDJNAOCJELA)
---
Friend,This is difficult to hear - but it's critically important for you to understand.Vulnerable children are being abducted and sold into sex trafficking at the highest rates in history.A **massive surge in immigration** , **skyrocketing drug use** , and a **22% increase in online recruitment** of victims during the pandemic are all to blame for the estimated **50,000 children** who will be sold into sex trafficking in the United States this year.Rescuing minors from their abusers and combatting the multi-billion-dollar human trafficking and child sex "industry" -- which is larger than the global cocaine market -- takes a great deal of resources. **[**At the Sound of Freedom Foundation, we need your emergency support to equip our agents with the tools and resources they need to rescue defenseless children from modern-day slavery. Please help with your tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $100, or more today.**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5IbITm72nxqar&s=PPGPKBDJNAOCJELA)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5IcITm72nxqar&s=PPGPKBDJNAOCJELA)
---
As the producer of the feature film _Sound of Freedom_ -- which you have likely seen or heard about -- I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry. Based on a true story, _Sound of Freedom_ tells the gut-wrenching story of a brother and sister -- Miguel and Rocio Aguilar -- who were abducted and sold to be used as sex slaves ... taken by organized criminals who tricked their father._Sound of Freedom_ was a box office hit and gave us the platform to spread awareness about children who must be rescued from unimaginably horrific realities. Now, through The Sound of Freedom Foundation, we identify and track cases of child abduction and trafficking, and we tirelessly search for and rescue defenseless victims. **[God's children are NOT for sale, which is why we must act immediately to SAVE these innocent lives from sex trafficking. I hope I can count on your gift of $25, $50, or more to help us reunite young girls and boys with their families who are praying for their return.](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5IdITm72nxqar&s=PPGPKBDJNAOCJELA)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5IeITm72nxqar&s=PPGPKBDJNAOCJELA)
---
Shockingly, the average age of victims is 12 years old and 79% of all human trafficking cases are for sexual exploitation. In many cases, abduction occurs internationally and there are costs associated with hiring attorneys, filing petitions, and even traveling to the country where the child is located.While the cost of returning an abducted child varies depending on the case, the truth is that the rescue of a missing child is an incredibly complex and expensive mission. At the Sound of Freedom Foundation, we firmly believe that no family deserves to end the search for their child because there isn't the financial ability to continue their fight! **[Please help us to rescue hurt and exploited children and combat these heinous crimes with all resources available. Your immediate support of the Sound of Freedom Foundation with a tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $100, or more would be a critical investment toward helping us save innocent children's lives.](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5IfITm72nxqar&s=PPGPKBDJNAOCJELA) **
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5IgITm72nxqar&s=PPGPKBDJNAOCJELA)
---
Imagine learning that your child, grandchild, or family friend vanished and having no idea where in the world they are and if they're being sold by sex traffickers.It makes your stomach churn just to think about such a thing. **[That is why I'm asking for your desperately needed financial support to assist in the rescue and return of children who have been trafficked. Please help with your most generous gift to the Sound of Freedom Foundation right away -- truly, you will be helping to save lives.](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5IhITm72nxqar&s=PPGPKBDJNAOCJELA)** Together, we can set them free!Many blessings,Eduardo Verastegui
_Sound of Freedom_ , Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5IiITm72nxqar&s=PPGPKBDJNAOCJELA)
---
5442 Thornwood Drive, San Jose CA 95123
---

PrudentPolitics.com

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

[You can read our Privacy Policy by clicking here](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5IjITm72nxqar&s=PPGPKBDJNAOCJELA)

[Click Here to unsubscribe from future emails](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/public/unsubscribe.jsp?gid=6400000706&uid=64007911625&mid=6400005874&sig=FEDGGNJJFFHAANGJ&l=D0I2xuec4yIteknop5I&slt=4)

_Fellow American,_

President Trump is getting things done at an incredible pace because he’s a successful businessman, not a politician! This is a refreshing change from career politicians who want to waste billions of dollars on a bloated federal bureaucracy.

And I, for one, can’t think of a better person to put in charge of cutting superfluous federal spending/jobs than one of the most successful people on the planet, Elon Musk. The American people are getting exactly what we voted for, and as an added bonus, two of the brightest minds in the nation are trimming the fat.

I want to know what you think: **[Is Elon Musk right to target USAID’s unscrupulous spending on foreign projects such as promoting trans rights in Serbia?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fc7d34ac310044b297da21c2833800d5&_e=c_uy5IbwTQhQeBlZ5rsd_RsuYDgwLSS6XpsbluexErenjny43hEQGYcuYC_N-rKqHyuEEn1QdDEzHhwM0PlRTcfKCBgw4lZAylIP5KK_GmPTStHXdshe_RsU91R7h3-ZU60RjKqp4RjRu3HMl09OhCFG0U0lgyaKOahgYqpndk7FczzCOtqKTM3YZe6P4fotd8viCgoa9GZO2HcI-WaJd2rasNErOh50uLgPf04U_fS4XFr99_CAEf233mbGeIGaax8rFFxoF406REKlSuuXuiE8GxomuopZXQ6FSYf-ortz5u9CYq4pjOSXKYfWLqtYC00z5eAAA3DZzRX1qMeRODH3RX0nL9w0mikZb32SsT_bS-cqqOx5oomYqjNhvJ6MUPfhgLRGhgUzTX1Gwv_Ul8yYZF9iF0KpTBkrTnIfI98easMtpRCLhSuOg-R4e9vwyUU5fyqzWAPZRWjIYY5zWlFYE85j1kwUAY-Mk8ThbmjovaH8tnY1wKDUyT_taf87avkHcltSp7Dc-itmskHI1o3HXuGkGA5FlGGymxXVkhU%3D) **

Beth Van Duyne
Member of Congress, TX-24

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.
