And I, for one, can’t think of a better person to put in charge of cutting superfluous federal spending/jobs than one of the most successful people on the planet, Elon Musk. The American people are getting exactly what we voted for, and as an added bonus, two of the brightest minds in the nation are trimming the fat. I want to know what you think: Thank you, Beth Van Duyne Member of Congress, TX-24 GET TO KNOW BETH: | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress. She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

name: Working Families Party
subject: This man thinks he owns the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Hey Peter, We’re making noise — and it’s working. [**Our petition to fire Elon Musk is taking _off_ , and the pressure on Congress is mounting.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o92rDg2XhEAJvsJFbdUoEPfHeyhplR8xlGYyiPdqSrTFjGFX-htWBGTsrWIlYXqb50GgzRviAo_NZdQVk_k8zrGnaHhJPSfSIrIgHb_7KSynWJiKuf2nPXHeHF0IJ9215byvvY2_UCQ5JSXF0IpF4FHjmkRol-WQ07XLuaq7vTXgquBB7SgdpwwzeQMnYj8YYcw98CgvM-fjNW-CxluLfQt0Y38MatjgfjWXyNwbbmRQYE5NpSh8AkFlWHeF0gG0geI/4dy/TJa8dwJ-QQavjfR6laYwow/h0/h001.A5Ee885T1r81-JHzPfu3nMVlYcCyhAWcvK2GeGOUAhA) But this fight hasn't been won yet. If you haven’t already signed, now is the time. Let’s make it clear: **we will not let billionaires wreck our democracy and steal from us in order to give themselves more tax cuts.** **[Sign the petition: Fire Elon Musk](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o92rDg2XhEAJvsJFbdUoEPfHeyhplR8xlGYyiPdqSrTFjGFX-htWBGTsrWIlYXqb50GgzRviAo_NZdQVk_k8zrGnRaA1QWH-Z6tdkD_8BNym-5I84n-003SHOmmFJ3oEmIUwHuzsHYA2Z1v3RYnHyyEwqw9QcIEsf4ubfpx-9Pdn-TU1D0gn20255Ay7NRZlslskvXMhIU_MG0-oVQA21xJQ993PaQkgB0QXGnYB6Cg2WSTwHZKpCUNjubKXeQSMCPA/4dy/TJa8dwJ-QQavjfR6laYwow/h1/h001.1McXfbulpI85b5MSKuoR33yvugQMItHk1k1WC_SccRs)** Then, take it even further: 📲 Text "**FIRE ELON** " to **30403** to be patched through directly to your Senator and demand they remove Musk from our federal government. ✍️ [**RSVP for our virtual phone bank on Tuesday, February 18 at 2PM, where we’ll flood House Republicans with calls to stop Musk’s cuts to the programs we rely on.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIx5E6Trs_eOoiZkm2IStbhHVY4alzyaScfTgeDa1JqHt2syWHNkJIxGVmyC0uc_4Uhwune8FKSzeleR7leJXKgbSBp11POks8V4CFx0B5MYGv7VcCICbyxhNwcmyP4CLAq8lOffUE_LqFmoMO8PiwjBFfp6RanLV102FXZkgLJRgv5J9B6aaejaAYJOKOIGNiWjhWECrTZDerwQUYOwQkH8ZAXDI_zgQXWDPQwl8IBY7M/4dy/TJa8dwJ-QQavjfR6laYwow/h2/h001.1DZe0C-KdG7ivpepA5nmZTEcC6Q7YlKoIDQz2ZLpf64) **[RSVP: Stop Elon’s Cuts Phonebank](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIx5E6Trs_eOoiZkm2IStbhHVY4alzyaScfTgeDa1JqHt2syWHNkJIxGVmyC0uc_4UhxMHnszy9H6AaPJydYR8LnFYXR7s8SeIxiEPd3iVBB8oVzgtM7HIEWmvqultC72QuBni8tz616sflCp1tPtUppiMWWf3P27WeJKReo7IrrpgXZqB8f1fVRxMBjnk7mFzisIWwxeWb8OVjnlgu1SHPBSM_9Zod12NUWCLXNo8hi_U/4dy/TJa8dwJ-QQavjfR6laYwow/h3/h001.Dvf0u0uZ618WQzFcgFNGEkAWWlFvqE4I6tnpny3vs28)** Musk is engaging in one of the biggest crime sprees in U.S. history, Peter. **Through DOGE, he’s trying to seize control of federal agencies** , in order to decide where our tax dollars _go_ , who gets _access_ to vital resources, and who gets _left behind_. And his plan to take over government to steal billions more for himself is already in _full_ swing:
* **Dismantling the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau** — the agency that’s returned _billions_ to people scammed by Big Banks and Big Tech.1
* **Cutting off USAID funds** , denying food, water, and medical aid to the world’s most dispossessed communities.2
* **Gutting the Department of Education** , canceling grants that fund public schools.3[****](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdUS12fSrk6MMZIR1Ut2K6f4HaggvXFIDN6dYvBRtyP8N86h_H-_HruOBeS7-zvp2TIFdAsn5DrMRW62OktuNEjA0bJGljajxu_yKjjtgRnx16Vex3PQwRaztLZC5jyjb8S-W7Twve2VKphcvXOX7CagJNwZQq3xudVXDEyrQgsXUJkAXoPg3k34QpUIjIiKMM9YDTCvJpV6XzmARds17aJRpRRakjFH5J3kybVcoIVT37OOXoNmbAoPj144pB0f4xsatAT4Z44-IhIUknv6DDLlEmpF4Y4C7tdF4SZRu-g0jbS6ZxdpERjGs1SVk26gKphEq52-DmvNpO12K04MWoTHsnr-Xq7nd6-HBLhaJV-K/4dy/TJa8dwJ-QQavjfR6laYwow/h4/h001.i7Q4NzjmEPDFNCRhfhhEWwHxrOCna4HaKmhYJFrFHYE)
* **Slashing the National Institutes of Health’s grant funding** , threatening to halt clinical trials and stall lifesaving medical research.4[****](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfjzgyvPQH6_f7u9kxp02vssinH9O1Aiih4GnE2kMx28-ZgexQ4_CVy_F-r0w_UxsiIak7ib_6QE5_2sAOtrJVpeV3cUuE0_Y759KAUXkyPm8DtjpsAc2tL2TOfUkw0-jLAG7GmxaNriQXrS6I6xa1XFLXCmW4rRrQzkwbYMJxe8khJ2s_zh7RsDNnMQDPkT_V15JAbANwa0unEBRxQQNdpzH4sUpVYY3FckzIHVJPgNXzdeudD3KFW23VGpzpjf6-BXRiJOPhxkap_7M7aYs7AAIAeBfKNWBFi6IWsCeQUrJV6WCy_b_X1zL095lZIZIg/4dy/TJa8dwJ-QQavjfR6laYwow/h5/h001.rL2qoQzh85zlJRIdZom7GQ6MI5Nahf9OTpMZ1xTaxEQ)
* Meanwhile, his company SpaceX just **pocketed another $38 million in federal contracts** — paid for with _our_ tax dollars.5

This isn’t just about Musk influencing policy. He’s _hijacking_ our government. **And now, he’s making it clear he doesn’t think the law applies to him.** Over the weekend, a federal judge _blocked_ DOGE’s access to the U.S. Treasury payments system after a lawsuit from New York Attorney General Letitia James and 18 other state AGs.6[****](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfp610-QnapMV3bmF0zLbEy5tHSClRp2E22IuzGx-IQ6J0WMIqMSk4-SdUFu_eTzIBrw2F1SfgWTVdev5u3uDa3cvSYMsJlGv7xtG98ues0_HFhYCNE_GquARDyphu3lNDIwQvq174FOAW6mHX9heUy6KZRElrumq8NGIQzNzNX0vmbUZIq-vtz4HrGGBFpIWcYnO0nBj7lL4yqAe-Mzl8DCUwRmEMihg_tAgn7y7hsldOIz-CEXtiMzApTF4pSAwLzYVL4Rd5FAujTOcR3QrFjitGNNHxNtYU0mMXuRg0pf2rfp9LDUAxn_xAOrgBq37rUbKqpuzRBzYonoCbFze1GUduGTj7IhhlpiQr4q0P0kqYxx4R26rYZeIpSjj-_cdP7KO2b8OCA4I4KsHhCdNoY/4dy/TJa8dwJ-QQavjfR6laYwow/h6/h001.JyOY9ZOGO4E9mzUVtTpOACCNYwHMqht9OMzlq1DIq6c) Musk’s response? **He and his D.C. allies are openly threatening to _defy_ the courts.7**[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1TtHlA5iTELuA_z8yNbDZy1cg6ai8DWAX3TEr0P_3RKLCxIYJzNrun6YjvWKtUqWOxL7XZI2L2N6gppGudnwNjOXgWOGKIJ97xTKNuwg8TANWI9Nai_TLcOzIWJac1V3MJW4YiAY8-UaMyEpG857DIC2ctEJKk441TUlIuc36ToNKMQEszah4KcX8k-9PolYO4ZH-qU3domrTAIUSE6-lkuhX9rzU1GxYrCB1YqES1axLPTfHiGM5Hdfg07afqBkRaFrCMGogfrFa3FNqrmVO1W8iWUsVqpPi-x8yKNl4JVlWwPBpCy5gZ9ZM9stIeiZmWhEoBUzE3SdHKgiBTqM6OS2Sfodj5Ao4BAtN8N1aaL7hJbnn7LueDs8EE35NLZ994/4dy/TJa8dwJ-QQavjfR6laYwow/h7/h001.Rj0JZ2J_wKT_NmfAxoSu0ye0n3X7pnvu5Y511gfV09Q) They don’t think the law applies to them. They think they can get away with it. They think we won’t fight back. So let’s prove them _wrong_. **If you haven't yet:**
* [**Sign the petition to fire Elon Musk.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o92rDg2XhEAJvsJFbdUoEPfHeyhplR8xlGYyiPdqSrTFjGFX-htWBGTsrWIlYXqb50GgzRviAo_NZdQVk_k8zrGnOZrtlvq2UzhjnN7CkHsmvxD58LuPCOJ6ujJKc5qUwjRHKNPpIsb83i70CPEcey1__PQS33CloGtxQTsJO6yTbgdA5S_8fVYk8HypwJQr_Yu1wbTk6hlB8d9jewsPMej_GTKZEzM8gElwr8nzx60Wi_Pu5EdpQ-Krnk54ih3up-M/4dy/TJa8dwJ-QQavjfR6laYwow/h8/h001.tXSNgARlLVuGBgr94o0Bs4Uq2oVGrrBs7FesPNHkuYM)

* [**Join our phone bank on Tuesday, February 18 at 2PM**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIx5E6Trs_eOoiZkm2IStbhHVY4alzyaScfTgeDa1JqHt2syWHNkJIxGVmyC0uc_4UhfMkyAQqioX4RoE4eYNl_1ZXU9tEcM8Z5Z1Xe3f8WJXcjUqSSv5FVe2zAqYrIl6w2mvhsp0RZ3Hk0Sf_3Y8WE0b5CHhV58GgFxurLD8DjjM9vxaKVQOnecKUB4HZaDqdggUUQJ37OxJFAbb8XNCzxYbXezvHDpkUHJ3Z3NtQbqDY/4dy/TJa8dwJ-QQavjfR6laYwow/h11/h001.oP1yKiGQa1KPf2ZKqS7Cf0ov2SFGzD30ZkMEiv-2Nxs) and tell House Republicans: Stop Musk’s cuts.

clean_body: | | | Hey Peter, We’re making noise — and it’s working. But this fight hasn't been won yet. If you haven’t already signed, now is the time. Let’s make it clear: we will not let billionaires wreck our democracy and steal from us in order to give themselves more tax cuts. Then, take it even further: 📲 Text "FIRE ELON " to 30403 to be patched through directly to your Senator and demand they remove Musk from our federal government. ✍️ Musk is engaging in one of the biggest crime sprees in U.S. history, Peter. Through DOGE, he’s trying to seize control of federal agencies , in order to decide where our tax dollars go , who gets access to vital resources, and who gets left behind. And his plan to take over government to steal billions more for himself is already in full swing: Dismantling the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau — the agency that’s returned billions to people scammed by Big Banks and Big Tech.1 Cutting off USAID funds , denying food, water, and medical aid to the world’s most dispossessed communities.2 Gutting the Department of Education , canceling grants that fund public schools.3 Slashing the National Institutes of Health’s grant funding , threatening to halt clinical trials and stall lifesaving medical research.4 Meanwhile, his company SpaceX just pocketed another $38 million in federal contracts — paid for with our tax dollars.5 This isn’t just about Musk influencing policy. He’s hijacking our government. And now, he’s making it clear he doesn’t think the law applies to him. Over the weekend, a federal judge blocked DOGE’s access to the U.S. Treasury payments system after a lawsuit from New York Attorney General Letitia James and 18 other state AGs.6 Musk’s response? He and his D.C. allies are openly threatening to defy the courts.7 They don’t think the law applies to them. They think they can get away with it. They think we won’t fight back. So let’s prove them wrong. If you haven't yet: Text"MUSK" to30403 and get patched through to your Senator to tell them directly: Get Musk out of our government. and tell House Republicans: Stop Musk’s cuts. Remember, Peter:we are the 99% — we are the masses. And when we show up, we win. In solidarity and resistance, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The Washington Post, February 11, 2025. 2\. , NBC News, February 3, 2025. 3\. , The New York Times, February 11, 2025. 4\. , BBC News , February 7, 2025. 5\. , ABC News , February 10, 2025. 6\. , NBC News , February 7, 2025. 7\. , Associated Press , February 9, 2025. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. I’ll be honest with you: **My top priority is fighting to help people in the Bronx struggling to make ends meet, people scraping by on minimum wage to provide for their families, like I once did.**

But I don’t do a minute of call time, Peter. This is a campaign _by_ and _for_ the people, and I need your grassroots support to keep it that way.

name: Team Kaptur HQ
subject: Cutting once in a generation investments
body:
Friend, Trump's decision to freeze all infrastructure investments takes us backward, not forward.

| |
---
Friend, One of President Trump's first actions in office was to freeze all federal spending from the Inflation Reduction Act and the landmark bipartisan infrastructure bill that have been rebuilding communities like ours. Actions like these don't move our country forward; they take us backward. These bills are responsible for once-in-a-generation investments in American communities. They've put thousands of people back to work in the good-paying jobs of the future. They've fixed our crumbling roads and bridges and delivered critical safety upgrades to our nation's railways. They're replacing harmful lead pipes in drinking water systems across the country. If we're not going to invest in our people and our communities, friend, who will? Marcy was a champion for these bills, and she's brought hundreds of millions of dollars in federal investment home to Northwest Ohio over the past several years. She'll never sell out working families to appease the special interest groups. But right now, Marcy needs our help. The fight ahead of us is tougher than ever, and last year Republican dark money groups made our race one of the most expensive in the nation. **[Can you chip in $5, or whatever you can spare, to keep Marcy in Congress, fighting for Northwest Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102018375/527819362/1039792322?refcode=250212_hq_infra_l1&ms=250212_hq_infra&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVlYTU4ZC04MmU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z0PLYd206xC4GyIGHkoWMwXOBWQwXLhpoMQtJ7hO8gY=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102018382/527819369/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250212_hq_infra&ms=250212_hq_infra&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVlYTU4ZC04MmU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z0PLYd206xC4GyIGHkoWMwXOBWQwXLhpoMQtJ7hO8gY=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102018383/527819370/1039792322?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250212_hq_infra&ms=250212_hq_infra&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVlYTU4ZC04MmU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z0PLYd206xC4GyIGHkoWMwXOBWQwXLhpoMQtJ7hO8gY=)

### About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. name: Deb Haaland
subject: I have exciting news, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Ro said I could reach out with some exciting news:

Yesterday, I announced that I’m running for governor of the great state of New Mexico — my home — to bring our state together and build a bright future for all who live here.

I’m humbly asking: Will you join by donating just $3 or more to my campaign and Ro Khanna now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna?amount=3]

The amount you give doesn’t matter. What matters is building a campaign with the support of real people. That’s who I am and who I came from. That’s who I am running to serve.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna]

As a 35th-generation New Mexican, I know firsthand the struggles that New Mexicans face. I understand what it's like to be a single mother, having to decide between rent and groceries, struggling to keep a roof over your head.

I’m running to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids.

My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crimes so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state.

The solutions are there if we are bold enough to fight for them.

But we know we’ll have to build a strong campaign to get the future we deserve. So, will you become one of our first donors with a contribution to my campaign and Ro Khanna? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna]

DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna?amount=3]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna?amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna?amount=250]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna]

With your donation, we can reach voters across New Mexico with our message.

Thank you for your generosity and support.

Be fierce,
Deb

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms-dh-em-ro-khanna?amount=10]

I understand what it's like to be a single mother, having to decide between rent and groceries, struggling to keep a roof over your head. I’m running to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids. My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crimes so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state. The solutions are there if we are bold enough to fight for them. But we know we’ll have to build a strong campaign to get the future we deserve. So, will you become one of our first donors with a contribution to my campaign and Ro Khanna? [] DONATE $3 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [] With your donation, we can reach voters across New Mexico with our message. Thank you for your generosity and support. Be fierce, Deb DONATE [] [] [] [] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com] [] Ro for Congress P.O Box 3513 Santa Clara, CA 95051 United States Paid for by Ro for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

_– Emilia Sykes for Congress_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I have exciting news, Peter
body:
I'm launching my campaign for governor of the great state of New Mexico. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102019114/527822270/-847979181?refcode=WUEFH223_20250212_DHxEL_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055697&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTZlMWI1ZS04NGU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjqCZxoPeTSeqPwGeg-tZqsnVIAz0STdDuAwsUrCRso=) My friends at EMILYs List said I could reach out with some exciting news, Peter:

Yesterday, I launched my campaign for governor of the great state of New Mexico — my home — to bring our state together and build a bright future for all who live here. And today, EMILYs List endorsed me. I couldn't be more grateful for their support.

So I'm humbly asking: [**Will you join us by splitting a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102019115/527822298/-847979181?refcode=WUEFH223_20250212_DHxEL_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055697&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTZlMWI1ZS04NGU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjqCZxoPeTSeqPwGeg-tZqsnVIAz0STdDuAwsUrCRso=) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102019116/527822299/-847979181?refcode=WUEFH223_20250212_DHxEL_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055697&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTZlMWI1ZS04NGU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjqCZxoPeTSeqPwGeg-tZqsnVIAz0STdDuAwsUrCRso=)
---
The amount you give doesn't matter. What matters is building a campaign with the support of real people. That's who I am and who I came from. That's who I am running to serve.

My roots in New Mexico run 35 generations deep. The Pueblo people were the first farmers in the high deserts of New Mexico, an agriculture tradition that still continues today.

I am here because of my grandfather, who worked for decades as a diesel mechanic on the railroad. Somehow he also kept a field — picking worms off the corn as it grew, like the generations before him.

I am here because of my grandmother, a survivor and a caretaker who woke up every day before the sun. She was the one who gave me my true love of cooking New Mexican cuisine. (She wouldn't let us in the kitchen while she cooked, but I'd perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours.)

I am here because of my parents and their sacrifice. My mother, a Pueblo woman, served in the Navy. My father, a Marine, received a Silver Star for his service in Vietnam. He now lies in honor at Arlington.

I am here because of my beloved child, who I raised on my own. I started a small business to pay the bills, but it still wasn't always enough. We relied on food stamps to get on our feet. I sometimes had to decide between paying rent and buying groceries to feed our family. I will never forget how that felt or the kindness of those who helped us — strangers who became community. When I look at my Somah, I see perseverance, strength and hope.

These are my stories.

These are stories of New Mexico.

These days, our differences are blown so far out of proportion. We lose sight of a simple fact: we all live in the same state, together. All of us in New Mexico come from love, survival, and sacrifice. We all want to live good lives — and we want even more for our children.

The current president and his billionaire friends look at the lands and the people of this country and think: What can I exploit?

I am running to ask: If we come together in New Mexico, what good can we do for each other and for the next generation?

We have our work cut out for us. The cost of living is crushing our families. Our economy is growing, but we need to make sure everyone shares in our progress. Our families need more. Our farmers and ranchers need more. New Mexico's children need so much more. And we must be good stewards of the Earth, and preserve the rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests whose beauty sustains our communities.

I am running to do all this and more. I am running to serve all New Mexicans and make sure we're leaving a better future for our children.
[**Will you join us with a donation, split between my campaign and EMILYs List?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102019117/527822300/-847979181?refcode=WUEFH223_20250212_DHxEL_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055697&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTZlMWI1ZS04NGU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjqCZxoPeTSeqPwGeg-tZqsnVIAz0STdDuAwsUrCRso=) I would be honored to have your support.

[DONATE $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102019126/527822309/-847979181?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=WUEFH223_20250212_DHxEL_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055697&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTZlMWI1ZS04NGU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjqCZxoPeTSeqPwGeg-tZqsnVIAz0STdDuAwsUrCRso=) | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102019129/527822311/-847979181?refcode=WUEFH223_20250212_DHxEL_PL_MO_v1s2&sourceid=1055697&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTZlMWI1ZS04NGU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjqCZxoPeTSeqPwGeg-tZqsnVIAz0STdDuAwsUrCRso=)
Many thanks to EMILYs List for their early support. I hope you'll join us, Peter!

Be fierce,

clean_body: I'm launching my campaign for governor of the great state of New Mexico. | = My friends at EMILYs List said I could reach out with some exciting news, Peter: Yesterday, I launched my campaign for governor of the great state of New Mexico — my home — to bring our state together and build a bright future for all who live here. And today, EMILYs List endorsed me. I couldn't be more grateful for their support. So I'm humbly asking: = | = The amount you give doesn't matter. What matters is building a campaign with the support of real people. That's who I am and who I came from. That's who I am running to serve. My roots in New Mexico run 35 generations deep. The Pueblo people were the first farmers in the high deserts of New Mexico, an agriculture tradition that still continues today. I am here because of my grandfather, who worked for decades as a diesel mechanic on the railroad. Somehow he also kept a field — picking worms off the corn as it grew, like the generations before him. I am here because of my grandmother, a survivor and a caretaker who woke up every day before the sun. She was the one who gave me my true love of cooking New Mexican cuisine. (She wouldn't let us in the kitchen while she cooked, but I'd perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours.) I am here because of my parents and their sacrifice. My mother, a Pueblo woman, served in the Navy. My father, a Marine, received a Silver Star for his service in Vietnam. He now lies in honor at Arlington. I am here because of my beloved child, who I raised on my own. I started a small business to pay the bills, but it still wasn't always enough. We relied on food stamps to get on our feet. I sometimes had to decide between paying rent and buying groceries to feed our family. I will never forget how that felt or the kindness of those who helped us — strangers who became community. When I look at my Somah, I see perseverance, strength and hope. These are my stories. These are stories of New Mexico. These days, our differences are blown so far out of proportion. We lose sight of a simple fact: we all live in the same state, together. All of us in New Mexico come from love, survival, and sacrifice. We all want to live good lives — and we want even more for our children. The current president and his billionaire friends look at the lands and the people of this country and think: What can I exploit? I am running to ask: If we come together in New Mexico, what good can we do for each other and for the next generation? We have our work cut out for us. The cost of living is crushing our families. Our economy is growing, but we need to make sure everyone shares in our progress. Our families need more. Our farmers and ranchers need more. New Mexico's children need so much more. And we must be good stewards of the Earth, and preserve the rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests whose beauty sustains our communities. I am running to do all this and more. I am running to serve all New Mexicans and make sure we're leaving a better future for our children. = I would be honored to have your support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Many thanks to EMILYs List for their early support. I hope you'll join us, Peter! Be fierce, Deb = = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: Rushern Stands with Federal Workforce
body:
Rushern Baker has REAL support planned for Federal Workers | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67ad0fb4277e7a1704469ab7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rushernbaker.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67abee44f6c6e56717d4f9f7%26ss_email_id%3D67ad0fb4277e7a1704469ab7%26ss_campaign_name%3DRushern%2BStands%2Bwith%2BFederal%2BWorkforce%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-02-12T21%253A16%253A57Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67abee44f6c6e56717d4f9f7&l=en-US&s=hzXaI06QPVBQkH4T3onv-WItFbU%3D)
---
| | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67ad0fb4277e7a1704469ab7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rushernbaker.com%2Flinks%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67abee44f6c6e56717d4f9f7%26ss_email_id%3D67ad0fb4277e7a1704469ab7%26ss_campaign_name%3DRushern%2BStands%2Bwith%2BFederal%2BWorkforce%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-02-12T21%253A16%253A57Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67abee44f6c6e56717d4f9f7&l=en-US&s=bFwGPNQKKxJhMQRQNbIwuovRwOw%3D)
---
Prince Georgians,The chaos impacting this Administration’s federal workforce is felt deeply in our community. Prince George’s County is home to more than 70,000 federal employees. As a lifelong public servant, I understand the vital role federal workers play in sustaining our communities. I am committed to standing with the federal employees and I have a real plan that supports and uplifts these employees and their families.Our focused responses includes: **Immediate Support
** We will establish rapid response teams, provide financial counseling, career transition resources, and emergency support programs. By coordinating available resources, we will ensure swift and effective assistance for affected employees.**Economic Protection
** To safeguard financial stability, we will work with local banks on federal worker assistance programs, support small business resilience, and expand workforce development opportunities. Protecting essential services through emergency assistance programs will be a priority.**Available Resources
** Federal employees will have access to essential support, including Office of Personnel Management (OPM) guidance, the Federal Employee Education & Assistance Fund, Employee Assistance Program (EAP) services, and federal credit union programs. Locally, Prince George’s County will strengthen its Financial Empowerment Center, enhance emergency assistance programs, and expand workforce development services.**Leadership in Action
** We will advocate for federal workers by coordinating with federal agencies, our Congressional delegation, employee organizations, and union leadership. Maintaining regular communication will ensure our policies reflect their needs.**Stay Informed
** We will provide updates through a county website portal, social media, email newsletters, community bulletins, and agency communications. Keeping everyone informed will help us build a stronger support system.Federal workers are essential to our community, and I am committed to ensuring they receive the respect, protection, and support they deserve. I will work tirelessly to implement these policies and create a stable and prosperous future for all.**What You Can Do NOW:**
* [**Vote**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67ad0fb4277e7a1704469ab7&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rushernbaker.com%2Flinks%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67abee44f6c6e56717d4f9f7%26ss_email_id%3D67ad0fb4277e7a1704469ab7%26ss_campaign_name%3DRushern%2BStands%2Bwith%2BFederal%2BWorkforce%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-02-12T21%253A16%253A57Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67abee44f6c6e56717d4f9f7&l=en-US&s=bFwGPNQKKxJhMQRQNbIwuovRwOw%3D)**.** Your ballot has already been mailed to you. clean_body: Rushern Baker has REAL support planned for Federal Workers | | | | | Prince Georgians,The chaos impacting this Administration’s federal workforce is felt deeply in our community. Prince George’s County is home to more than 70,000 federal employees. As a lifelong public servant, I understand the vital role federal workers play in sustaining our communities. I am committed to standing with the federal employees and I have a real plan that supports and uplifts these employees and their families.Our focused responses includes: Immediate Support We will establish rapid response teams, provide financial counseling, career transition resources, and emergency support programs. By coordinating available resources, we will ensure swift and effective assistance for affected employees.Economic Protection To safeguard financial stability, we will work with local banks on federal worker assistance programs, support small business resilience, and expand workforce development opportunities. Protecting essential services through emergency assistance programs will be a priority.Available Resources Federal employees will have access to essential support, including Office of Personnel Management (OPM) guidance, the Federal Employee Education & Assistance Fund, Employee Assistance Program (EAP) services, and federal credit union programs. Locally, Prince George’s County will strengthen its Financial Empowerment Center, enhance emergency assistance programs, and expand workforce development services.Leadership in Action We will advocate for federal workers by coordinating with federal agencies, our Congressional delegation, employee organizations, and union leadership. Maintaining regular communication will ensure our policies reflect their needs.Stay Informed We will provide updates through a county website portal, social media, email newsletters, community bulletins, and agency communications. Keeping everyone informed will help us build a stronger support system.Federal workers are essential to our community, and I am committed to ensuring they receive the respect, protection, and support they deserve. I will work tirelessly to implement these policies and create a stable and prosperous future for all.What You Can Do NOW: . Your ballot has already been mailed to you. Volunteer. Join Team Baker / See opportunities below. . Every dollar helps. $5, $25, $50 makes a HUGE difference. There is a way forward. I have the vision and the experience to help address our most pressing issues. With your support, we can build a stronger, more resilient Prince George’s County.Thank you for your support | Rushern L. Baker III** Candidate for County ExecutiveP.S. Don’t forget to tune into tonight’s televised debate on WJLA 7. name: AOC
subject: Some good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
There's still damage done, but it's a step.
#
I got this question on Instagram the other night:
Let me give you some good news: **The courts are already starting to roll in the injunctions**.
For people that are saying, “Oh, you can't do that, that's illegal. It's not helpful” — I hear you and understand that.
But it is important to understand that **the courts are doing their work, and it is having an effect**.
The birthright citizenship executive order was halted in the courts.
Importantly, the AFL-CIO issued a lawsuit around Elon Musk's invasion into these federal departments — including the Department of Labor — and the courts issued a pause.
And so this raiding of federal government agencies has come to a _pause_.
There's still damage done — but **it's stopped for now, which is a step**.
But our movement for real progress will have to **push harder than ever** these next four years.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250212.uV9gmN&refcode=em20250212-8135-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8135%2E2526796%2EaVkniV)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250212.uV9gmN&refcode=em20250212-8135-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8135%2E2526796%2EaVkniV)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250212?refcode=em20250212-8135-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=8135_2526796_aVkniV&akid=8135%2E2526796%2EaVkniV)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250212-8135-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=8135%2E2526796%2EaVkniV)**

She was barely confirmed with a 52-48 vote, and has been polarizing due to her interactions abroad. **I need your help this April 1st to ensure we flip the seats necessary to check Trump’s appointments.**
---

While some argue that her unconventional perspectives could bring a fresh approach to the intelligence community, others are concerned about her limited experience in intelligence operations and her previous engagements with controversial figures. It's crucial to recognize that the role of DNI is pivotal in shaping our national security policies and ensuring the safety of our nation, **something Gabbard could jeopardize with her harsh stance on international politics.**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I’m appalled.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
One of my Republican colleagues in the House sent out a fundraising email this week calling for my deportation
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1509%2E791427%2EViUReq)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250212-1-120&t=2&akid=1509%2E791427%2EViUReq)
Friend — it’s Ilhan Omar. I’m appalled.
**One of my Republican colleagues in the House, Rep. Brandon Gill, sent out a fundraising email this week calling for my deportation, and asking his supporters to sign a petition to make it happen.**
Take a look for yourself at what he sent:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250212-1-120&t=3&akid=1509%2E791427%2EViUReq)
**_Reprehensible, racist, and un-American.**_ The email went on to say that I was “facilitating a full-scale invasion of our country," and that I am committing “treason.”
Threatening to deport legal US citizens because you disagree with them is fascism. Full stop. But I expect nothing less from the GOP under Trump and Elon Musk.
**Friend, it’s clear that the far-right has been emboldened and out of control since Trump took office.**
Just look at what they are doing to our federal government.
Elon Musk is illegally slashing crucial agencies and programs while protecting funding for his companies, like SpaceX. They’re scaling back the core functions of our government so they can line the pockets of their billionaire friends. It’s like the wildest dreams of the ultra-rich finally coming true.
Our best response to the far-right in this moment is to organize all of our people, all our resources, all of the tools we have at our disposal, to stand against Trump’s administration.
**[If that sounds like a plan to you, please, make a contribution to my campaign so we can continue to fight back. We are organizing to block Trump’s agenda in every way we can, but we need your help to get it done.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250212-1-120&t=4&akid=1509%2E791427%2EViUReq)

**Patriot, this is Tom Cotton, U.S. Senator for Arkansas and Chairman of the Senate GOP Conference.** I’m a sixth-generation Arkansan, born and raised on my family’s cattle farm in Yell County. After 9/11, I joined the U.S. Army. I served in combat and with the Old Guard at Arlington National Cemetery. I’m also a proud husband and father to two boys. clean_body: Let me explain| | | Patriot, this is Tom Cotton, U.S. Senator for Arkansas and Chairman of the Senate GOP Conference. I’m a sixth-generation Arkansan, born and raised on my family’s cattle farm in Yell County. After 9/11, I joined the U.S. Army. I served in combat and with the Old Guard at Arlington National Cemetery. I’m also a proud husband and father to two boys. In the Senate, I’m fighting to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks and make America strong again — I held the line against Joe Biden and Kamala Harris... I exposed their open borders insanity, called out their soft-on-crime agenda, and fought to get anti-America propaganda out of our schools and military. Now, my mission is simple: implement President Trump’s agenda, confirm President Trump’s nominees, and put America first. Democrats and their Marxist Left pals are going to come after me with everything they’ve got. They’ve spent YEARS making up lies and smears about me — and so have their cronies in the liberal media. In the fight to make America strong again and put Americans first, we must never retreat. We must never surrender. We must never back down. In service, Tom Cotton | | Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any Service Branch. PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE.

name: Sam Hodder
subject: Ours to protect: Standing together for public lands and park programs
body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102019974/527824759/779512579?utm_campaign=an-sam-021225&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNjUyNGQ4LTg3ZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rKty-lKXD6nWEOaQjZc3RuDjyuMy-sKzudOp9JmNjKs=&emci=27fbe050-cae8-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8e6524d8-87e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=1504551)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102019975/527824760/779512579?utm_campaign=an-sam-021225&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNjUyNGQ4LTg3ZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rKty-lKXD6nWEOaQjZc3RuDjyuMy-sKzudOp9JmNjKs=&emci=27fbe050-cae8-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8e6524d8-87e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=1504551)
| | Dear Peter,
---
The past few weeks have brought a flurry of executive orders, federal funding freezes, and policy shifts that could alter the future of our shared public lands, including our treasured redwood forests.

In this time of rapid change and uncertainty, one thing is clear: Save the Redwoods League remains committed to protecting these irreplaceable landscapes, advocating for outdoor access for all, and ensuring that redwood forests continue to provide clean water, wildlife habitat, climate resilience, and community well-being for generations to come. Standing firm in our commitments, we will navigate uncertainty with focus and continue to engage our full community in our ambitious conservation vision.

The League is closely monitoring threats to critical projects and trusted partners to determine the actual risk and necessary response. Key issues on our watch list include:
* **Preserving the Antiquities Act:** Maintaining the Antiquities Act as it currently exists while preserving all of its achievements to date. Since its passage in 1906, the Antiquities Act has safeguarded iconic places such as Muir Woods National Monument.
* **Honoring federal commitments:** Ensuring that existing federal grants, contracts, and funding commitments—including those made to Tribal partners—are upheld to support land stewardship and conservation.
* **Maintaining a strong federal workforce:** Mitigating uncertainty for federal employees whose work on the ground is essential to redwood forest restoration, land management, and the visitor experience in our treasured national parks and public lands.

Most pressingly, we are tracking threats to the **Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF)** and the **Great American Outdoors Act National Parks and Public Land Legacy Restoration Fund (GAOA LRF).** These federal programs have played a vital role in protecting redwood forests and are essential to ongoing conservation projects.

The Land and Water Conservation Fund is a cornerstone of U.S. conservation efforts. Backed by offshore energy receipts, it funds land protection, public access, and outdoor recreation without using taxpayer dollars. The LWCF has funded transformative League projects such as the protection of [Lost Coast Redwoods](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102019976/527824761/-2053790198?utm_campaign=an-sam-021225&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNjUyNGQ4LTg3ZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rKty-lKXD6nWEOaQjZc3RuDjyuMy-sKzudOp9JmNjKs=&emci=27fbe050-cae8-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8e6524d8-87e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=1504551), acquisitions that expanded Redwood National and State Parks, and the addition of groves to Giant Sequoia National Monument.

The GAOA LRF provides crucial investments in infrastructure and the maintenance of our national parks and public lands. The program supports the League’s [Redwoods Rising](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102019977/527824762/-463667376?utm_campaign=an-sam-021225&utm_source=ea-pr&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlNjUyNGQ4LTg3ZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rKty-lKXD6nWEOaQjZc3RuDjyuMy-sKzudOp9JmNjKs=&emci=27fbe050-cae8-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8e6524d8-87e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=1504551) initiative to provide critical forest restoration within Redwood National and State Parks.

The Great American Outdoors Act also guarantees permanent federal funding for the LWCF, reinforcing a longstanding bipartisan commitment to protecting public lands. Any pause in this funding would undermine this commitment, jeopardizing land conservation, park development, and outdoor access nationwide. It would also threaten local economies, rural jobs, and the $1.2 trillion outdoor recreation industry, which currently supports 5 million jobs and countless communities.

With so much at stake, the League is carefully tracking these issues and assessing impacts to forest conservation and public access. In the weeks ahead, we will be calling on you and our broader community to speak up in support of these critical resources and funding commitments.

With the unwavering support of our community and strong partnerships, we are prepared to navigate these challenges. Together, we will ensure that redwood forests continue to thrive for the benefit of all.

With gratitude,
| |

---|---
Sam Hodder
President and CEO
Save the Redwoods League

name: BDP
subject: BREAKING: Three toss-up seats
body:
New ratings!

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12724132?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

Over the last several days, I have stayed very busy with committee meetings and other engagements in Tallahassee. My fellow legislators and I are working tirelessly to serve our state and individual communities. I’m proud to have filed several important bills for this upcoming legislative session that will help keep Floridians safe, address the personnel shortage in our laboratory industry, push back against oppressive property taxes, and more. As the legislative session approaches, I look forward to keeping you updated on the status of my bills.

My office is here to serve you! Please do not hesitate to [contact my team and me](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=a6c9999cd5&e=d1c1b9864f) if you need assistance with anything. We would be happy to help in any way we can!
---
| | **Tuesday, February 4 - Justice Budget Subcommittee Meeting**
---
| It was great to sit on the Justice Budget Subcommittee last Tuesday, where a panel from the Department of Corrections and the Department of Juvenile Justice discussed staffing trends, mental health services, community supervision services, and education programs.
---
| | **Wednesday, February 5 - More Meetings in Tallahassee**
---
| Last Wednesday morning, I joined my fellow legislators on the Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee to discuss the state’s role in energy, transportation, and broadband planning.
---
|
---
_Rep. Chamberlin with representatives from the Florida Apartment Association._
| Following my committee meeting, I had the pleasure of meeting with the Florida Apartment Association to discuss their legislative priorities for the upcoming legislative session.
---
|
---
_Rep. Chamberlin with representatives from the Florida Association of Post-Secondary Schools and Colleges._
| I then had the honor of meeting with the Florida Association of Post-Secondary Schools and Colleges to discuss legislative priorities and the appropriations request that they will be bringing forward this upcoming legislative session.

That afternoon, I sat on the Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee, where we learned from a panel discussion on county constitutional officer budgets and budget appeal processes.
---
|
---
_Rep. Chamberlin with Dr. Caleb Hudgins and other members of the OBSI
Project team._
| I also had the opportunity to meet with Dr. Caleb Hudgins, Director of Grants and Analytics for the [OBSI Project](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=d9574833c4&e=d1c1b9864f), and other team members to discuss their project and the appropriations request that they will be bringing forward this upcoming legislative session.
---
|
---
_Rep. Chamberlin with representatives from the Rock Program in Marion County._
| I then met with Marion County locals and good friends Rondo and Troy from the Rock Program. It was great to hear their story and the amazing things they do for our community back home.

To end the day, I joined my fellow House members on the Human Services Subcommittee, where we had a workshop on persons with developmental disabilities and heard from a panel on the implementation of [SB 1758 (2024)](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=56e582b65e&e=d1c1b9864f).
---
| | **Update on My Legislation for the 2025 Legislative Session**
---
|
---
| My bill, [HB 113 - Fleeing or Attempting to Elude a Law Enforcement Officer](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=cab136c664&e=d1c1b9864f), was added to the Criminal Justice Subcommittee agenda to be heard. I presented this bill to the subcommittee earlier this afternoon.
---
| | **Florida House of Representatives: Week in Review**
---
| We have had a productive several days in Tallahassee, and I want to ensure the district stays informed and knows that the Florida House is working hard for all Floridians. Please click **[here](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=d60aea8e97&e=d1c1b9864f)** to read the Florida House’s Week in Review newsletter to learn more about what we accomplished for our state and communities last week.
---
|
---
| | Thank you for reading, and I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Have a great rest of your week!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=dc8b094278) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=dc8b094278).

---

Grocery costs are too high.
Insurance costs are too high.
Childcare costs are too high.
Utility costs are too high.

clean_body: | = = Unelected, unaccountable and out of control billionaires are buying power and influence in Trump’s Washington, Peter. What kind of America are we trying to create? Housing costs are too high. Grocery costs are too high. Insurance costs are too high. Childcare costs are too high. Utility costs are too high. America is too expensive, Peter. It is not acceptable — in the wealthiest country in the history of the world — for countless families to be forced to live paycheck to paycheck. As Trump's Billionaire-First agenda takes shape and his wealthy benefactors claim exclusive access to our democracy, Democrats are the only ones committed to lowering costs for hardworking taxpayers. Here's my question for you, Peter: Are we going to allow Republicans to spend the next four years building a country of the billionaires, by the billionaires and for the billionaires? Or are we going to stand together, build a strong foundation to fight back against the greed and corruption of extreme MAGA Republicans and the billionaire class? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Fair Shot PAC and DCCC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Fair Shot PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | mailto:info@fairshotpac.org | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

We need your help to make sure Abigail has the resources to reach every voter, mobilize our grassroots supporters, and flip this toss-up seat blue.

---

African entrepreneur, Magatte Wade **[exploded at Democrat Rep. Jamie Raskin](https://substack.com/redirect/fd6aad1b-ce6b-4f99-90d6-ee0536c8821f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for whining about Elon Musk's slashes to the federal government.
"I don;'t hear government working for the people, I hear government working for government!!" Wade told Raskin and other democrat lawmakers.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fd6aad1b-ce6b-4f99-90d6-ee0536c8821f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fd6aad1b-ce6b-4f99-90d6-ee0536c8821f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Wade, a Senegalese entrepreneur, responded to Raskin's tirade against Elon Musk and President Trump's recent targeting and slashing of government agencies such as USAID.
"Musk, he's got all the power of the president! Donald Trump himself could not be doing what Elon Musk is doing in Washington today!" Raskin said.
**[Wade called Raskin right out for the absurdity of his grievances.](https://substack.com/redirect/fd6aad1b-ce6b-4f99-90d6-ee0536c8821f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "These regulations were not put in place with us in mind!" she explained. "Mr. Raskin, the whole time we've been here, you've just been complaining about 'the process'... Isn't the end game the stuff that would make the American people better off? Isn't it?!!"
"No! I hear you saying that the stuff that would make us better off doesn't matter! **[all you care about is'the process'!'" she continued. ](https://substack.com/redirect/fd6aad1b-ce6b-4f99-90d6-ee0536c8821f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch her completely lose it at Raskin and the insufferable democrats:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fd6aad1b-ce6b-4f99-90d6-ee0536c8821f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**

# **Trump warns reporter that all bets are off with Hamas: "Let HELL break out!"**
President Donald Trump **[warned reporters](https://substack.com/redirect/659baaea-5eba-457d-8d87-9f96713ac715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that if all Hamas hostages weren't returned by "Saturday at 12 o'clock" that "all hell would break out."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/659baaea-5eba-457d-8d87-9f96713ac715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/659baaea-5eba-457d-8d87-9f96713ac715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
During the Oval Office press conference, Trump described the terrible condition of the hostages returned thus far, saying some of them were unrecognizable and it was reminiscent of Holocaust concentration camps.
"What a sad thing," Trump said. "If all hostages aren't returned by Saturday at 12 o'clock, I think it's an appropriate time, then I'd say cancel it and let all hell break out."
"I don't think their going to do it," Trump added. "I think a lot of the hostages are dead... These are sick people."
Watch Trump's cryptic warning here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/659baaea-5eba-457d-8d87-9f96713ac715?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Do you know why I started JanePAC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102020554/527826862/1328794144?refcode=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkN2Q1N2IwLThhZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XTdbp9UAmisQ0iAPUgKRb8r01ZPF0q_w9RuIxzisYSY=&emci=bdcb5368-65e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)
---
With all of Trump’s reckless acts so far as president, it’s easy to feel discouraged. But in moments like this, I remind myself that there’s immense power when people come together to demand change. I hope this email inspires you as I tell you why I started JanePAC and what we’re fighting for together. But before I dive into the backstory, can I ask for your support? **[Just a few dollars today could help us power the climate fight in 2025.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102020555/527826863/2105508926?refcode=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkN2Q1N2IwLThhZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XTdbp9UAmisQ0iAPUgKRb8r01ZPF0q_w9RuIxzisYSY=)** Over the years, my activism has taken me to some unexpected places — courtrooms, Congress, the White House, and even jail cells. I’ve been arrested, shouted at, and dismissed more times than I can count. But through it all, I’ve kept going, **because I believe we can leave the world better than we found it.** That belief is what kept me going in moments like this: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102020556/527826864/2105508926?refcode=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkN2Q1N2IwLThhZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XTdbp9UAmisQ0iAPUgKRb8r01ZPF0q_w9RuIxzisYSY=) _(Not bad for a mugshot, right? 😉)_ And it’s that same belief that led me to climate activism. I’ll never forget one morning, years ago, when I woke up to skies stained red-brown due to nearby wildfires. I felt a deep sense of grief as I saw the damage. Even the birds were dying from it. It became crystal clear to me that the problem of climate change is too big and too complex to fight alone. That’s what motivated me to rally others and help build a movement to tackle this crisis. One of the turning points in my journey came when I read _On Fire_ by Naomi Klein. The science was undeniable: the climate crisis is here, and we have limited time to prevent full-blown climate catastrophe. So I reached out to Annie Leonard at Greenpeace USA, and together we soon launched Fire Drill Fridays. What started with an act of civil disobedience grew into a nationwide movement with thousands of people demanding action. As public support for climate action grew over the years, the actual policies we needed seemed to lose steam due to inaction from politicians on both sides of the aisle. It became clear to me that we not only need to raise hell, we need systemic change. That means changing policies at every level of government. And to change policies, we need leaders who aren’t beholden to corporate polluters — especially Big Oil. That’s why, in 2022, I started JanePAC to defeat the political allies of the fossil fuel industry and elect climate champions at every level of government. I am beyond proud of what we’ve accomplished together since then. But we’re just getting started — and we need you involved. **[Every dollar we raise fuels the fight this year to elect climate champions, block Big Oil’s dirty influence, and build a future where our planet and our people can thrive. Can I count on your support?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102020557/527826865/2105508926?refcode=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkN2Q1N2IwLThhZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XTdbp9UAmisQ0iAPUgKRb8r01ZPF0q_w9RuIxzisYSY=)** Starting JanePAC was never about partisan politics or popular politicians — it was about our collective future. When I think about my grandchildren, their smiles light up my heart, but they also ignite a fire in me. I’m fighting for their future and for every family struggling to breathe clean air and drink clean water because of the fossil fuel industry’s unquenchable greed. Together, we can fight for a sustainable, clean energy future for everyone — you, me, your kids and grandkids, even the birds. But we all need to dig deep to make that a reality. **[Even $5 can make a huge difference as we gear up for the fights ahead in the coming months. Please, join me.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102020559/527826867/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkN2Q1N2IwLThhZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XTdbp9UAmisQ0iAPUgKRb8r01ZPF0q_w9RuIxzisYSY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102020560/527826868/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkN2Q1N2IwLThhZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XTdbp9UAmisQ0iAPUgKRb8r01ZPF0q_w9RuIxzisYSY=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102020561/527826869/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.ad7d57b0-8ae9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkN2Q1N2IwLThhZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XTdbp9UAmisQ0iAPUgKRb8r01ZPF0q_w9RuIxzisYSY=)

clean_body: | With all of Trump’s reckless acts so far as president, it’s easy to feel discouraged. But in moments like this, I remind myself that there’s immense power when people come together to demand change. I hope this email inspires you as I tell you why I started JanePAC and what we’re fighting for together. But before I dive into the backstory, can I ask for your support? = Over the years, my activism has taken me to some unexpected places — courtrooms, Congress, the White House, and even jail cells. I’ve been arrested, shouted at, and dismissed more times than I can count. But through it all, I’ve kept going, because I believe we can leave the world better than we found it. That belief is what kept me going in moments like this: = (Not bad for a mugshot, right? 😉) And it’s that same belief that led me to climate activism. I’ll never forget one morning, years ago, when I woke up to skies stained red-brown due to nearby wildfires. I felt a deep sense of grief as I saw the damage. Even the birds were dying from it. It became crystal clear to me that the problem of climate change is too big and too complex to fight alone. That’s what motivated me to rally others and help build a movement to tackle this crisis. One of the turning points in my journey came when I read On Fire by Naomi Klein. The science was undeniable: the climate crisis is here, and we have limited time to prevent full-blown climate catastrophe. So I reached out to Annie Leonard at Greenpeace USA, and together we soon launched Fire Drill Fridays. What started with an act of civil disobedience grew into a nationwide movement with thousands of people demanding action. As public support for climate action grew over the years, the actual policies we needed seemed to lose steam due to inaction from politicians on both sides of the aisle. It became clear to me that we not only need to raise hell, we need systemic change. That means changing policies at every level of government. And to change policies, we need leaders who aren’t beholden to corporate polluters — especially Big Oil. That’s why, in 2022, I started JanePAC to defeat the political allies of the fossil fuel industry and elect climate champions at every level of government. I am beyond proud of what we’ve accomplished together since then. But we’re just getting started — and we need you involved. = Starting JanePAC was never about partisan politics or popular politicians — it was about our collective future. When I think about my grandchildren, their smiles light up my heart, but they also ignite a fire in me. I’m fighting for their future and for every family struggling to breathe clean air and drink clean water because of the fossil fuel industry’s unquenchable greed. Together, we can fight for a sustainable, clean energy future for everyone — you, me, your kids and grandkids, even the birds. But we all need to dig deep to make that a reality. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for everything. xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

**Thankfully, Jason Miyares fought back. He joined 18 other states in taking the Biden Administration to court over this insane overreach and won.**

It’s simple: According to the law, only those lawfully present in the U.S. may participate in state health insurance exchanges.

The Biden administration’s unelected bureaucrats can’t change the law — only Congress can.

**We’re grateful to have an Attorney General like Jason Miyares who will defend the rule of law.**

_We know accomplishing this goal won’t be easy, and we know it isn’t going to happen overnight._
But to create radical progress, you have to first IMAGINE what a better world looks like and NAME it.
It may take time — it will DEFINITELY take a heck of a lot of money — but we CAN do this.
**__**[**So please, donate to our Elect Black Women fund to help us raise $10,000 by midnight! But Black women still deserve more representation.Two Black women in the Senate is not enough. | | We know accomplishing this goal won’t be easy, and we know it isn’t going to happen overnight. But to create radical progress, you have to first IMAGINE what a better world looks like and NAME it. body:
In swing seats like ours, the election results don’t come down to your efforts on Election Day. It all comes back to the work you put in early on the campaign. All of the money raised, voters reached, and momentum gained in early 2025 are mission-critical to our path to victory. That’s why we’re thrilled to announce our 2025 Founding Donor drive. Our Founding Donors will lay the foundation for everything we’re able to do over the next two years.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102021141/527828989/1943818218?amount=25&amounts=5,10,5,50,250,500&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.12_b1_dthq_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGVhNDFhMDUtOGRlOS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BcXSO_lewM4HI2CP5dy3PmoIimylrXTpSHIryZavDnY=)
---
We may only be a month and a half into the new year, but our campaign team has hit the ground running and is moving full steam ahead on Derek’s re-election effort.

**Look, in swing seats like ours, the election results don’t come down to your efforts on Election Day. It all comes back to the work you put in early on the campaign.** All of the money raised, voters reached, and momentum gained in early 2025 are mission-critical to our path to victory.

**That’s why we’re thrilled to announce our 2025 Founding Donor drive.** Our Founding Donors will lay the foundation for everything we’re able to do over the next two years.

[**Team, we’re trying to secure 100 additional Founding Donors before Friday night to get the fundraising boost we need to kickstart the year. name: Gwen Moore
subject: I took your message straight to Speaker Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
After the overwhelming response to our petition last week, I took your message straight to Speaker Johnson’s office demanding answers!

ICYMI: https://www.thedailybeast.com/dem-reps-storm-mike-johnsons-office-to-protest-elon-musks-hostile-takeover/

A non-elected billionaire MAGA donor should NEVER be allowed access to private taxpayer information. When I asked the Speaker what was going on, he admitted that he didn’t even know. It is unconscionable that the Speaker of the House doesn’t even know what’s happening!

Musk’s billions and primary opponent threats may intimidate MAGA elected officials, but they will never intimidate me. Just because Democrats are in the minority does not mean we’re a silent minority! I will continue to demand accountability and transparency from MAGA Mike and his cronies in the House!

Donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenfeb20252

Together, #WeRepresent!

Gwen
Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District
Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
100% Democracy Defender

About Gwen: The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

Chip in: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenjan2024https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenapril2024?refcode=0402

Milwaukee, WI 53216
United States

Team -- Valentine's Day is the perfect opportunity to express our gratitude to Joe and Jill Biden for their decades of service to our nation.

**They truly love our country, and it shows in their actions: They lowered the cost of prescription drugs, championed public education, charted a new course to fight climate change, and so much more.**

To show our love and gratitude for their leadership, we're putting together a Valentine's Day card for the Bidens -- but we need 50,000 signatures to send it, and **right now yours is missing! We need 86 more Democratic signers in Pennsylvania before February 14th, so act now:**

**[Sign the card to wish Joe and Jill Biden a Happy Valentine's Day! >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21061?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250212-SignTheCard-BidensValentine25-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250212-SignTheCard-BidensValentine25-ETG-sl1&akid=19585%2E9716520%2EZunuVT)**

Congress has an obligation to do the work the American people asked of us, including ensuring their tax bill remains the same (or better yet, goes down). Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

name: ACTION via Peters HQ
subject: Still fighting for LGBTQ+ equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter – Today marks the anniversary of a historic moment for California and the ongoing fight for LGBTQ+ equality: 21 years ago, then-Mayor of San Francisco Gavin Newsom defied state and federal law to issue marriage licenses to same-sex couples. This act of defiance paved the way for achieving marriage equality nationwide.

At the same time in San Diego, Scott also became one of the earliest champions of LGBTQ+ rights in his role as a City Council member.

Since the beginning of his career in public service, Scott has been a fierce advocate for equality. As the Vice Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus, Scott remains dedicated to this fight today.

**But, with Trump issuing executive orders directly attacking transgender Americans, and an ultra-conservative Supreme Court set on unraveling critical protections – it’s never been more important to stand up for our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors.** [Add your name to join Scott in sending a clear message that we won’t let them destroy our progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102023127/527834163/886519936?refcode2=11f041eb-91e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250212_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWYwNDFlYi05MWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wo_k_FrUJUzHXepY1spJHRxzG2IiXP8pZkL3efbkzuU=&emci=1b1ad3c7-8de9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=11f041eb-91e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=5258741)
| | [PROTECT LGBTQ+ EQUALITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102023128/527834164/886519936?refcode2=11f041eb-91e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250212_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWYwNDFlYi05MWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wo_k_FrUJUzHXepY1spJHRxzG2IiXP8pZkL3efbkzuU=&emci=1b1ad3c7-8de9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=11f041eb-91e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=5258741)
---

We must continue to fight for every American’s right to love who they love, marry who they choose, and identify and express themselves authentically.

That’s why today, we’re reaffirming our commitment to LGBTQ+ rights. We will not stop until every American has equal protection under the law.

– Peters HQ

|

clean_body: | | Peter – Today marks the anniversary of a historic moment for California and the ongoing fight for LGBTQ+ equality: 21 years ago, then-Mayor of San Francisco Gavin Newsom defied state and federal law to issue marriage licenses to same-sex couples. This act of defiance paved the way for achieving marriage equality nationwide. At the same time in San Diego, Scott also became one of the earliest champions of LGBTQ+ rights in his role as a City Council member. Since the beginning of his career in public service, Scott has been a fierce advocate for equality. As the Vice Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus, Scott remains dedicated to this fight today. But, with Trump issuing executive orders directly attacking transgender Americans, and an ultra-conservative Supreme Court set on unraveling critical protections – it’s never been more important to stand up for our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors. | | We must continue to fight for every American’s right to love who they love, marry who they choose, and identify and express themselves authentically. That’s why today, we’re reaffirming our commitment to LGBTQ+ rights. We will not stop until every American has equal protection under the law. – Peters HQ | | | = | As a leader among Democrats in Congress, Scott Peters has one of the strongest track records of achieving progressive reforms and getting things done. He’s committed to protecting our environment, improving access to affordable healthcare, implementing compassionate immigration reforms and protecting reproductive freedom. Democrats in swing districts like Scott’s rely on grassroots supporters like you.**= | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress Scott Peters for Congress PO Box 22074 San Diego, CA 92192 United States

We’re currently witnessing MAGA extremism throw our country into a constitutional crisis. It’s easy to get discouraged with the constant barrage of attacks in Washington right now. That’s why we need to look to strong Democratic leaders, determined to push back and take bold action.

Governor JB Pritzker is one of those leaders fighting to protect his constituents in Illinois against Trump’s dangerous MAGA agenda. He recently made history by being the first governor to sign a book banning prohibition bill, effectively ensuring that every child in his state can learn without government censorship.

_**We can’t let his bold, brave actions go unnoticed.**_
