name: Deb Haaland
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I’m launching my campaign for Governor of the great state of New Mexico.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2488%2E4032634%2EbXaG8L)
---
Elizabeth Warren said I could reach out with some exciting news: I’m launching my campaign for Governor of the great state of New Mexico — my home — to bring our state together and build a bright future for all who live here. I’m humbly asking: [**Will you join us as a donor by donating just $3 or more to my campaign and Elizabeth Warren now?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2928?t=8&akid=2488%2E4032634%2EbXaG8L) The amount you give doesn’t matter. What matters is building a campaign with the support of real people. That’s who I am and who I came from. That’s who I am running to serve. My roots in New Mexico run 35 generations deep. The Pueblo people were the first farmers in the high deserts of New Mexico, an agriculture tradition that still continues today. I am here because of my grandfather, who worked for decades as a diesel mechanic on the railroad. Somehow he also kept a field — picking worms off the corn as it grew, like the generations before him. I am here because of my grandmother, a survivor and a caretaker who woke up every day before the sun. She was the one who gave me my true love of cooking New Mexican cuisine. (She wouldn’t let us in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours.) I am here because of my parents and their sacrifice. My mother, a Pueblo woman, served in the Navy. My father, a Marine, received a Silver Star for his service in Vietnam. He now lies in honor at Arlington. I am here because of my beloved child, who I raised on my own. I started a small business to pay the bills, but it still wasn’t always enough. We relied on food stamps to get on our feet. I sometimes had to decide between paying rent and buying groceries to feed our family. I will never forget how that felt or the kindness of those who helped us – strangers who became community. When I look at my Somah, I see perseverance, strength and hope. These are my stories. These are stories of New Mexico. These days, our differences are blown so far out of proportion. We lose sight of a simple fact: we all live in the same state, together. All of us in New Mexico come from love, survival, and sacrifice. We all want to live good lives — and we want even more for our children. The current president and his billionaire friends look at the lands and the people of this country and think: what can I exploit? I am running to ask: if we come together in New Mexico, what good can we do for each other and for the next generation? We have our work cut out for us. The cost of living is crushing our families. Our economy is growing, but we need to make sure _everyone_ shares in our progress. Our families need more. Our farmers and ranchers need more. New Mexico’s children need so much more. And we must be good stewards of the Earth, and preserve the rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests whose beauty sustains our communities. I am running to do all this and more. I am running to serve all New Mexicans and make sure we’re leaving a better future for our children. **[Will you join us with a donation, split between my campaign and Elizabeth Warren?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2928?t=9&akid=2488%2E4032634%2EbXaG8L)** I would be honored to have your support. Many thanks to Elizabeth Warren for helping spread the word. I hope you’ll join us! Be fierce, Deb

---
| | | |
---

My mother, a Pueblo woman, served in the Navy. My father, a Marine, received a Silver Star for his service in Vietnam. He now lies in honor at Arlington. I am here because of my beloved child, who I raised on my own. I started a small business to pay the bills, but it still wasn’t always enough. We relied on food stamps to get on our feet. I sometimes had to decide between paying rent and buying groceries to feed our family. I will never forget how that felt or the kindness of those who helped us – strangers who became community. When I look at my Somah, I see perseverance, strength and hope. These are my stories. These are stories of New Mexico. These days, our differences are blown so far out of proportion. We lose sight of a simple fact: we all live in the same state, together. All of us in New Mexico come from love, survival, and sacrifice. We all want to live good lives — and we want even more for our children. The current president and his billionaire friends look at the lands and the people of this country and think: what can I exploit? I am running to ask: if we come together in New Mexico, what good can we do for each other and for the next generation? We have our work cut out for us. The cost of living is crushing our families. Our economy is growing, but we need to make sure everyone shares in our progress. Our families need more. Our farmers and ranchers need more. New Mexico’s children need so much more. And we must be good stewards of the Earth, and preserve the rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests whose beauty sustains our communities. I am running to do all this and more. I am running to serve all New Mexicans and make sure we’re leaving a better future for our children. I would be honored to have your support. Many thanks to Elizabeth Warren for helping spread the word. I hope you’ll join us! Be fierce, Deb | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2025 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We'll miss you, but you can always .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Urgent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8300%2E5257348%2EW_VCUY ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — I have
an alarming update to share:

The Trump Administration is freezing the hiring and onboarding of
firefighting personnel. This could cost California alone 15,000
firefighters this year.

This is a matter of life and death,
Derek.

After the fires in Palisades, Altadena, and across the Los Angeles area,
we should be investing in firefighting crews and resources. Not freezing
or cutting them. Fire crews simply cannot afford to be shorthanded,
especially at a time like this.

The Forest Service hires thousands of seasonal firefighters each year — I
know because for a very brief time, I was one of them — but now these
critical positions are in peril.

People in fire-prone areas are at much higher risk without the necessary
staff capacity to handle fires. Hundreds of thousands of people in SoCal
live alongside the Angeles National Forest, federal land that relies on
the firefighters now impacted by the freeze. And millions more across the
country face their own fire risks from nearby forests and grasslands.

And the incredibly brave heroes who risk their lives to fight fires are
now facing job insecurity and reduced training because of the Trump
Administration. To make matters worse, they sent a letter to all those
firefighters encouraging them to quit, just when we should be hiring.

It’s a disgrace, and it’s why I wrote to the Trump Administration to call
on them to reverse the funding freeze for firefighters:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20250212-firefighters-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8300%2E5257348%2EW_VCUY ]Fox News Channel headline and quote: Sen. Schiff urges Trump admin to
exclude firefighters from federal hiring freeze "In the face of
increasingly destructive wildfires, we cannot afford to diminish the tools
at our disposal to fight these fires," Schiff said in his letter.
"Impeding the onboarding of federal firefighters and encouraging the early
retirement of others threatens California’s firefighting capacity and puts
communities at great risk. Californians rely on the support of federal
firefighters, and I hope you share my appreciation for the essential role
these individuals play in keeping residents safe."

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20250212-firefighters-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8300%2E5257348%2EW_VCUY ]Derek,
please add your name alongside my own to
call on the Trump administration to reverse course and allow the U.S.
Forestry Service to resume hiring and onboarding. We can’t let Trump and
Elon Musk and their ruthless cuts to public safety threaten the lives of
Americans.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20250212-firefighters-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8300%2E5257348%2EW_VCUY ]ADD YOUR NAME

We need to act with urgency here to restore funding for firefighters.

Thank you for taking action.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5115?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8300%2E5257348%2EW_VCUY ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5149?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8300%2E5257348%2EW_VCUY ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=8300%2E5257348%2EW_VCUY ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=8300%2E5257348%2EW_VCUY ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: I just introduced a bill to protect USAID
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends – I emailed last week about the illegal Trump-Musk shutdown of USAID.
USAID is not only responsible for helping millions of people all around the globe amid starvation, disease, and disaster — it is also vital for our own national security. America’s soft power depends on USAID, and shutting it down cedes that power to countries like the People’s Republic of China, Russia, and Iran.
Un-elected billionaire Elon Musk and the Trump Administration that sits in his pocket are trying to wipe out all of USAID’s critical work and sideline thousands of staff. It’s illegal, and it’s dangerous.
Yesterday, I introduced a bill – H.R. 1196, the Protect U.S. National Security Act – that would prevent government funds from being used to eliminate USAID.
The legislation would ensure that any reform of USAID must be done in accordance with the law, and affirms that only an act of Congress can eliminate USAID. ( You can read more about it here. [https://www.reuters.com/world/us/democratic-lawmakers-introduce-bill-aimed-halting-elimination-usaid-2025-02-11/] )
This is an important first step, but it’s going to take a lot of work to get this bill passed, so I need your help.
Here’s what you can do:
1. Right now, we need to put the pressure on Republican Members of Congress . If you’re in my district, please spread the word about this bill as much as possible – forward this to your friends, post on social media, whatever you can do. If you’re represented by a GOP representative, please call the Capitol switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and ask to speak to your representative. Voice your support for “H.R. 1196 – Rep. Sara Jacobs’ Protect U.S. National Security Act ,” and urge them to sign on to this bill for the sake of our country’s safety.

2. Add your name to show your support [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qmI-wkpJ90mqOfABGQthJA2] for this legislation – because a show of strong public support is a very helpful piece in the puzzle of moving things forward.

3. If you can, chip in to help make sure we can continue this important work [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em] of fighting against an extreme administration that is set on hurling our country into utter chaos.
Elon Musk and DOGE have already taken dangerous measures against USAID in just the past 10 days, shutting down its website, closing its headquarters (and stripping them of their lease), and issuing a stop work order on life-saving humanitarian assistance.
We can’t just stand by during this destruction, and I’m determined to do everything I possibly can to stop Musk and save USAID.
Thank you for reading, and for taking the time to speak out about this with me.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs

clean_body: [] Friends – I emailed last week about the illegal Trump-Musk shutdown of USAID. USAID is not only responsible for helping millions of people all around the globe amid starvation, disease, and disaster — it is also vital for our own national security. America’s soft power depends on USAID, and shutting it down cedes that power to countries like the People’s Republic of China, Russia, and Iran. Un-elected billionaire Elon Musk and the Trump Administration that sits in his pocket are trying to wipe out all of USAID’s critical work and sideline thousands of staff. It’s illegal, and it’s dangerous. Yesterday, I introduced a bill – H.R. 1196, the Protect U.S. National Security Act – that would prevent government funds from being used to eliminate USAID. The legislation would ensure that any reform of USAID must be done in accordance with the law, and affirms that only an act of Congress can eliminate USAID. ( You can read more about it here. [] ) This is an important first step, but it’s going to take a lot of work to get this bill passed, so I need your help. Here’s what you can do: 1. Right now, we need to put the pressure on Republican Members of Congress . If you’re in my district, please spread the word about this bill as much as possible – forward this to your friends, post on social media, whatever you can do. If you’re represented by a GOP representative, please call the Capitol switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and ask to speak to your representative. Voice your support for “H.R. 1196 – Rep. Sara Jacobs’ Protect U.S. National Security Act ,” and urge them to sign on to this bill for the sake of our country’s safety. 2. Add your name to show your support [] for this legislation – because a show of strong public support is a very helpful piece in the puzzle of moving things forward. 3. If you can, chip in to help make sure we can continue this important work [] of fighting against an extreme administration that is set on hurling our country into utter chaos. Elon Musk and DOGE have already taken dangerous measures against USAID in just the past 10 days, shutting down its website, closing its headquarters (and stripping them of their lease), and issuing a stop work order on life-saving humanitarian assistance. We can’t just stand by during this destruction, and I’m determined to do everything I possibly can to stop Musk and save USAID. Thank you for reading, and for taking the time to speak out about this with me. -Sara [] Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] twitter.com/sarajacobsca [twitter.com/sarajacobsca] www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: the path forward from a true Texas fighter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

As you probably know, we lost our good friend and forever hero Cecile
Richards on January 20th of this year.

Though she lived in New York for the last long while, from where she
heroically led Planned Parenthood through some of its greatest challenges,
her heart always remained in Texas. And so it was in Austin that her
family and friends held a memorial service for her this past weekend.

[1]A picture of Cecile Richard's memorial service. It shows a crowd of
people sitting in front of a stage.

I flew up from El Paso Saturday morning and was happy to see a packed
house full of folks who’ve been in the fight from the early days of Ann
Richards’ career, to Cecile’s labor organizing days in East Texas, to her
more recent work with Planned Parenthood and her political action group
Supermajority.

I also saw alumni from our 2022 governor’s race, where Cecile served as
our national finance chair. She had used her national profile to help us
raise the support we needed to give Texans a fighting chance against a
governor who had outlawed abortion and was seeking to remove other
lifesaving healthcare and freedoms from our state.

[2]A picture of Beto O'Rourke, Lucie Baines Johnson, and Cecile Richards

^Standing with Cecile and Lucie Baines Johnson in 2022

Texas AFL-CIO President Rick Levy shared stories about Cecile and husband
Kirk’s Tyler, Texas home being the headquarters for the “booming” East
Texas progressive movement as the young couple focused on organizing
workers in a part of the state that too often went overlooked. Wendy Davis
movingly recalled Cecile’s role in her historic 13-hour filibuster to
preserve abortion access in Texas in 2013.

Others spoke about Cecile’s tireless efforts on behalf of her mother’s
gubernatorial campaigns, her love for her kids and grandkids, her
incredible sense of humor. What an amazing soul!

And finally, her husband Kirk Adams talked about his love for Cecile,
their time in New Orleans together early in their marriage, their lives
spent fighting for justice and freedom — especially for the most
vulnerable — and the fighting spirit that Cecile brought to everything she
did.

He said that if each of us approaches the fight in front of us with that
same spirit then Cecile will live forever.

At that, the Preservation Hall band — joined by young musicians from the
Ann Richards school — led us in a second line parade out into the
beautiful and warm Austin evening, each of us thinking about what we could
do to meet this moment like Cecile would want us to.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250212.I6WBGo&refcode=ema20250212-239980&t=1001&akid=239980%2E444211%2EuSe8_g ]In memory of Cecile, please consider splitting a donation with Planned
Parenthood Texas Votes.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=239980%2E444211%2EuSe8_g

Hi Peter,
Devon Moody here, Director of Politivist Action PAC.
When our rights are being stripped away every day, we’re looking for the next generation of politivists — bold, principled leaders ready to take our movement from the streets to the halls of power. We are running out of time to save our country from billionaires like Elon Musk and Donald Trump trying to tear it down. We need people of action to take on this fight in Congress, in the State House, and in City Hall.
Do you know someone who would make a great activist legislator? Are you thinking about running for office? Now is the time. Click here and nominate someone, or yourself, who you think would be a good activist legislator. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/A0HEnbh1kU6x7g2WdGf4Vw2]
Trump and his allies are working around the clock to dismantle our progress — rolling back civil rights, gutting our social safety nets, and handing more power to billionaires and corporations. But we won’t let them.
Politivist Action PAC is the answer. This is how we fight back. We’re building a powerful, people-driven movement to support grassroots candidates, confront extremism, and advance racial, economic, and social justice. But we need leaders who are willing to step up and carry our fight forward.
Know someone who should run for office, or thinking about running yourself? Submit a nomination today – so we can invest in the next wave of movement-driven champions at every level of government. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/A0HEnbh1kU6x7g2WdGf4Vw2]

This moment demands action. Let’s build the future we deserve—together.
In solidarity,
Devon Moody

clean_body: | | | Our FIRST opportunity to deliver Donald Trump and Elon Musk a big defeat is Virginia’s 2025 House of Delegates elections this November, where Democrats are defending a razor-thin 51-49 majority. As Donald Trump and Elon Musk rampage through our federal government, illegally attacking thousands of civil servants, we have a chance to FIGHT BACK. All 100 seats in the Virginia House of Delegates are up for re-election this year. And in Northern Virginia, home to tens of thousands of government employees, MAGA Republican Del. Ian Lovejoy is the #1 target, representing a district Trump lost. Mom, social worker, and labor leader Elizabeth Guzman is running to unseat Lovejoy, flip a red seat blue, and deliver Trump and Musk a huge defeat. Republicans nationwide are prepared to spend MILLIONS to end the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. We’re counting on you to fight back. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Guzman for Delegate | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. body:
This could have BIG implications for our democracy
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102024615/527838623/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjNDc1ODI5LTk2ZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OIy3hLbg5Gs9gsvKqPeA7WmX5alJb8uTndLH9K3Yh30=&emci=a5437ae2-78e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=bc475829-96e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=8431045)

Peter,

Imagine voting in an election with no problems, only to receive correspondence down the line that your ballot is being challenged. This has just happened in North Carolina, and not only for a handful of voters. I’m talking for more than 60,000 voters. The Republican challenger who lost last November’s state supreme court election is contesting the ballots of more than 60,000 voters. The state supreme court’s GOP supermajority is threatening democracy by baselessly blocking the certification of Democratic incumbent Justice Allison Riggs’ victory. And even now that a state court has just rejected his legal argument, the GOP challenger is still refusing to concede. Peter, as a proud North Carolinian, it pains me to witness what’s happening in the Tar Heel state right now. This is some extreme voter suppression. It’s why, last month, I felt compelled to stand before the North Carolina Supreme Court in Raleigh and read names from the list of over 60,000 voters directly affected by this. It couldn’t be more clear: We can’t let anti-democracy extremists get away with attacks like these. That’s why the work of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee is so important. We’re working to defend free and fair elections in North Carolina and nationwide. And we’ll keep fighting to elect candidates (including state supreme court justices) who uphold the will of the people — and respect the freedom to vote. **[If you are as outraged as I am right now, can you pitch in $30 or anything you can to support our critical work?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102024616/527838624/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NC2_email_20250212-NDRC-Tier1-NC2_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250212-NDRC-Tier1-NC2_&utm_campaign=NC2&express_lane=true&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjNDc1ODI5LTk2ZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OIy3hLbg5Gs9gsvKqPeA7WmX5alJb8uTndLH9K3Yh30=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

I wish I could say that the North Carolina Supreme Court’s outrageous behavior here is out of character. But this is not an isolated case. And they haven’t been afraid to push an anti-democracy agenda even when it reverses their court’s own extremely recent precedent.
You see, in 2022, before the right-wing supermajority was in place, the fair maps movement won _Harper v. Hall_. In that case, the North Carolina Supreme Court struck down the legislature's gerrymandered congressional and state legislative maps. The ruling protected North Carolinians’ right to pick their politicians — not the other way around.
But weeks later, Republicans took back the majority on the state supreme court and announced they would reconsider that ruling. They went on to overturn the decision in 2023. By 2024, North Carolina’s congressional map was no longer a 50-50 split. Instead, Republicans claimed 71% of the seats.
This situation outlines just how much our democracy is threatened — and how urgently we need to safeguard fair representation and fair maps from extremists. They are unapologetic and unmoving in their attacks on our fundamental rights. But we are unafraid to fight back and unwilling to give up.
**[I’m grateful that this team continues to shine a light on power grabs like what’s happening right now in North Carolina. Can we count on you to make a donation to help fuel the fight for free and fair elections?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102024623/527838631/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NC2_email_20250212-NDRC-Tier1-NC2_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250212-NDRC-Tier1-NC2_&utm_campaign=NC2&express_lane=true&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjNDc1ODI5LTk2ZTktZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OIy3hLbg5Gs9gsvKqPeA7WmX5alJb8uTndLH9K3Yh30=)**
Thank you,
Ted Corcoran
Deputy Director, Campaigns
National Democratic Redistricting Committee

clean_body: This could have BIG implications for our democracy | Peter, Imagine voting in an election with no problems, only to receive correspondence down the line that your ballot is being challenged. This has just happened in North Carolina, and not only for a handful of voters. I’m talking for more than 60,000 voters. The Republican challenger who lost last November’s state supreme court election is contesting the ballots of more than 60,000 voters. The state supreme court’s GOP supermajority is threatening democracy by baselessly blocking the certification of Democratic incumbent Justice Allison Riggs’ victory. And even now that a state court has just rejected his legal argument, the GOP challenger is still refusing to concede. Peter, as a proud North Carolinian, it pains me to witness what’s happening in the Tar Heel state right now. This is some extreme voter suppression. It’s why, last month, I felt compelled to stand before the North Carolina Supreme Court in Raleigh and read names from the list of over 60,000 voters directly affected by this. It couldn’t be more clear: We can’t let anti-democracy extremists get away with attacks like these. That’s why the work of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee is so important. We’re working to defend free and fair elections in North Carolina and nationwide. And we’ll keep fighting to elect candidates (including state supreme court justices) who uphold the will of the people — and respect the freedom to vote. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = I wish I could say that the North Carolina Supreme Court’s outrageous behavior here is out of character. But this is not an isolated case. And they haven’t been afraid to push an anti-democracy agenda even when it reverses their court’s own extremely recent precedent. You see, in 2022, before the right-wing supermajority was in place, the fair maps movement won Harper v. Hall. In that case, the North Carolina Supreme Court struck down the legislature's gerrymandered congressional and state legislative maps. The ruling protected North Carolinians’ right to pick their politicians — not the other way around. But weeks later, Republicans took back the majority on the state supreme court and announced they would reconsider that ruling. They went on to overturn the decision in 2023. By 2024, North Carolina’s congressional map was no longer a 50-50 split. Instead, Republicans claimed 71% of the seats. This situation outlines just how much our democracy is threatened — and how urgently we need to safeguard fair representation and fair maps from extremists. They are unapologetic and unmoving in their attacks on our fundamental rights. But we are unafraid to fight back and unwilling to give up. = Thank you, Ted Corcoran Deputy Director, Campaigns National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Team Truth to Power
subject: We’re not stopping now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
Trump and the Republican Party are doing everything they can to push policy and public opinion here to the right.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39434%2E3422442%2E8WGi-r)
Derek,
Even though California has long been a blue state, Trump and Republicans are doing everything they can to push policy and public opinion here to the right.
From attempting to condition the aid to victims of the Southern California wildfires, to targeting federal programs that provide healthcare coverage, Republicans are doing things that will harm Californians.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250212?refcode=em20250212-39434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39434_3422442_8WGi-r&akid=39434%2E3422442%2E8WGi-r)

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250212?refcode=em20250212-39434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39434_3422442_8WGi-r&akid=39434%2E3422442%2E8WGi-r)

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250212?refcode=em20250212-39434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39434_3422442_8WGi-r&akid=39434%2E3422442%2E8WGi-r)
**Republicans are doing everything they can to exert influence on our state.** And in November’s election we saw California voters shift to the right at the presidential level.
Luckily, even as Democrats came up short in races across the country, Californians flipped several red congressional seats blue. This is the energy we need to protect California—and our country—from Trump.
**[Can you chip in $5 or more to Truth to Power PAC today to help us fight against Trump’s agenda?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250212?refcode=em20250212-39434&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39434_3422442_8WGi-r&akid=39434%2E3422442%2E8WGi-r)** Truth to Power supports candidates like Derek Tran and Dave Min, two of the Californians who won key House seats in 2024 and will be critical to keeping the House in 2026.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250212?refcode=em20250212-39434&refcode2=39434_3422442_8WGi-r&akid=39434%2E3422442%2E8WGi-r)
Thank you,

Derek, Even though California has long been a blue state, Trump and Republicans are doing everything they can to push policy and public opinion here to the right. From attempting to condition the aid to victims of the Southern California wildfires, to targeting federal programs that provide healthcare coverage, Republicans are doing things that will harm Californians. Republicans are doing everything they can to exert influence on our state. And in November’s election we saw California voters shift to the right at the presidential level. Luckily, even as Democrats came up short in races across the country, Californians flipped several red congressional seats blue. This is the energy we need to protect California—and our country—from Trump. name: Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
subject: 11 years in prison for saving a life
body:
| | | Good news, bad news
---
| |
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1cf246a874174eab9365051466465be7&_e=K_zB0lAARriBY-SYdwxjwspoNJObHDNtdsbHNHYgyjunInBws9NyVaP6hQrSImVIGBQZjaND2v-BmkS_xcQnq6Qiq_-sPzdfnQeQj434P7PI5_SB7u97QB__5xBIX2CGQfZUJu2tw6ROrvpVndz1NbQR89SV0hXC4qUK5XAS9uBdbeSogr1wQYpciHgNw2DfyFJ8oZ4axkrVaDY2MGnHasLQMlwfs0T9ooWJ0slwvC2CZNidntWcbuwJVJNOEijoxrtsWkeITlwcMvDlsQL1orRr7mMZ1mckO3dJllDf7YUd-M3uaA8yxP9e1KMeNouIXdzlWkUJ1uQSZ_gtmCH4C2gwcpqwgEtx9K9iuPVIn_0S__Mwo-uwyHIq7pXQmByt)

Patriot, I have good news and bad news. The good news is the trial for Officer Brad Lunsford began on Monday, February 3rd.That means as I’m writing this email this brave officer is finally getting his chance to clear his name in court. The bad news is we must come up with $10,000 to ensure we have the funds to cover the trial expenses. **[**As a patriot who backs the blue, I'm asking you to donate $35 or more in the next 24 hours.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1cf246a874174eab9365051466465be7&_e=K_zB0lAARriBY-SYdwxjwspoNJObHDNtdsbHNHYgyjunInBws9NyVaP6hQrSImVIGBQZjaND2v-BmkS_xcQnq6Qiq_-sPzdfnQeQj434P7PI5_SB7u97QB__5xBIX2CGQfZUJu2tw6ROrvpVndz1NbQR89SV0hXC4qUK5XAS9uBdbeSogr1wQYpciHgNw2DfyFJ8oZ4axkrVaDY2MGnHasLQMlwfs0T9ooWJ0slwvC2vA_Tz_ukB1rAhBO2g1Rklzty508Jya7-wiOav0KQjH27GsyC8205EQ_EcCJ3tQSdroxIqab_FRBGveXjxq6c10COojSrVSEAkNwe48qZ-2phCuWddZIseaEce0Lq3ucILUa-bsmBOz0YFgB2tstui)** It's outrageous that Brad has even been charged in this case. He faces a charge of voluntary manslaughter for saving his partner's life from a suspect armed with a knife who was resisting being detained and violently threatened their lives.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. Brad had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's life. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.It was an act of heroism -- but because the cop was white, and the suspect was black...it instantly becomes a felony to a Soros-backed prosecutor. Now Brad Lunsford is facing 11 years prison. Let that sink in. 11 years in prison -- locked away from his wife and young children -- for following his police training and saving his partner's life.**[**I hope you can see why I'm asking you to donate $35 or more right away to help fund Brad's case.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1cf246a874174eab9365051466465be7&_e=K_zB0lAARriBY-SYdwxjwspoNJObHDNtdsbHNHYgyjunInBws9NyVaP6hQrSImVIGBQZjaND2v-BmkS_xcQnq6Qiq_-sPzdfnQeQj434P7PI5_SB7u97QB__5xBIX2CGQfZUJu2tw6ROrvpVndz1NbQR89SV0hXC4qUK5XAS9uBdbeSogr1wQYpciHgNw2DfyFJ8oZ4axkrVaDY2MGnHasLQMlwfs0T9ooWJ0slwvC3l7Q3L3PA54oY-0o9-sKbIt9OU7Wx14JkvCtVxuJjey75JkjU5qbHUGciim5-1G4Xpevn0H8php9VocK0f2oYAHoCddBnxuaJNERUMcxzua646TORuYiQSRi_9A4oItoRqmoxnUjckp8gYdIpwnu_x)** You see, trials are expensive.
---
* Those attorneys we've been paying hourly are suddenly on the case 8+ hours a day for as long as the trial takes.
* The expert witnesses required to put on a solid defense come with hefty price tags.
* And of course, there's travel and lodgings for our officers and their families -- who want to be there to support their loved one.

---
It's no small undertaking to pay for someone's legal defense. Here at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund we're blessed to be able to do this for wrongly accused officers because of the generosity of folks like you. But trials put a huge stress on our budget -- which is why I'm urgently turning to you for help.**[**Can I count on you to donate $35 or more right away?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1cf246a874174eab9365051466465be7&_e=K_zB0lAARriBY-SYdwxjwspoNJObHDNtdsbHNHYgyjunInBws9NyVaP6hQrSImVIGBQZjaND2v-BmkS_xcQnq6Qiq_-sPzdfnQeQj434P7PI5_SB7u97QB__5xBIX2CGQfZUJu2tw6ROrvpVndz1NbQR89SV0hXC4qUK5XAS9uBdbeSogr1wQYpciHgNw2DfyFJ8oZ4axkrVaDY2MGnHasLQMlwfs0T9ooWJ0slwvC3QaldzQZ6RElSDoRitPoqGQSjj0iXp2FPlg0gSG_Kf_xwKhexDAp99VQXAPFnAh5cOV2-_lee3tdGaXc_86Am7_auU-_bzpGXmRiUM6zDYKWm_RRdDyQ8TCsNqouIdTzylFaM56IOhGmRo3e1tXqae)** Knowing we can count on folks like you makes it possible for LELDF to say YES to wrongly accused officers, like Brad, who need our help.Thank you for helping us provide top-notch legal defenses to all our wrongly accused officers.
---
Sincerely,

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Project 2025 in real time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, We are watching Donald Trump implement Project 2025 in real time. I brought a copy of all 900 pages of his Project 2025 agenda to the Senate floor to show that his administration’s plan is clear: _**They wrote it all down.**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102024854/527839382/240206917?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDk3MmMzZC05N2U5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9E_6xhI33DK5D2H-cOvlEhmLz3fWk4_AYbt8J0QVJDM=) By that I mean, all of their plans to give tax breaks to billionaires and dismantle critical programs working families rely on — like education funding and Medicare and Medicaid — _which will run our country deeper into debt, is all there for us to read in Project 2025. _ **They want to make sure that everyday American citizens foot the bill for their self-serving policies.** This is the Trump administration’s plan to _screw the American people_ , and I refuse to stand by without raising my voice. I’m fighting back against every unlawful and harmful executive act that comes out of this administration. For Hawaii and for our country, I promise to stand by our democracy and the priorities of our citizens — not billionaires. So as my team’s first mid-quarter fundraising deadline of the year approaches, I’m humbly asking you:

**[Can you chip in $5 toward our goal so I can continue fighting back against Trump’s Project 2025 agenda? This campaign relies on grassroots contributions to keep our team focused on the work, so anything you can give today will be a huge help in staying on track.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102024855/527839383/240206917?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDk3MmMzZC05N2U5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9E_6xhI33DK5D2H-cOvlEhmLz3fWk4_AYbt8J0QVJDM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102024856/527839384/240206917?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20250212_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDk3MmMzZC05N2U5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9E_6xhI33DK5D2H-cOvlEhmLz3fWk4_AYbt8J0QVJDM=)

clean_body: | Peter, We are watching Donald Trump implement Project 2025 in real time. I brought a copy of all 900 pages of his Project 2025 agenda to the Senate floor to show that his administration’s plan is clear: They wrote it all down. = By that I mean, all of their plans to give tax breaks to billionaires and dismantle critical programs working families rely on — like education funding and Medicare and Medicaid — which will run our country deeper into debt, is all there for us to read in Project 2025. They want to make sure that everyday American citizens foot the bill for their self-serving policies. This is the Trump administration’s plan to screw the American people , and I refuse to stand by without raising my voice. I’m fighting back against every unlawful and harmful executive act that comes out of this administration. For Hawaii and for our country, I promise to stand by our democracy and the priorities of our citizens — not billionaires. So as my team’s first mid-quarter fundraising deadline of the year approaches, I’m humbly asking you: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for everything, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

name: Indiana Democrats
subject: Musk and Trump are dismantling critical agencies and services
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, **The world’s richest person, Elon Musk, has spent the last two weeks dismantling government agencies and doing everything he possibly can to derail our civil service at the behest of Donald Trump. **
* They want to close the Department of Education and cut funding for special needs programs and other services
* They threatened grant funding that Hoosier students and jobs rely on.
* They took control of Treasury information that includes the Social Security numbers and personal information of every American.
* They shut down USAID and left American citizens stranded in war zones with no prior knowledge.

Elon Musk’s recent actions threaten the data privacy of every American and would cut critical services for U.S. citizens. Our Democratic representatives in Washington are working to keep America’s government in the people’s hands. **[Chip in to help build a stronger party going into reorganization, and to oppose these cuts on the local level.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102024919/527839585/1764064610?refcode=250212musk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDRkNTc5MC05N2U5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_daNH0awASIFdW1v1NY1-22xWGgu7PmHDm4Y8TA2UY=)** **Elon’s entire goal is make himself richer and more powerful — not to look out for the American people. ** The American people want accountability, transparency, and responsible decision-making. What we’ve seen from Trump is just chaos. **[Chip into the Indiana Democratic Party’s reorganization fund today to help our new leadership win in 2026, and tell Hoosiers how Trump and Elon are hurting families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102024920/527839586/1764064610?refcode=250212musk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDRkNTc5MC05N2U5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k_daNH0awASIFdW1v1NY1-22xWGgu7PmHDm4Y8TA2UY=)** Thanks,
Indiana Dems

I’m a sixth-generation Arkansan, born and raised on my family’s cattle farm in Yell County. After 9/11, I joined the U.S. Army. I served in combat and with the Old Guard at Arlington National Cemetery. I’m also a proud husband and father to two boys. In the Senate, I’m fighting to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks and make America strong again — I held the line against Joe Biden and Kamala Harris... The union said that would potentially give Musk access to non-public information from the Occupational Safety and Health Administration's (OSHA) probes into his SpaceX, Tesla, and his tunneling company, The Boring Company, as well as investigations into his competitors." | = Team, Elon Musk, the right-wing billionaire who is Donald Trump’s “special employee,” is accessing private taxpayer information by tapping into our government systems. This is an illegal and unconstitutional assault on our data and our infrastructure. No one elected Elon Musk. Nikki and House Democrats are leading the fight against Elon Musk’s attempted takeover, but we’ll be honest — that puts Democrats in frontline districts like IL-13 at the top of the GOP’s target list. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support today, Nikki HQ | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

I don't need to remind you what a pivotal moment this is for the future of reproductive rights. That is why our work at the Center is more vital than ever. We're challenging anti-abortion extremists at every level—in the courts, states, and around the world.

**Why?** Because your fundamental right to control your own body, health, and future should **never** be in the hands of politicians. **But we cannot sustain this fight without you.** [**Your renewal today directly powers our ability to defend reproductive rights in 2025 and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102025132/527840194/1474386068?sourceid=1150396&utm_campaign=25emrge-0218aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzQ0OGQ3Yy05OGU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aDajsqOCasA00zUUmfS9QzHyhALupKj2K4A8IebbCsQ=&emci=83594758-c0e8-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ec448d7c-98e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=954237)

Nancy Northup

name: Jimmy Patronis [FL-01 Special Election GOP Nominee]
subject: As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, Jan 28th…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they’ll sweep back into power THIS YEAR.
I’m officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.
| |
---
| | | Hi - my name is Jimmy Patronis.

**As of 8:07 PM Tuesday, January 28th, I 'm officially the GOP nominee for the FL-01 Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz in Congress.** I'm honored to have the trust of voters AND of President Trump whose endorsement helped put me over the top.

While I'm over the moon to be here today, I'm also reminded of the stakes of this Special Election...

House Republicans are BARELY clinging to their Majority and control of the House. I'll say this in a different way: If Democrats manage to win this Special Election and the two others for Mike Waltz and Elise Stefanik, they'll sweep back into power THIS YEAR.

That's why I'm working with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to sweep all three Special Elections - and save our Majority - so we can deliver on President Trump's agenda.

**_[If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a1398068a9114f88bd7cd0c4ac783745&_e=Y1Kz-qlCBh6-6hvU2w-Dnp1jSN70whkB71HFW7h3WgAzRDFgcGTbxnLt4xUL0ZHAY4b0t49-K2cHljK_yvMtySJXROsCvYgyjJRVQ8dUaHEYLtxhjpjzzZDPt5JrfnKGOy6gFu49jzuKYogpV_QBvIwiz7kKAlETRiWPQc6HU_WAr5dR7gjv0ngdVLPdRAs0Emsq3E1hY_mMCKoqrDz0EUG8OcVo1QdJjKMg6SLg0zpf7RWSJKXAjp6jY3MW-D9xlgB1pjG2tzP46HqkxzNIzrSqArvvDI69iaeZ9ppWELZr7MznJqPqeoZfvILC9dAn-q9DZy53TC833N79U_7bHKZGmevS73jZamr9rMth6vZDz22c8JE_x20s2gCYnwhtRzXVKg28mDzKsRvnmvEb4TkbSiTPp-df6YDps1E2K-o%3D "If you want to support these critical efforts, I humbly ask every Conservative in America to kick in a few bucks before my Special Election. ")_**

_Would you be willing to step up when we need you most? _

Serving the State of Florida has been an honor of a lifetime. I went from refilling ketchup bottles at my family's seafood restaurant to being the CFO and Fire Marshal for the Sunshine State, and now being the Trump-endorsed GOP nominee to replace MAGA Warrior Matt Gaetz.

But I can only take this experience to Congress if I defeat the Democrats in this race.

Special Elections are notoriously expensive and Democrats are desperate to win back the House. **_[That's why I'm teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a1398068a9114f88bd7cd0c4ac783745&_e=Y1Kz-qlCBh6-6hvU2w-Dnp1jSN70whkB71HFW7h3WgAzRDFgcGTbxnLt4xUL0ZHAY4b0t49-K2cHljK_yvMtySJXROsCvYgyjJRVQ8dUaHEYLtxhjpjzzZDPt5JrfnKGOy6gFu49jzuKYogpV_QBvIwiz7kKAlETRiWPQc6HU_WAr5dR7gjv0ngdVLPdRAs0Emsq3E1hY_mMCKoqrDz0EUG8OcVo1QdJjKMg6SLg0zpf7RWSJKXAjp6jY3MW-D9xStOrM918Sjh9PJNVicjXpaqLe7CTdZpt22Ict1wvBz7vR07iG5_reSDwvNZR_B_JjiQ7ZwVLHIWPDLJXFFQAqPL2i4gSNVOAZ_gCc6BX4wLGuhin6BKZIvE5e7xGyCAr1p9sSLg08UFvVjzsl8xXxVItvGkByoLoQyQ7kvBd-mQ%3D "That’s why I’m teaming up with Leader Scalise to help raise $50,000 from this email alone in the next 24 hours.")_**

I JUST won my primary so hitting this goal so quickly would be a major show of force in this race.

**I know we can get there as long as everyone reading this agrees to send in just ten or twenty bucks. Can you do that for me?** ****[**YES >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a1398068a9114f88bd7cd0c4ac783745&_e=Y1Kz-qlCBh6-6hvU2w-Dnp1jSN70whkB71HFW7h3WgAzRDFgcGTbxnLt4xUL0ZHAY4b0t49-K2cHljK_yvMtySJXROsCvYgyjJRVQ8dUaHEYLtxhjpjzzZDPt5JrfnKGOy6gFu49jzuKYogpV_QBvIwiz7kKAlETRiWPQc6HU_WAr5dR7gjv0ngdVLPdRAs0Emsq3E1hY_mMCKoqrDz0EUG8OcVo1QdJjKMg6SLg0zpf7RWSJKXAjp6jY3MW-D9xBFJ2ZFz5KExTnn7yxJpHFy7bj0uyvcBYr5X9hfn8HNspyRIXyZ3sIqZm6-qGNKWv-Iof4KONrYAzgMrbMiwrcjzpLst3aTxvRGooHwTi52d9rVE4f1hJaaFjDXfx9rVaSSwgjWemogMmN7UZzeyV4NrOOZVJ-kADcgIB9CKHcf8%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a1398068a9114f88bd7cd0c4ac783745&_e=Y1Kz-qlCBh6-6hvU2w-Dnp1jSN70whkB71HFW7h3WgAzRDFgcGTbxnLt4xUL0ZHAY4b0t49-K2cHljK_yvMtySJXROsCvYgyjJRVQ8dUaHEYLtxhjpjzzZDPt5JrfnKGOy6gFu49jzuKYogpV_QBvIwiz7kKAlETRiWPQc6HU_WAr5dR7gjv0ngdVLPdRAs0Emsq3E1hY_mMCKoqrDz0EUG8OcVo1QdJjKMg6SLg0zpf7RWSJKXAjp6jY3MW-D9xR7ADoqpnrOU05SYA2eclckoB7RxgBCy8FzGpujmdrH93Ql412qVf_3bk0he_Q5-RX4KXWro875o4JjRnmDVA5EbVNEUFTE92i2CiaFHvU-cWKDq8n9XmmHR6Q9_QM60pJfdl2giw62HmLIkNvaaxobYKkhOdgYsa3NHyydtgrPI%3D)****Thank you for hearing me out.

name: Team Fetterman HQ
subject: Survey results inside 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John’s been fighting since the day he first started running for office, and he’s not stopping any time soon.
#
Hey Derek — Last week we sent out a survey asking your top priorities for the Senate right now and where you think John should be focusing his efforts.
**Today we’ve tallied up the results, and we’re here to give you a behind-the-scenes look at the data.** 📊 The five most common issues people care about most are:
* Holding the administration accountable
* Protecting a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions
* Solutions to climate change
* Protecting and expanding access to health care
* Common sense gun safety measures

And on where Democrats should be focusing their efforts, the most common response had to do with **upholding the rule of law and the Constitution.**
The good news is John’s been fighting for these things since the day he first started running for office, and he’s not stopping any time soon.
**But we’re facing a new reality in Washington, and John needs your help to keep PA 🔵 so he can keep fighting for working folks in the Senate. [Will you pitch in $5 or more to support John’s campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250212?refcode=em20250212-9894&refcode2=9894_434096_DB3XoS&akid=9894%2E434096%2EDB3XoS)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250212?amount=5&refcode=em20250212-9894&refcode2=9894_434096_DB3XoS&akid=9894%2E434096%2EDB3XoS)**
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250212-9894-footer&t=1&refcode2=9894_434096_DB3XoS&akid=9894%2E434096%2EDB3XoS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9894%2E434096%2EDB3XoS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9894%2E434096%2EDB3XoS)

name: Robert Garcia
subject: They Are Coming After Me for Exposing Elon Musk & DOGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
We can't stop now.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102025410/527840996/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2EzZGIzYS05OWU5LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LB3Dz035PyLQ4tQDvHVfuCjIgSCQNWbZzC3RMqnl3po=)
Team,
Today, we held the first hearing of the DOGE Committee in Congress and one thing was clear: Republicans are fully on board with Elon Musk’s plan to destroy our social safety net and give enormous tax breaks to himself and his billionaire friends.
Well, I am not here to work with them while they threaten the health and safety of everyday Americans.
It is a ridiculous sham that the DOGE committee is being run by Marjorie Taylor Greene. This is a person who literally showed pornography in a committee just last year.
But I took on Marjorie Taylor Greene and Elon Musk today.
[As you know Elon has called on his MAGA army to defeat me in my next election. name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Doctors gave my husband three days to live.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
As we speak, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are shutting down the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, one of the few agencies in Washington with the sole mission of protecting Americans against corporate power.
But we won’t go down without a fight. Sign on today to send a message that Donald Trump and Elon Musk need to keep their hands off the CFPB. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xD9xH_j3zUKbWrmLOZbLsg2]
Friend, I lost my late husband over 10 years ago, on Father’s Day of 2014. That night, I made a promise — I told him that I would tell our story every day of my life.
That’s why yesterday, I joined my colleagues to take a stand against this unconstitutional power grab, and I told our story.
When Kevin was a young Black journalist, and I was a young organizer with a young baby, I believed our whole future was ahead of us. Then, one fateful day, he was diagnosed with T-cell prolymphocytic leukemia.
Doctors gave him three days to live. By the grace of God, he lived for two more years. But the cost — financially, emotionally, physically — was devastating. Like so many families navigating our broken healthcare system, we lost everything.
We filed for bankruptcy. We fought tooth and nail just to stay afloat.
That’s why I know, deep in my bones, that agencies like the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) are a lifeline. The CFPB has fought to ensure medical debt doesn’t keep families like mine from renting a home, getting a car, or securing a student loan.
They have returned over $21 billion to low-income and working-class families who were cheated by corporate greed.
And now, Donald Trump wants to shut it down. This is the cavalry for the downtrodden, the sick, the tired, the weeping, the disabled, the everyday people who have been left behind. Trump wants to dismantle it because he cares more about protecting billionaires than protecting working people. We can’t let him win. Sign on now to say: HANDS OFF THE CFPB! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xD9xH_j3zUKbWrmLOZbLsg2]
HANDS OFF THE CFPB! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xD9xH_j3zUKbWrmLOZbLsg2]
And listen, my fellow Democrats in Congress and I will fight every single day to protect working families. We will not back down — not today, not ever. But we need you with us. Add your name now. Let’s defend the CFPB and stop Trump’s attack on everyday Americans. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xD9xH_j3zUKbWrmLOZbLsg2]
In solidarity,
Lateefah Simon
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_021225_cfpb_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_021225_cfpb_actrs] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit
LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_021225_cfpb_actrs]

Oakland, CA 94612

name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/Um7l2oum5hLTcmvg8teKB7mLNx9BttnY3D8trnNt_CZKvzGWXh0mMmIRJPNdRmEqts_q2oKWmygfygDKw-pDaOOS3TExK3mnNRtbGBT8H2nfxzziar9Ch2DxGqkDf7Xc0RHP0Ksb7qWhLEPBc8qRCeai3GOctSxShFXSqSw2ybzDI13C5KCng3BK/fwD2NS6TszNkhnllGdSRcNO8G4TuNtZ5/6)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/fiPmyX4K1FpxR9fQ6IpaWf3y-El6pE5OKjvAFiU-ncikfMTRj5ychezA3rYh98CXqCa71FcneZZGu9YdDx2jNM9vXYmF8JYnrHBzvxXs5WcL-21mspxQmU5obelh2QqhArfyavjxztcwcTq3Nnbiir-zJWdUwq60laZpSap5gXJH-ADZzSabYzseSRDdDPO1O3ri-rj4jpL-CoVdfQEzHuSMVz18mNEEsXpbbL1hEuUholIgNqDHYjAULa1KKmbYuZhzl50RcvjP9kTXo7PyhldDGe1C-BdpgxDJ0ttkwLvqX9wIYawg3GB-UDx2VnY4WYPnybvcNq4io7ANXwxdOBzYcOnW-HpmrGvtv1Nlu9M51qbem60VGxLfWunuGNnkHT0A3KL-_JR2kLZLqACepQTrCYsRuN6pxuu1CjrXDDqR/8shUnxdj-90ZxdKbhBlZXlSITWh9mLVt/6)
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/L8hcn3zAgP84Fv_04AiZpNCK08_JQzKV7XjxgDDHNqEiVUAZ2d-5sfrvivnunv0s3NIuxhTH9FYdWfen2r6OvVbte1PLsmVO-Y4vE7RnF6_h64iN0OuRHmvVYca1-DT2sa-7AYctVl0wugwoqebE9BiljBepPk_VIRYzZnEaeqpV0KR6musBmcQk0JJaLgJccaXXfCIpdR4TFgGRrUdDc-AfwFzHsKf7MHySalXhkhNIEV9v3rb80ALd14btlJbvkTnvEMp6U7XkfZ1dmICt4uSBzF19AWHcyuRGzJBkxfNgLM2jKdvTHXytgD04jnCyD_-3YMKNGAz2XJ3pI8q4tKzRc6qHyjcdw1aAUWVwtHgCreuAyDxZwvzYIrydu1admrzVzTcOT9vERCuk9F6y7yxg6HYuW03jazPmuuDxONNp/W3Cbe-dOBfs4Uoa1hBXlzqYGjZDuO7Si/6)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**
---

name: Team DLCC
subject: $7 helps counter the Trump administration
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Everything from the roads you drive to what your children are taught in school is decided by your state legislators. We must continue to fund states that are being attacked hard by Trump and his administration. | | |
---

Here’s how state Democrats in places like your community are taking action to protect people like you →

1. **Democracy:** States like Michigan and Nevada have passed new laws to criminalize attempts to intimidate election workers or impede voting.
2. **Abortion Access:** States like California, Illinois, and Maine have passed laws to protect out-of-state patients seeking care and shield providers.
3. **LGBTQ+ Rights:** Democratic legislatures in Minnesota, Michigan, and Nevada passed laws to ensure equal rights and ban conversion therapy.

_...And that’s just scratching the surface._

Everything from the roads you drive to what your children are taught in school is decided by your state legislators. We must continue to build Democratic power in our statehouses to counter Trump and Republicans’ right-wing agenda.

clean_body: Everything from the roads you drive to what your children are taught in school is decided by your state legislators. name: Josh Harder
subject: This week
body:
Update on what’s happening in D.C.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102026001/527843121/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2IzMTZhZmEtOWJlOS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aFYFTUhUH6gt0QQUiZ0f7yOCbpd-PA0dFMmuyGp4RsM=) | Hey Peter, it's Josh. I know the news is moving fast right now, so I thought it would be helpful to recap what’s happened in D.C. this week so far and what I believe we should be most concerned about.
* Last week Elon Musk shuttered USAID and this week he’s moved his attention to **defunding the Consumer Finance Protection Bureau (CFPB).** This is the agency responsible for protecting Americans from fraud, scams, and rate hikes. Getting rid of the CFPB will absolutely make consumers less safe.

* Musk also started his march on the Department of Education, announcing **$1B in cuts to programs for our kids.** I believe this is just the start of massive cuts to our public education system. This is a place where public outrage is going to be paramount to pushing back.

* **Public servants and whistleblowers continue to be fired** if they speak out about the cuts or how DOGE is mishandling personal data. The legality of these firings is headed to the courts, and I'm optimistic we will have multiple favorable opinions.

There is a lot moving and it's vital we stay focused and organized in our response. One of the ways we’re fighting back is by building a grassroots show of force through petitions. [_**If you haven’t already, please sign my petition to say we will NOT STAND for this unconstitutional power grab.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102026002/527843122/1425329106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2IzMTZhZmEtOWJlOS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aFYFTUhUH6gt0QQUiZ0f7yOCbpd-PA0dFMmuyGp4RsM=&emci=0521f1d1-82e9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=3b316afa-9be9-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6455652) \- Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Elon Musk had this to say about Ayanna
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250212-1220-foote&t=1001&akid=1220%2E342411%2E2zoW-v ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

It was only a matter of time before Elon Musk set his sights on another
Squad member — this time, it’s Ayanna.

Looks like we struck a nerve when Ayanna called him a “Nazi-nepo baby” who
“breaks everything he touches.” But frankly, if the shoe fits...

Elon has proven time and again that he’ll weaponize his wealth and power
for a quick buck – and it’s all at OUR expense.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250212-movement._zhK6Z&refcode=em20250212-1220&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1220%2E342411%2E2zoW-v ]Peter, will
you chip in to help us continue the fight against Elon Musk and his
attempt to take over our government?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250212-movement._zhK6Z&refcode=em20250212-1220&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1220%2E342411%2E2zoW-v ]Donate ››

Elon is using his access to the president to cut programs and funding
throughout the government in the name of “efficiency,” but the last person
we should trust is a billionaire with his own selfish motives, government
contracts, and foreign entanglements.

Trump, Elon, and their far-right cronies will relentlessly attack
progressive women of color because they’re threatened by power they don’t
understand. But we won’t let them throw us off track. Ayanna, Alexandria,
Ilhan, and Rashida remain focused on showing up for working people,
holding elected officials accountable and protecting our rights.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250212-movement._zhK6Z&refcode=em20250212-1220&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1220%2E342411%2E2zoW-v ]Can we count on you to chip in and help us stay strong in this fight?

Thank you for being with us.

Together,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1220%2E342411%2E2zoW-v

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com
